title: Bilingual French / English Real Estate Virtual Assistant – Research & Cold Calling
description:
Company Overview



We are a North American real estate investment company focused on identifying off-market opportunities. Our work includes researching property owners and contacting them directly to explore potential sales opportunities.



We are looking for a bilingual French / English Virtual Assistant who can combine online research and outbound phone prospecting to help generate leads for our acquisition pipeline.



This role requires someone comfortable on the phone, organized, proactive, and experienced in prospecting or cold calling.



The position is part-time (10–15 hours per week) with the possibility of increasing hours over time.



Responsibilities



Lead Research



Research property owners and potential real estate opportunities online



Use tools such as PropStream and Google Sheets to build prospect lists



Collect ownership information, contact details, and relevant property data



Organize and maintain lead lists and research records



Outbound Prospecting



Call property owners to determine if they may be interested in selling



Follow a simple qualification process and record results



Identify potential motivated sellers



Schedule follow-ups when appropriate



Lead Tracking



Maintain accurate notes from conversations



Track leads and call outcomes in spreadsheets or CRM



Provide daily reports initially, transitioning to weekly reporting



Strategy Contribution



Because we are continuously improving our systems, we are looking for someone who can:



Suggest prospecting strategies



Help improve calling scripts



Recommend tools or systems that improve lead generation



Target Markets



You will help prospect property owners in:



Arizona (USA)



Florida (USA)



Quebec (Canada)



The role includes contacting owners of various property types, including vacant land and residential properties.



Schedule



Part-time: 10–15 hours per week



Must be available to make calls during Eastern Time business hours



Compensation



Hourly rate: TBD depending on experience



Performance bonuses available for closed deals



Requirements



Fluent English and French (spoken)



Experience with cold calling or outbound sales



Comfortable speaking with property owners by phone



Strong internet research skills



Organized and reliable



Quiet work environment and stable internet connection



Preferred Experience



Experience in any of the following is a strong advantage:



Real estate investing



Property acquisitions



Lead generation



Cold calling for North American markets



Working with tools such as PropStream, CRMs, or dialer software

title: Meta Ads Videographer (Performance Marketing / UGC)
description:
We’re looking for a Meta Ads Videographer who understands how to create high-performing video creatives for
 and Instagram ads.



Your role will be to film, edit, and produce short-form ad creatives designed specifically for paid social performance marketing. These videos should be optimized for conversions, hooks, and scroll-stopping engagement.



You’ll work closely with our marketing team to produce ad creatives that follow proven conversion-based frameworks and are designed to scale in Meta Ads.



Responsibilities

- Film short-form video ads (UGC style, product demos, lifestyle content)

- Edit high-converting Meta ad creatives

- Produce multiple ad variations for testing

- Follow creative briefs and performance frameworks

- Shoot both studio and natural/lifestyle footage

- Optimize content for mobile formats (9:16)

- Collaborate with the marketing team to iterate based on ad performance



Requirements

- Experience creating video for Meta /
 / Instagram ads

- Strong understanding of UGC and direct-response creatives

- Skilled in filming and editing short-form videos

- Experience with tools like Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, or similar

- Ability to produce multiple creative variations quickly

- Understanding of hooks, storytelling, and conversion-focused content



Bonus

- Experience working with eCommerce brands

- Familiarity with Meta Ads performance metrics

title: Project Manager
description:
Sales Support & Operations Coordinator

title: Remote Grant Writer (Manual Writing – No AI Tools)
description:
Help Fuel the Mission to Rebuild Communities With Equity at the Center

Parity Homes is seeking a passionate and detail-driven Remote Grant Writer to join our mission-aligned team. In this role, you will research funding opportunities, craft compelling proposals, and secure resources that directly support our work transforming long-abandoned Baltimore rowhomes into pathways to wealth, stability, and community resilience.

Our small but ambitious team values collaboration, transparency, and craftsmanship—not only in the homes we restore, but in the systems and partnerships we build. As part of a culture where every voice matters, your words will help shape the future of equitable housing investment.

Learn more about our mission in our TED Talk or visit us at 
.



Key Responsibilities

Research & Opportunity Identification

 • Conduct thorough research to identify grant opportunities aligned with Parity Homes’ mission and housing programs.

 • Stay informed on trends, best practices, and evolving strategies in the grant-funding landscape.



Proposal Development

 • Collaborate with organizational leaders and program staff to understand funding needs and strategic priorities.

 • Draft, edit, and prepare grant proposals, letters of intent, and supporting documents that clearly communicate our work, impact, and vision.

 • Ensure all submissions meet funder guidelines, requirements, and deadlines.



Submission & Follow-up

 • Manage the full grant submission process, ensuring timely and accurate application delivery.

 • Maintain organized records of all grant activities, submissions, and funder communications.

 • Follow up with funding agencies to track proposal progress and requests.

Grant Management & Reporting

 • Assist with the administration of awarded grants, ensuring compliance with all terms and reporting requirements.

 • Collaborate with finance and program teams to prepare financial statements, progress updates, and impact reports.



Relationship Building

 • Cultivate and maintain strong relationships with funders, partners, and potential donors.

 • Represent Parity Homes in meetings and communications with funding agencies.



Additional Responsibilities

 • Support strategic planning to align grant-seeking efforts with organizational goals.

 • Provide training and guidance to staff on grant-writing best practices.

 • Perform other duties as needed to advance the mission.



Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in English, Communications, Nonprofit Management, or a related field.

 • Proven experience as a grant writer with a track record of successful awards.

 • Exceptional written and verbal communication skills.

 • Strong research, analytical, and critical-thinking abilities.

 • High attention to detail and ability to meet tight deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

 • Proficiency with grant databases, online submission portals, and digital research tools.

 • Understanding of the nonprofit sector and funding ecosystem.



Preferred Attributes

 • Experience with grant administration and compliance reporting.

 • Ability to work both independently and collaboratively in a remote team setting.

 • Strong organizational and time-management skills.



Working Conditions

• Fully remote position with flexible working hours.

 • Reliable internet connection and a suitable home office environment required.



Performance Expectations

• Research at least 5 grant opportunities per week.

 • Prepare and submit 10 high-quality grant proposals per month.

 • Complete timely and accurate reporting for all active grants.



Join Us

If you are a strategic thinker with a love for storytelling, a commitment to accuracy, and a passion for expanding equitable housing solutions, we would love to hear from you. Apply today and help us secure the resources needed to build stronger, more resilient communities—one proposal at a time.

title: Lead Generation & Appointment Setter
description:
Stock2Cash is an Australian, tech-led Start-up in the E-commerce space. We are looking to hire an individual with a problem-solving mindset and a " can-do” mentality to join our growing team as a lead and an appointment setter 



We are looking for a motivated and personable Lead Generation & Appointment Setter to help us expand our network of retail partners. Your role will be to identify potential businesses, start conversations with decision makers, and book qualified meetings for our team.



You will play a key role in our growth by opening the door to new partnerships. This position is ideal for someone who enjoys connecting with people, creating opportunities, and being part of a growing business.



What You’ll Do



-Research and identify potential businesses that could benefit from our solution

-Reach out to prospects via LinkedIn,
, and phone

-Introduce our platform in a clear and engaging way

-Qualify leads and identify the right decision makers

-Book meetings or demo calls for our team

-Track conversations and follow up with interested prospects

-Help build a strong pipeline of potential partners



What We’re Looking For



-Strong communication and relationship-building skills

-Comfortable with outreach and starting conversations

-Organised and reliable with follow-ups

-Self-motivated and able to work independently

-Experience in lead generation, sales development, or appointment setting is highly valued



Why Join Us



You’ll be working with a growing platform helping retailers solve a real problem: turning slow-moving and excess stock into working capital. Our solution helps retailers move products that would otherwise sit on shelves and unlock value from their inventory.



Stock2Cash  is looking to build a fun, exceptional team, so you can expect to come in with a ton of support and training. We’re fully set up to support our whole team working from home; we know the only thing scarier than starting a new job is starting a new job remotely, but we’ve got you ;)

title: Systems Coordinator
description:
Position Overview:  



The Systems Coordinator is responsible for creating, managing, and troubleshooting automation workflows in GoHighLevel (GHL) to support efficient operations across the company. This role requires at least one year of hands-on experience in GHL or a similar automation platform, along with strong analytical and problem-solving skills. In addition to system automation, this person will assist the Admin Operations Team with various ad hoc tasks and continuously seek opportunities to optimize workflows, eliminate inefficiencies, and enhance team productivity. 



 



Pay Range: $8 per hourwith a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 



About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems, LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 



Objectives: 



Build, maintain, and troubleshoot automation workflows in GoHighLevel to support streamlined operations. 



Monitor performance of active automations to ensure accuracy, functionality, and timely resolution of system issues. 



Work closely with the Operations Manager to understand workflow needs and translate them into effective and efficient automations, while coordinating with Admin Operations and other departments as needed. 



Identify inefficiencies in current processes and proactively recommend workflow improvements. 



Assist the Admin Operations Team with various administrative and operational tasks, ensuring smooth day-to-day operations. 



Troubleshoot and resolve Admin Operations Help Tickets with a customer-service–focused approach. 



Manage and update pipelines, triggers, automations, forms, and integrations as needed. 



Ensure all GHL data, workflows, and configurations are maintained accurately and consistently. 



 



Competencies: 



Strong understanding of automation logic, workflows, and pipeline management. 



High attention to detail to ensure accurate configuration and troubleshooting of automation sequences. 



Excellent problem-solving skills with the ability to identify system gaps and propose solutions. 



Strong written and verbal communication skills to work effectively with cross-functional teams. 



Proficiency in GoHighLevel or similar automation platforms (HubSpot, Zapier, Make, Zoho, ActiveCampaign, etc.). 



Ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously in a fast-paced environment. 



Proactive mindset with a drive for continuous improvement. 



Customer service orientation when supporting internal stakeholders. 



 



Equipment Requirements: 



Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently. 



High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work. 



 



Education and Experience: 



At least one year of hands-on experience with GoHighLevel or similar automation platforms. 



Experience in operations, administrative support, or systems management is a plus. 



Familiarity with CRM logic, automation mapping, or workflow design is strongly preferred. 



 



Physical Requirements: 



Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer. 



 



Benefits: 



Growth opportunities in a well-established company. 



Ongoing training and professional development opportunities. 



Opportunity for advancement within the company. 



A supportive and collaborative work environment. 



Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time). 



Paid vacation. 



 



How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalform 



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Growth and Sales Manager
description:
About You 

You want to be part of something with massive potential, there from the ground floor. 

You thrive in environments where the expectations are high, the goal is challenging, the mission is clear, and the team supports each other to get better every day. 

You’re looking for a role with real responsibility, where you feel ownership over what you build. 

You are excited by working directly with a successful entrepreneur who invests in you. 

You want to build something that supports others through stable, dignified, growth-oriented jobs. 

You are a natural closer with a strategist’s mind — equally energized by understanding what makes people say “yes” and building the repeatable systems that turn those yeses into scale. 



Role Overview 

The Growth & Sales Manager is the engine behind Moonlight’s client acquisition strategy. As the Growth & Sales Manager you have a deep instinct for what drives people to say “yes” and the systems-thinking discipline to scale that into a repeatable process. You have a creative and entrepreneurial mind. You are adept at all lead gen tactics — whether it’s cold
, partnerships, webinars, LinkedIn plays, or unconventional outreach strategies. You will work closely with our Digital Marketer to bridge brand and performance — ensuring that outbound efforts are aligned with the broader marketing strategy and that Moonlight is continually being introduced to new audiences in compelling ways. 

Equal parts closer and strategist, this role is responsible for building, refining, and executing our entire outbound and inbound sales funnel — from lead generation through to conversion, onboarding, and renewal. This person is relentlessly outcome-driven, deeply persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, early-stage environment where growth is the mandate.



Qualifications 

? 5-7+ years of experience in a sales, growth, or business development role, ideally in a fast-paced startup or service-based business 

? Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and closing high-value clients through outbound channels 

? Deep understanding of sales psychology, lead qualification, and consultative selling 

? Experience designing or optimizing a high-converting sales funnel — from cold outreach to contract 

? Strong proficiency with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Pipedrive) and sales automation tools ? Excellent verbal and written communication skills — persuasive, clear, and human 

? Highly analytical and data-driven with the ability to identify drop-off points and improve conversion rates 

 Creative thinker who enjoys testing and iterating on outreach strategies, messaging, and formats

? Comfortable collaborating with marketers, operators, and leadership to align growth across functions 

? Thrives in a lean, early-stage environment with high autonomy and a bias toward action 

? Excellent project management and organizational abilities; adept at balancing multiple priorities under tight timelines. 

? Comfort and skill in working remotely with distributed, multicultural teams 

Compensation, Growth, and Benefits 

? Competitive compensation commensurate with experience 

? Opportunity for performance-based bonuses as the company grows 

? Direct mentorship from the founder and CEO 

? 21 days of paid time off 

? Health benefits (in progress) 

? Philippines 13th month end of year bonus 



Apply here:

title: Pacific Admin Solutions LEGAL ADMIN ASSISTANT (Dictation Role)
description:
Rockstar Legal Admin Assistant Needed For Employment Law Firm



Do you want to help top companies defend against Workers’ Compensation claims?



Then we need to work together ASAP.



Don’t miss this.

- Join a fast-growing company working with a top-tier law firm

- Be part of a fun, driven team

- Big opportunities will come from helping us grow

- Long-term position

- Be trained by the best in Workers Compensation defense - we’ll invest in training you

- Be empowered to make decisions

- Have the authority to direct your own path

- Work without being micromanaged

- Work from home

- Emphasis on relative work-life balance in the legal field

- Competitive salary



At Pacific Admin Solutions, we value each of our tea
mbers, and together, we join forces with a top notch law firm in implementing their legal strategies, resulting in out-of-the-box thinking and effective defense of Workers’ Compensation claims.



We work with dedicated and experienced Workers’ Compensation Defense attorneys who work as a cohesive unit to provide unrivaled representation for their clients. The law firm we work with defends every claim with the highest standards.



Our goal is to help our partner attorneys dedicate themselves to their clients’ defense and defend every claim with a unique approach and plan of action.



And to do that, we collaborate with clients to create and implement case specific strategies tailored to reaching favorable results. Come join us in making a difference.



This is a role that will require decision-making, responsibility and independence in your work. We need you to handle the review of attorney-client status letters, involving everything from checking grammar/punctuation of transcribed letters, to then drafting additional letters based on context, to ensuring that all other necessary tasks are being worked on. We want you to play a huge role in things moving forward.



This is an exciting long-term opportunity for you.



As you grow, the position can grow with you, based on your skills and interests.



Whichever direction your passion and talent take you, we’ll offer you training and mentorship so that you really can live up to your potential.



So, are you ready?



JOB OVERVIEW

Main Responsibilities:

- Reading and comprehending case status reports that have been dictated by an attorney, ensuring that there are no grammar and punctuation mistakes, and cross-referencing to make sure that all names are spelled correctly.

- Following attorney-transcribed instructions to draft any additional letters to different parties and making sure any action items are tasked and being worked on by others.

- Will need to be able to sift through large client files with speed and accuracy.

- Familiarity with law-related parties and terms is not required, but will most certainly help.

- Prioritizing urgent tasks and being able to triage work according to what should be completed first



We’re looking for someone who produces a high level of work with meticulous attention to detail. You will be given a certain amount of independence and responsibility to figure out what you need to do and to do it correctly.



Here are some specific examples of the tasks you’ll be handling:

- Going through a case status report - verbalized by an attorney into a 3rd party app/service, that has been transcribed by that service - to ensure that there are no spelling or grammatical mistakes, and that all party names are spelled correctly. The transcription service is fairly accurate, but there will be mistakes and it is your job to find them and clean up the mess.

- In addition to scanning the status report/letter for standard mistakes, you’ll also need to grasp the context of letter to understand what’s going on at a high level.

- You are going to be asked to prepare further correspondence with the various parties of the cases. These will vary from requesting medicals, prescriptions or MRIs from physicians to inquiring with the adverse attorney or co-party about settlement possibilities, to other legal process follow-ups.



Thanks for reading this far! To apply, as the title/header of your application response, please write "Pacific Admin Solutions’ Rockstar”. Also please send me a video introducing yourself (can be a link to a loom or YT vid) briefly discussing the hardest challenge you have faced and how you overcame it (custom, non-template video please). Make the video under 2 minutes.



DESCRIPTION OF IDEAL CANDIDATE

- Takes Pride in Mastering the Details

You have an eye for detail. When you say your work is correct, it’s correct. You cross all of your T’s and dot all of your I’s. You will double (or even triple) check your work to make sure that you did it the correct way.



- Listens To Instructions

Double checking your work doesn’t mean anything if you didn’t follow the correct instructions in the first place. You will listen (or read) to the instructions given to you, making sure that you understand the task at hand. And if the task doesn’t make sense to you, you won’t be afraid to ask to make sure you do the job correctly.



- Does the Job Right

You find a sense of accomplishment in ensuring that you do the job correctly, as you were instructed to do. If you have a question during the onboarding or learning process, you aren’t afraid to ask in order to make sure you do the job right.



- Works Well Independently and on a Team

You are able to take on a task when you aren’t given specific instructions for every single detail involved, and can use a higher level understanding to assume responsibility for the work and make proper decisions. At the same time, you are able to work seamlessly with others - you can exercise empathy and teach a teammate that needs help, and show a growth mindset that is receptive to feedback when learning from others.



- Gets Stuff Done

You take charge and get stuff done! You know you can ask for feedback and resources, but you don’t make excuses. You have a passion and an internal drive to make things happen!



- Self Starter

You’re self-motivated, happy working on your own with minimal guidance. You don’t understand why some people just sit there when they haven't been told what to do.



- Thrives With Hard Work

Some people shrink when given a big project. Not you - you say “bring it on!” It’s just one more opportunity to prove what you’re capable of.



- Solves Problems

Reason, logic, and process is your zone of genius. Your friends are often amazed at how you find solutions so quickly, often before they even realize there's a problem.



- Growth-minded

You’re always learning, always growing. If you weren’t, life would be stale and boring.



- Takes Ownership

You love to be in charge, and you want more responsibility. You’re confident to say, “let me handle this.”



- You Do What You Say

If you say you’ll do something, you’ll do it. And if you can’t do it, you’ll say you can’t. (Why do some people make promises they can’t keep?!)



- Pleasure To Work With

Life’s too short to work 
 looking for someone with a positive attitude who knows how to communicate with his/her coworkers.



COMPANY CULTURE

We're transparent; ask if something isn't clear, feel comfortable to express your difference of opinion. We work hard, we have fun, we believe in a fair work-life balance in the legal field.



PAY

Based on ability and experience, ranging from around 35,000-42,000 PHP per month, for this full-time role (depending on a combination of skills, ability and experience). If you believe you have more to offer, tell us what you’d like and why you’re able to deliver more value.



CANDIDATE REQUIREMENTS

- Honest

- Reliable

- Hard working

- Attention to Detail

- Fluent in English (written and spoken), near native speaker

- Type 50 WPM

- Own computer capable of handling data entry apps such as adobe reader and excel

- Strong/reliable internet connection

- Good character - *will have to be willing to conduct a background check. This role involves work in the legal field, so you will be dealing with sensitive client and medical provider files.



Preferred:

- Microsoft Office and/or Adobe PDF experience



ADDITIONAL DETAILS

*REQUIRED:

- Internet: Fast, stable connection.

- Computer with sufficient specs to be able to handle adobe and microsoft suites (excel, word)

- Background check (no previous criminal background)



Work Environment: Be able to jump on a zoom video call with coworkers during business hours. Need to be able to respond to work-related chat/email communications in a timely manner.



WORKING HOURS

Full time position (40 hours/week): Working hours are ~Monday - Friday, 8AM - 4PM PHT time (with 2-3 hours on Saturday/Sunday mornings). For this position in particular, the days worked are as noted above, though there will be a lit of bit of flexibility in the tangential hours. PLEASE NOTE that your work days and hours may vary, especially during the initial training period, and/or when having to communicate/coordinate with other tea
mbers/clients.



HOW TO APPLY

Respond to the job post with your resume and any requested information.



We look forward to working with you!



Sean Rose

Pacific Admin Solutions

title: Growth & Operations Lead (B2C/DTC Focused)
description:
The Mission:

The Tactical Click LLC is a B2C/DTC Growth Operations & Revenue Infrastructure Agency. We are a revenue-focused consultancy that turns stagnant
 lists into scalable profit engines. We are NOT a "standard" agency.



We partner with high-level B2C and DTC founders generating $25,000 to $100,000+ per month to identify and fix deep monetization leaks. We don't just "support" founders; we act as the Second Opinion that uncovers revenue assets they didn’t know they had.



We are looking for a Hunter who sees the money before the Founder does. I value reliability, radical initiative, and people who execute at a high level without being chased.



What You’ll Be Doing



1. The Hunt (Lead Generation & Acquisition)



Identify Revenue Leaks: Scout the B2C/DTC landscape to find established brands ($25k–$100k+/mo) with strong traffic but broken backend systems (dormant lists, missing lead magnets, or weak nurture flows).



Pattern-Interrupt Outreach: Execute disruptive, authority-driven outreach on LinkedIn and Instagram. We don’t "pitch"—we diagnose.



Pipeline Management: Support booking 2–4 qualified discovery calls per week (8–12 per month goal) and track everything inside our CRM.



2. The Engine (Systems & Operations)



Architecture: Manage the "Systems Engine" in ClickUp and Google Workspace to ensure no lead falls through the cracks. The money is in the "Mud" (the follow-up).



Data Hygiene: Maintain pristine records in 
 and our internal trackers.



Onboarding: Assist with client onboarding and manage deliverables to ensure the infrastructure is built to spec.



3. Content & Brand Strategy



Repurposing: Take high-level thought leadership and repurpose it into high-authority IG/B2C content.



Engagement: Monitor inbound messages and comments to turn social engagement into revenue conversations.



Working Hours & Requirements



Overlap: Must be available to overlap 6:00 PM to 10:00 PM Eastern Time.



Commitment: 10 to 12 hours per week to start, with the potential to scale as you perform.



Tools: Proficiency in Google Workspace, Slack, ClickUp, and 
 is mandatory.



How to Apply (The VELOCITY Filter)



To be considered, you must follow these instructions exactly. Failure to do so is an automatic disqualification.



Subject Line: Your application subject line MUST include the word VELOCITY.



Please include the following in your application:



1. Resume & Portfolio: Show us your track record in outreach or sales support.



2. The Loom: A 2–3 minute video explaining why you are a "Hunter" and how you provide a "Second Opinion" to founders.



3. The Leak: Identify a specific B2C/DTC brand currently generating revenue but leaving money on the table. Tell us exactly what the leak is.



4. The LinkedIn Disruption: Write a 2–3 sentence LinkedIn connection request for that founder. No "I’d love to connect." Use a pattern-interrupt that targets their revenue.



5. The IG DM Disruption: Write a disruptive Instagram DM for that same founder. This should be high-authority and focus on a specific observation of their brand.



6. The Rewrite Challenge:



Improve this Cold
: “Hi [Name], I help founders improve their
 revenue. Let me know if you’d like to chat.”



Improve this IG DM: “Hey, I love your content. Would love to connect.”

title: Credit Repair
description:
MBP Consulting LLC – Virtual Assistant (Lead Generation & Client Support)



MBP Consulting LLC is a U.S.-based consulting company that helps individuals and entrepreneurs improve their credit and gain access to personal and business funding.



Our company specializes in credit restoration, financial education, and helping business owners position themselves for credit cards, business loans, and funding opportunities. Our mission is to help everyday people access the financial systems that allow them to start businesses, buy homes, and build long-term wealth.



We are currently expanding and looking for a Virtual Assistant with excellent English communication skills to support our lead generation, client communication, and credit repair operations.



This is a remote position for 20–40 hours per week for the next 1–2 months, with the possibility of long-term work for the right person who performs well.

title: Credit Dispute
description:
Key Responsibilities

1. Credit Dispute Processing



Prepare and send dispute letters to the credit bureaus (Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion) to challenge inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable negative items.



2. Credit Report Review



Analyze client credit reports and identify negative items such as collections, charge-offs, late payments, inquiries, and judgments.



3. Documentation & Case Tracking



Track dispute progress, organize client documents, and update records in our CRM system.



4. Client Communication



Assist with explaining the dispute process and providing updates on dispute progress when needed.

title: Business Operations Specialist
description:
Hiring Filipino and Philippine-based professionals only!



Wingz, is a leading US rideshare company focused on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT). 

Visit our website: 



Position: Business Operations Specialist

Work Schedule: US Hours (EST)

Employment Set-up: Remote (Independent Contractor)  

Employment Type: Full-Time / Long Term

Salary Range: USD 1,500 - 2,000 / Month

Benefit: Unlimited PTO and HMO after the probationary period

Pay-out Frequency: Semi-monthly

Equipment: Self-Provide



Job Summary:



Wingz are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Business Operations Specialist to support daily operations and key initiatives within our growing healthcare transportation company. This role works closely with leadership to help ensure operational efficiency, support strategic initiatives, and assist with managing business contracts and vendor agreements.



The ideal candidate has experience working with business contracts, service agreements, and vendor partnerships, and is comfortable coordinating across teams to ensure contractual obligations and operational requirements are met.



Key Responsibilities:



Operations Support

• Assist leadership with daily operational coordination and business priorities.

• Monitor workflows and support improvements to operational processes.

• Maintain operational documentation, reports, and internal procedures.



Contract & Vendor Coordination

• Assist in reviewing and tracking business contracts, vendor agreements, and service-level commitments.

• Coordinate with internal teams and external partners to ensure contract terms and deliverables are met.

• Maintain organized records of contracts, agreements, and related documentation.

• Support leadership in preparing or updating operational agreements and vendor arrangements.



Client & Partner Relations

• Support communication with partners and clients regarding operational matters tied to service agreements.

• Help address operational issues while ensuring alignment with contract terms.

• Maintain strong working relationships with vendors, partners, and internal teams.



Strategic & Business Support

• Assist leadership with operational reporting and performance tracking.

• Support projects related to business growth, partnerships, and operational improvements.

• Help identify operational risks or inefficiencies related to contracts and service delivery.



Process Improvement

• Recommend improvements to operational workflows related to contract management and vendor coordination.

• Assist with implementing tools or processes that improve contract tracking and operational transparency.



Requirements:

• At least 3 years of experience in operations, business support, contract coordination, or a similar role.

• Experience working with business contracts, service agreements, or vendor contracts.

• Strong organizational and documentation management skills.

• Excellent written and verbal English communication.

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities.

• High attention to detail when handling agreements and operational requirements.



Preferred Experience

• Experience supporting operations, partnerships, or vendor management.

• Background in logistics, transportation, healthcare operations, or service-based businesses.

• Familiarity with contract documentation, service-level agreements (SLAs), and vendor coordination.

• Experience working with remote teams and operational tools such as Slack, Google Workspace, CRM, or project management systems.

title: Sales Closer / Account Executive (Video Calls)
description:
Stock2Cash is an Australian, tech-led Start-up in the E-commerce space. We are looking to hire to our core team an individual with a problem solver with a “Can do mentality to join as an account manager.



We are looking for a confident and personable Sales Closer to run online meetings with potential partners and help convert them into customers.



Your role will be to meet with business owners over Zoom or Google Meet, understand their needs, explain our solution, and guide them through the process of joining our platform.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys presenting, building trust, and closing deals.



What You’ll Do



-Run scheduled video meetings with qualified leads

-Understand the prospect’s business and needs

-Present our platform and how it solves their problem

-Answer questions and handle objections

-Guide prospects through the onboarding process

-Follow up with prospects who are interested but not ready yet

-Work closely with the lead generation team



What We’re Looking For



-Strong communication and presentation skills

-Comfortable speaking with business owners on video calls

-Ability to explain concepts clearly and build trust

-Experience in sales, demos, or closing deals is preferred

-Self-motivated and results-driven

-Compensation Structure

-This role typically includes commission-based incentives.

-Experience working in the Australian market, a big advantage. 



Example structure:



-Base payment or retainer

- Commission for every partner who signs up



The successful candidate will have the unique opportunity to learn from and influence seasoned entrepreneurs who have built several successful companies. As you take on more responsibility, you will also have the chance to grow financially. Please add 'push boundaries' as your last word in your application or message to show your enthusiasm for this growth opportunity.




 is looking to build a fun, exceptional team, so you can expect to come in with a ton of support and training. We’re fully set up to support our whole team working from home; we know the only thing scarier than starting a new job is starting a new job remotely, but we’ve got you ;)

mbers and stakeholders.

The NEMT Routing Specialist plays a critical role in the day-to-day operations of our transportation services. This role involves planning efficient routes, assigning trips to drivers, negotiating trip acceptance, and ensuring schedules run smoothly. Strong presentation and negotiation skills are key to motivating drivers to accept assigned trips and maintaining operational efficiency.



You will work closely with U.S.-based operations staff and drivers to optimize scheduling, improve trip efficiency, and maintain a high standard of service for patients.

• Plan, schedule, and optimize daily transportation routes for NEMT drivers.

• Assign trips to drivers and ensure acceptance through effective communication, presentation, and negotiation.

• Monitor driver schedules and adjust routes as needed for delays, cancellations, or emergencies.

• Communicate with drivers proactively to resolve concerns, provide support, and encourage timely trip acceptance.

• Ensure all trips comply with NEMT regulatory requirements and company policies.

• Maintain accurate records of trips, drivers, and route changes using company software.

• Collaborate with dispatch, operations, and customer support teams to resolve scheduling conflicts.

• Identify opportunities to improve routing efficiency and reduce operational costs.

• Generate reports on route performance, on-time metrics, and driver engagement.

• Provide insights and recommendations to management to enhance overall transportation operations.



Qualifications:



• At least 2 years of experience in routing, dispatch, logistics coordination, or transportation planning (experience with NEMT or U.S.-based operations is a plus).

• Background in sales, customer service, or client engagement is highly preferred to leverage presentation and negotiation skills with drivers.

• Strong English communication skills (verbal and written).

• Ability to motivate and influence drivers to accept trips while maintaining positive relationships.

• Familiarity with routing and mapping software (e.g., Google Maps, Waze, or route optimization tools).

• Excellent organizational, problem-solving, and time management skills.

• Ability to multitask and manage last-minute changes effectively.

• High attention to detail and accuracy in record-keeping.

• Comfortable working with U.S. time zones (EST).

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet workspace suitable for remote work.



Preferred Skills (Optional but Advantageous):



• Prior experience in Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT) operations.

• Familiarity with NEMT software platforms.

• Knowledge of U.S. transportation regulations and compliance requirements.

• Experience in data analysis or route optimization strategies.



What We Offer:



• Competitive monthly compensation in USD 

• Performance-based monthly bonus ($
per month)

• Paid training and onboarding

• Long-term and stable remote opportunity

• Opportunity for career growth in operations

Hiring: TikTok & YouTube Video Editor 



We are actively seeking a skilled video editor with specialized experience in TikTok and YouTube content creation, with a focus on the ecommerce space—specifically product reviews, unboxing videos, and other ecommerce-related content. The ideal candidate excels at crafting high-engagement videos through strategic text layovers and eye-catching visual effects, with a keen understanding of platform-specific trends and audience preferences. This ecommerce-focused content will be the ultimate goal and output for our ongoing projects.



This is a paid position with a reasonable rate that aligns with the quality, complexity, and volume of your output. Compensation will be discussed in detail once we have reviewed your portfolio.



Key Requirements



- Specialized expertise in TikTok and YouTube video editing, with a proven track record of creating ecommerce-focused content (product reviews, unboxing videos, etc.) that drives strong audience engagement.



- Proficiency in designing and integrating text layovers (captions, callouts, trend-related text) and dynamic visual effects to enhance content appeal and retention.



- Strong turn-around time: Ability to deliver polished edits efficiently, with quick turnaround on projects being a significant advantage.



- Easy and effective communication:  Must be responsive, collaborative, and able to clearly understand and execute feedback—smooth communication is non-negotiable.



- Ability to work in the China (Beijing) time zone, with alignment on working hours for communication and project coordination.



Application Instructions:



To apply, please submit the following materials:



- A direct shared link to your video editing portfolio (must showcase TikTok/YouTube work, text layover execution, and engagement-focused effects).



- Links to your social media profiles (any platforms where your edited work is featured, such as your personal TikTok/YouTube channels or client accounts).



- Additional references or supplementary work samples (e.g., client testimonials, case studies of high-engagement videos) are highly valued as a bonus.



We will review all portfolios thoroughly and initiate discussions about rates with shortlisted candidates.



If you are a creative, detail-oriented editor who thrives on creating content that resonates, we’d love to hear from you!



Regards,

Luke

title: Experienced Xero Accountant
description:
Stock2Cash is an Australian, tech-led Start-up in the E-commerce space. We are looking to hire to our core team an individual with a problem solver with a “Can do mentality to join as an account manager.



We are looking for an experienced and reliable accountant with strong Xero expertise to help manage and maintain our financial records as our business continues to grow.



This role requires someone who is comfortable working with high transaction volumes, reconciliations, and integrations, and who can keep our accounts accurate, organised, and up to date. You will work closely with the founder and operations team to ensure financial clarity and efficiency.



Key Responsibilities



-Manage and maintain company accounts in Xero

-Perform daily and monthly bank reconciliations

-Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable

-Review and maintain accurate financial records

-Prepare financial reports and summaries

-Assist with BAS / GST preparation and documentation (if required)

-Monitor and maintain correct categorisation of transactions

-Ensure all financial data is accurate and up to date

-Support integration of Xero with other platforms and payment systems



Requirements



-Proven experience using Xero in a professional accounting role

Strong understanding of reconciliation and financial controls

-Experience managing medium to high transaction volumes

-Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

-Ability to work independently and communicate clearly

-Reliable and organised with strong follow-through

-Highly Valued Experience

-Working with e-commerce or marketplace businesses

-Experience with payment gateways and platform integrations

-Experience preparing BAS and GST reporting in Australia



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who goes beyond basic bookkeeping and can help keep our financial systems structured, transparent, and efficient as the business grows.



The successful candidate will have the unique opportunity to learn from and influence seasoned entrepreneurs who have built several successful companies. As you take on more responsibility, you will also have the chance to grow financially. Please add 'push boundaries' as your last word in your application or message to show your enthusiasm for this growth opportunity.

title: Patient Acquisition & Meta Ads Manager (Full Funnel – Meta + Google Ads)
description:
Patient Acquisition & Meta Ads Manager (Full Funnel – Meta + Google Ads)



Are you a performance-driven Meta Ads Manager who loves turning ad campaigns into real booked appointments?



We’re looking for someone who can own and scale the entire patient acquisition engine for our growing physiotherapy clinic.



If you enjoy running ads, improving lead flow and turning campaigns into real patient bookings, keep reading.



About the Role



This is not a typical VA role. You will be responsible for managing and improving the entire patient acquisition funnel for our clinic. That means ads, lead flow, CRM management, and making sure leads actually become booked patients. You’ll be managing paid advertising across Meta and Google, improving lead flow and helping us scale patient bookings each month.



This is a full-time remote role.



Salary: $1,300 AUD per month



About You



You’re not just someone who runs ads. You care about results. You understand that marketing success isn’t clicks or impressions; it’s patients actually booking appointments.



You enjoy improving campaigns, solving problems and making systems work better every week. 



You likely fit this role if you are:

- Detail-oriented with campaign data

- Highly organised and efficient

- A strong problem solver

- Someone with a growth mindset

- A clear communicator

- Someone who takes ownership of results

- A collaborative team player



Required Experience

You must have experience with:



- Managing Meta Ads campaigns

- Running Google Ads

- Using GoHighLevel or a similar CRM

- Managing lead flow and booking appointments

- Tracking cost per lead and campaign performance

- Experience running CRM reactivation campaigns is highly valued.

- You should also be familiar with Meta’s recent updates including the Andromeda update and how they affect campaign structure.



Your Responsibilities: As the Patient Acquisition & Meta Ads Manager, you will:



- Manage and optimize Meta Ads campaigns

- Run and improve Google Ads campaigns

- Monitor lead flow and campaign performance

- Respond to leads and book patients into the clinic

- Manage CRM pipelines and automations

- Run reactivation campaigns inside the CRM

- Track cost per lead and booked appointments

- Continuously improve campaign performance and conversion rates



What You’ll Get

- Fully remote position

- Full-time long-term role

- Opportunity to own and scale our patient acquisition engine

- Work with a growing sports and rehabilitation clinic

- Flexible working environment



About PhysioWard Sports & Rehab



At PhysioWard Sports & Rehab, we help people move better, recover from injury and return to the activities they love.



We work with athletes, active individuals, and everyday people in the general population who want to get out of pain and perform at their best.



Our clinic focuses on great patient outcomes, strong systems and continuous improvement.



We’re growing and looking for someone who can help scale our patient acquisition systems.



IMPORTANT – Read Carefully



To show you’ve read this job post carefully, please start your application with the words:



“I’m ready to help PhysioWard scale its patient acquisition engine.”



Applications without this sentence will not be considered.



Screening Questions (Video Required)



Please record a 2–3 minute Loom video answering the following questions.



1. Tell us about a Meta Ads campaign you managed that produced strong results.



Include:



Business type



Budget used



Cost per lead or result



What you did to improve performance



2. Meta recently introduced major updates including the Andromeda update.



In your own words:



What is the Andromeda update?



How does it affect campaign structure?



3. Imagine a campaign is generating leads but very few bookings.



What steps would you take to identify and fix the problem?



Technical Question



When running Meta Ads for a local clinic, would you typically start with broad targeting or interest targeting?



Explain your reasoning.



How to Apply



Apply through OnlineJobs.ph and include:



Your resume



Examples of campaigns you have managed



A 2–3 minute Loom video answering the screening questions



Applications without a video will not be considered.



Bonus points if you include a short Loom explaining a campaign you have run and what improvements you made.

Bonus points If possible, include a screenshot showing the campaign objective (Leads / Conversions / Sales).

title: Website UI Designer
description:
Must use 15 apply points to apply.



About Us

We are a digital marketing agency based in the US specializing in SEO, Google Ads, and
 Ads for clients in the construction, security, and real estate industries. We are a small, tight-knit team that values quality over quantity, clear communication, and people who take ownership of their work.



The Role

We are looking for a full-time website and page designer to own the visual design layer across all of our clients. Everything that goes on a client’s website starts with your design in Figma. You will be the person responsible for how every client’s website and strategic pages look before they go to development.



This is a dedicated, full-time position. We are not looking for freelancers juggling multiple clients. We need someone who is fully committed to our team and available during working hours.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Website design for all clients — homepage redesigns, new website builds, landing page designs, and any other page design work. All designs live in Figma.

• Strategic page design — pillar pages, service pages, and city/geo landing pages. These are high-impact pages that drive SEO rankings and conversions. You will create design templates per client for each page type so new pages can be produced efficiently while staying visually consistent.

• Design QA — after the developer builds your designs, you review the live build against your Figma to make sure everything matches. You catch what’s off before it goes live.

• Conversion optimization — you design with conversions in mind. CTA placement, visual hierarchy, form positioning, and trust signals. When data shows a page isn’t converting, you’ll adjust the design based on what the SEO strategist flags.

• Social media graphics — static post designs for client social media accounts. Consistent brand design across platforms.

• Collaboration — you’ll work closely with our content writer, SEO strategist, and developer. Communication happens in Slack and you’re expected to be responsive during working hours.

Requirements

• Proficient in Figma — this is our primary design tool. Everything you create lives here.

• Website design experience — you understand layout, spacing, typography, and how to design pages that look professional and convert visitors into leads.

• Mobile-first design — every design must account for both desktop and mobile. This is non-negotiable.

• Attention to detail — pixel-level precision matters. When you hand off a design to development, it should be clean and complete.

• Strong communication — you respond promptly in Slack, ask questions when something is unclear, and flag issues before they become problems.

• Reliable and consistent — you show up, you meet deadlines, and you don’t need to be chased for updates.

• Able to take direction and also think independently — we’ll give you briefs and feedback, but we also want you to bring your own design perspective and speak up when you see something that could be better.



Nice to Have

• Experience designing for WordPress or Elementor-based websites

• Understanding of basic SEO principles (headings, CTAs, page structure)

• Experience creating infographics or data visualizations

• Familiarity with brand identity and style guide creation



What We Offer

• Fixed monthly salary — no tracking hours, no guessing what your paycheck will be. Stable, predictable income every month.

• Long-term position — we are not hiring for a project. We want someone who grows with the team.

• Clear role and ownership — you own the design layer across every client. Your work is valued and visible.

• Small team, real impact — you’re not a number. Your input matters and your work directly affects our clients’ results.

• Room to grow — as we expand social media and take on new clients, your role and responsibilities will grow with the agency.



How to Apply

Please do not send a resume. We are primarily interested in seeing your design work.



• A link to your portfolio or Figma projects showing website design work (not just logos or social media graphics — we need to see full page designs)

• A brief message telling us about your experience and why you’re a good fit

• Your availability to start



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Real Estate Market & Licensing Research Specialist
description:
Company Overview:

We are a service based company seeking a highly analytical and detail oriented Real Estate Market & Licensing Research Specialist to support our investment and development initiatives. This role is ideal for someone passionate about real estate, market analysis, and helping identify profitable opportunities for investment and growth





Position Overview:

This position focuses on conducting thorough research on real estate markets, property rehabilitation opportunities, and state-specific licensing requirements for certain programs. The ideal candidate is highly detail-oriented, great with numbers, experienced with the BRRRR Method (Buy, Rehab, Rent, Refinance, Repeat), understands basic construction pricing and workflow processes, evaluates auction properties, demonstrates out-of-the-box thinking, and is capable of performing in-depth research on programs such as Article 28 and Article 31, compiling step-by-step guides for licensing and approvals. The role requires strong follow-through to ensure all aspects of a project are completed from research to execution







Key Responsibilities:



Conduct detailed real estate market research to identify the best-performing and emerging markets for investment



Provide comprehensive market analysis reports, including metrics such as average home prices, rental rates, property values, and local market trends



Research rehab (renovation) opportunities in targeted markets and estimate potential costs, returns, and project feasibility



Understand basic construction pricing, set up, and workflow processes to better evaluate rehab projects



Evaluate auction properties, identifying promising deals and assessing potential risks and returns



Prepare clear and organized Excel reports summarizing findings, including property data, rehab budgets, auction analysis, and deal breakdowns for management review



Perform state-by-state research on rules and procedures for obtaining licenses or approvals required to run certain programs (e.g., Article 28, Article 31, etc.)



Compile step-by-step guides detailing how to file and obtain necessary licenses or program approvals in each state



Present research findings and recommendations in a clear and concise format, using innovative approaches to problem-solving



 Follow through on all aspects of projects from initial research to final execution, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and actionable outcomes  

On-site engagement  from A-Z







Requirements;



Experience in real estate research, data analysis, or investment support



Strong understanding of market evaluation, property trends, and basic rehab cost analysis



Knowledge of basic construction pricing and workflow processes



Experience evaluating real estate auctions and identifying profitable opportunities



Advanced skills in Microsoft Excel (formulas, data organization, and presentation)



Proven ability to conduct independent, detailed research and summarize findings effectively



Excellent written and verbal communication skills



Strategic, detail-oriented, and solution-focused mindset



Demonstrated out-of-the-box thinking to find creative solutions and uncover unique opportunities



Great with numbers and experienced with the BRRRR Method



Fluent in American English (spoken and written)









Position Details:



Type: Full-time



Schedule: Monday to Friday



Hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (1-hour lunch break)



Compensation: $500 USD per month (paid monthly)

The role requires strong follow-through to ensure all aspects of a project are completed from research to execution

Conduct detailed real estate market research to identify the best-performing and emerging markets for investment



Provide comprehensive market analysis reports, including metrics such as average home prices, rental rates, property values, and local market trends



Research rehab (renovation) opportunities in targeted markets and estimate potential costs, returns, and project feasibility



Understand basic construction pricing, set up, and workflow processes to better evaluate rehab projects



Evaluate auction properties, identifying promising deals and assessing potential risks and returns



Prepare clear and organized Excel reports summarizing findings, including property data, rehab budgets, auction analysis, and deal breakdowns for management review



Perform state-by-state research on rules and procedures for obtaining licenses or approvals required to run certain programs (e.g., Article 28, Article 31, etc.)



Compile step-by-step guides detailing how to file and obtain necessary licenses or program approvals in each state



Present research findings and recommendations in a clear and concise format, using innovative approaches to problem-solving



 Follow through on all aspects of projects from initial research to final execution, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and actionable outcomes  

On-site engagement  from A-Z







Requirements:



Experience in real estate research, data analysis, or investment support



Strong understanding of market evaluation, property trends, and basic rehab cost analysis



Knowledge of basic construction pricing and workflow processes



Experience evaluating real estate auctions and identifying profitable opportunities



Advanced skills in Microsoft Excel (formulas, data organization, and presentation)



Proven ability to conduct independent, detailed research and summarize findings effectively



Excellent written and verbal communication skills



Strategic, detail-oriented, and solution-focused mindset



Demonstrated out-of-the-box thinking to find creative solutions and uncover unique opportunities



Great with numbers and experienced with the BRRRR Method



Fluent in American English (spoken and written)









Position Details:



Type: Full-time



Schedule: Monday to Friday



Hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (1-hour lunch break)



Compensation: $400 USD per month (paid monthly)

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

Details

Client: Australian business

To Apply

A short summary of your Zoho experience

Which Zoho apps you have worked with

Examples of automations or systems you have built within Zoho

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO
description:
About Scaledforce

Scaledforce is a Canadian BPO company that helps growing Canadian businesses scale by hiring top-tier remote professionals. We focus on long-term placements, clear KPIs, and strong support so our tea
mbers can build stable and rewarding careers.



About the Client

You will be supporting a serial entrepreneur and founder based in Vancouver, Canada. The client runs a portfolio of companies spanning technology, executive coaching, B2B marketing, and founder community building. He sits on several company boards, hosts founder dinners globally, and believes great people do their best work when they’re not burned out.



Job Overview

We are looking for a full-time, remote Executive Assistant who will become the operational backbone across all of the CEO’s ventures and his personal life. This is not a traditional admin role, it is a strategic partnership built on the Buy Back Your Time framework (best selling book by Dan Martell).



Your mission is simple: within 90 days, the CEO should only need to check
 once or twice a day on his phone/computer. You will own inbox management, calendar orchestration, travel coordination, meeting prep, and personal logistics so he can focus on the highest-value activities that drive revenue and growth.



The right candidate will eventually know how the CEO thinks, anticipate what he needs, and make decisions on his behalf with confidence. This role starts as an executor and grows into a true Chief of Staff over time.



Work Schedule

• Monday to Friday 

• 6:00 AM – 3:00 PM PST (Pacific Standard Time)

• Philippine Time: approximately 9:00 PM – 6:00 AM PHT

• Some flexibility on start/end times, core requirement is availability during CEO’s working hours (8pm-4pm PST)



Salary & Incentives

Base Salary: PHP ?36,000 – ?42,000 per month

Performance-based quarterly bonuses



Key Responsibilities

Daily Operations

• Inbox command center — Triage, draft responses matching CEO’s voice, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks. AI tools handle ~80%; you handle the critical 20% that requires judgment and context

• Calendar orchestration — Manage 5+ calendars across multiple companies, time zones, and booking links. Every slot booked in one calendar must be protected across all others

• Morning brief — Before CEO starts his day, deliver a clear summary of who he’s meeting, why, and what the goal is for each conversation

• End-of-day action sweep — Review all call transcripts, extract action items, and prep a rapid-fire list for the next morning’s 15-minute sync



Recurring & Project-Based

• Board meeting prep — Compile documents from multiple channels, summarize key discussion points, and block prep time on the calendar

• Event and venue logistics — Source venues, confirm requirements, and coordinate details for monthly founder dinners and community events

• Travel planning — Book flights and hotels following detailed preference guides (specific airlines, loyalty programs, seat classes, hotel chains)

• Coaching program invoicing — Manage monthly billing cycles

• Community support — Serve as an ambassador within the founder community, support member intake, and help coordinate screenings



Emerging Responsibilities

• Coordinate house management logistics (cleaner, chef scheduling)

• Personal appointment scheduling (medical, dental, personal care, vehicle maintenance)

• Gift management for clients, friends, family, and tea
mbers



Qualifications

Required:

• At least 3 years of experience as an Executive Assistant or Virtual Assistant supporting a founder, CEO, or senior executive — ideally at a SaaS or technology company

• Strong English communication skills (verbal and written) — you will draft
s, messages, and correspondence on behalf of the client daily

• Proficiency with Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets)

• Proven ability to manage someone else’s
 inbox, calendar, and social media accounts with discretion and good judgment

• Proactive mindset — you anticipate needs, spot problems before they escalate, and take initiative without waiting to be asked

• High degree of discretion and confidentiality

• Reliable internet connection and a dedicated, quiet workspace

• Availability to work during North American Pacific Time business hours



Nice to Have:

• Experience with HubSpot (CRM) — navigating contacts, deals, and logging activities

• Experience with Slack, Asana, and/or other project management tools

• Familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity) and willingness to incorporate them into daily workflows

• Experience supporting someone across multiple businesses or ventures

• Background in the tech, SaaS, or agency space

• Experience with social media management (LinkedIn, Instagram) — responding to messages, not content creation

• Experience booking travel, managing expenses, and coordinating events



Who Thrives in This Role:

• You love being the person who keeps everything running — you get genuine satisfaction from creating order out of complexity

• You’re a fast learner who picks up new tools, systems, and preferences quickly without needing to be told twice

• You have a “no task is too small” mentality — you’ll book a flight and research a podcast guest with equal attention to detail

• You communicate clearly and concisely — you summarize, you don’t ramble

• You’re comfortable making decisions with imperfect information and course-correcting as you learn

• You take ownership — when something is in your lane, you run it without being micromanaged

• You’re tech-savvy and genuinely interested in using AI and automation to work smarter

• You understand that “80% done by someone else is 100% awesome” — speed and action matter more than perfection



Work-From-Home Requirements

• Laptop or PC with Intel i5 or equivalent

• Internet speed of at least 25 Mbps (upload & download)

• Noise-cancelling headset

• Power backup (UPS, generator, or nearby co-working space)

• Quiet, dedicated home workspace with a desk



Why Join Scaledforce

Benefits & Perks:

• 13th Month Pay

• SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG

• HMO Health Insurance

• Paid Time Off + Sick Leave: 10 PTO days (accrued) + 5 sick days after probation

• Quarterly performance bonuses

• Annual salary increases based on performance

• Netflix subscription reimbursement



How to Apply (Important)

Please
 the following to 

• Updated resume

• Short video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and your experience as an Executive Assistant

• Subject line: SF Executive Assistant – [Your Name]



*Only candidates that followed the instructions above will be considered



Shortlisted candidates will undergo:

• Initial Scaledforce screening (30 min)

• Skills and communication assessment (30 min)

• Final client interview (30 min)

title: Chargeback & Dispute Specialist (Stripe Donations – Nonprofit)
description:
We are a nonprofit organization that processes online donations using Stripe. As part of our financial operations, we are seeking an experienced Chargeback & Dispute Specialist to manage and fight donation-related chargebacks.



We are looking for someone who already understands how to build strong dispute responses and maximize win rates when responding to cardholder disputes.



The Chargeback & Dispute Specialist will be responsible for reviewing and responding to disputes submitted by cardholders who challenge donations made to our organization.



All disputes will be handled directly within the Stripe dashboard, where you will review dispute details, collect supporting evidence, and submit representment responses through Stripe’s dispute system.



Your role is to build strong evidence packages and dispute explanations in order to maximize successful outcomes.



Monitor and manage disputes through the Stripe dispute dashboard



Review dispute reason codes and determine the best response strategy



Fight chargebacks directly within Stripe’s dispute system



Prepare and submit dispute responses before deadlines



Compile strong evidence packages including:



Donation receipts



Transaction records



Payment authorization data



IP address and device information



 confirmations



Donor communications



Donation policies and terms



Write clear and persuasive explanations for dispute representment



Track dispute outcomes and maintain organized case records



Identify patterns related to fraud or friendly fraud



Provide recommendations to reduce future chargebacks



Payroll is in btc on

title: Marketing Coordinator (Operations & Growth Specialist)
description:
Remote (Philippines-Based)

Full-Time | 40 Hours per Week | Monday–Friday

Supporting Australian Market



About the Business

We are a fast-growing, experience-led online marketplace operating in the luxury transport and events space across Australia, with expansion planned internationally.

Our platform connects customers with premium experience providers for weddings, luxury events, tourism experiences and brand activations.



We are not a traditional rental company.

We are an experience-first brand focused on partnerships, distribution and emotional 
nts — not paid ads.

We are now hiring a Marketing Coordinator (Operations & Growth Specialist) to help execute and scale our growth strategy.

This is not a basic social media VA role.

This is a growth and operations hybrid role inside a scaling marketplace.



Role Overview



You will work directly with the Founder and sit at the intersection of:

• Partnerships

• Marketplace supply growth

• Booking conversion

• Social & content coordination

• Systems & process building



Your role is to help turn growth into a structured, repeatable system.



Core Responsibilities

1. Partnership & Distribution Growth (Primary Focus)

We grow primarily through partnerships — not ads.

You will:

- Research and build curated partner databases (weddings, luxury brands, tourism, media)

- Conduct warm, relationship-based outreach

- Manage follow-ups and nurture relationships

- Help structure referral and partner programs

- Track partnership-generated bookings

- Support B2B growth initiatives





Industries include:

- Wedding planners & venues

- Experiential & PR agencies

- Tourism operators & luxury hotels

- Automotive & lifestyle media

- Corporate & B2B partners



2. Marketplace Growth & Onboarding Support

- Follow up partially onboarded providers

- Guide providers through documentation and compliance

- Assist with listing activation

- Maintain strong partner relationships

- Improve supply-side responsiveness



3. Booking Conversion & Customer Operations

- Follow up approved but unpaid bookings

- Manage inbound enquiries 
 & chat)

- Improve conversion through proactive communication

- Support premium experience-based offerings

- Capture customer feedback to refine positioning



4. Content & Social Coordination



Social media is used as evidence and social proof — not just presence.

You will:

- Collect user-generated content from providers

- Repurpose footage into short-form content

- Use Canva templates to maintain brand consistency

- Publish across Instagram, TikTok & YouTube

- Support blog creation for SEO

- Turn bookings into ongoing content assets



5. Systems & Process Development

Growth must be structured.



You will:

- Document workflows and outreach systems

- Build SOPs to support scale

- Track KPIs (partners onboarded, bookings generated, conversion rates)

- Identify automation opportunities

- Help reduce founder involvement in day-to-day operations



Required Skills & Experience

You must have:

- 3+ years experience in marketing, operations or growth

- Experience working with AU clients a real bonus

- Strong written and spoken English

- Confidence with outreach and follow-up communication

- CRM experience (HubSpot or similar)

- Canva proficiency

- High attention to detail

- Strong organisational skills

- Ability to work autonomously



Nice to Have

- Marketplace/platform experience

- Wedding, tourism or luxury brand exposure

- SEO/blog writing experience

- Partnership marketing experience

- SOP documentation experience

- Light video editing skills



The Mindset We Want

You think long-term.

You build relationships, not transactions.

title: Overnights Receipting / Bookkeeping Specialist
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented Receipting / Bookkeeping Specialist to support our Property Management clients during the overnight shift. This role is primarily focused on completing trust administration and daily bank account reconciliations while providing accounting and operational support to the overnight team. It is well suited to someone with strong bookkeeping experience who is comfortable working independently in a remote environment.



Key Responsibilities

This position focuses on accuracy, timeliness, and financial integrity across multiple property management accounts:



Trust Administration

• Accurately allocate rent payments to the correct tenant accounts and invoices.

• Process rent receipting within required timeframes.

• Report unidentified payments or discrepancies.

• Assist the property management team with receipting queries.



Bookkeeping & Bank Reconciliations

• Complete daily bank account reconciliations for Property Management clients

• Investigate and resolve discrepancies promptly

• Perform Xero reconciliations

• Prepare payable reports



Operational & Account Support

• Support other tea
mbers working on the overnight shift

description:
TITLE:

Digital Marketing Coordinator (aka; Advertising, Media & Communications Manager)



BUSINESS:

Our business is a dream to work for…

• We provide content promotion and lead generation to global personalities and professionals.

• Our focus (and soon to be your focus) is to help global personalities and professionals succeed by driving attention to their most powerful educational content and drive leads to their business to increase their sales. To do this, we recruit the best video editors, graphic designers, content writers, paid ad media buyers and more.



ROLE:

This role is perfect for you, if…

• You are looking to work in a role of an experienced Digital Marketing Coordinator

• And, you already have advanced skills in building (or running) paid digital advertising campaigns



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Your responsibilities will include…

We will provide training on how to execute each item above, as long as you are the type of person who has the will to learn and master it.
