title: Backend Operations Developer
description:
Role - Backend Operations Developer

Department: Operations & Systems

Reports to: COO (Callum)

Model: Remote (Global)



ABOUT SALES MACHINES

Sales Machines is a done-for-you and done-with-you operations and sales agency for high-ticket infrastructure businesses. We build sales systems and automations, manage tracking dashboards and marketing, and handle sales team management and infrastructure end-to-end. Powered by AI at every level. Fast-moving, high standards, tight-knit group.



THE ROLE

Backend is the core of everything we do. Every client we serve depends on the automations, dashboards, CRMs, and data flows you'll be building and maintaining. When these systems work, our clients scale. When they break, everything stops. That's why we need someone who takes this seriously.

You'll work directly alongside our COO, receiving in-depth task briefs via Loom recordings and written docs. You'll be expected to execute independently — problem-solving on your own first, using AI tools like Claude and ChatGPT to figure things out, and asking smart questions when you genuinely need direction. You won't be micromanaged, but you will be held to a high standard.

We're looking for someone who is sharp, hungry, proactive, and genuinely willing to learn. Someone who takes initiative without being asked and communicates clearly and often. If you have knowledge of the coaching, agency, or info product space — that is a very big plus. You'll understand the business logic behind what you're building, not just the technical side.

AI is central to how we work. You'll be using AI tools at every level of the role — from problem-solving and building automations to iterating on landing pages and streamlining processes. Your knowledge and comfort with AI is really important to us.



If you go above and beyond for us, we go above and beyond for you. We're not shy about bonuses and incentivizing our team when the work speaks for itself.



SUCCESS METRICS

- System reliability: All automations, dashboards, and integrations run error-free across client accounts

- Build quality: Every automation is clean and easy for the team to understand

- Speed: Tasks are completed efficiently without sacrificing quality

- Visibility: Every task is logged in Notion with a clear process and visibility on what you've done

- Initiative: You regularly suggest improvements and optimizations nobody asked for

- Communication: Daily updates via Slack, proactive flagging of issues, clear and responsive communication at all times



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



Automation Building & Maintenance



Build and optimize automations in 
, Zapier, and/or n8n across multiple client accounts

Build and maintain GoHighLevel workflows, automations, and campaigns

Troubleshoot failed workflows and restore full functionality immediately

Connect data flows between Airtable, Google Sheets, Close CRM, ActiveCampaign, and Slack

Work with the team to build and integrate AI tools into automations to boost efficiency

Create, test, and deploy new systems that reduce manual workload



CRM & Data Infrastructure



Set up and maintain Close CRM pipelines, tags, and configurations

Set up and maintain ActiveCampaign
 sequences with conditional logic

Build and manage Airtable bases, dashboards, scripts, and reporting systems

We pride ourselves on having very accurate and in-depth data — maintain data hygiene across all client dashboards, tracking sheets, and CRMs to the highest standard

Create reliable webhook systems for lead capture, payment tracking, and reporting

Ensure consistent, standardized data naming and tagging structures across accounts



Landing Pages & Client-Facing Assets



Build and iterate on landing pages and client-facing web pages — AI does a lot of the groundwork, and your job is to direct, refine, and quality-check the output

Perform quality control on funnels — test every step from opt-in to payment

Ensure new funnels and offers integrate smoothly with the CRM and automation stack



Process & Communication



Log every task in Notion with a clear process and visibility on what you've done

Record Loom videos for training and reference when building new systems

Communicate daily progress, blockers, and completed work via Slack

Flag issues proactively — don't wait to be asked



TOOLS & TECH STACK

Automation: Make, Zapier, n8n, GoHighLevel

Data & Dashboards: Airtable, Google Sheets

CRM & Marketing: Close CRM, ActiveCampaign, GoHighLevel

AI Tools: Claude, ChatGPT, Claude Code, Manus

Web: Landing page builders, funnel tools

Documentation: Notion, Loom

Communication: Slack



REQUIREMENTS

Excellent written and spoken English — non-negotiable

Strong technical and operational mindset — you connect both the build and the business logic behind it

Experience building real automations in at least 3 of the tools listed above

Skilled at troubleshooting — you can diagnose why something broke and fix it fast

Strong communicator — you're clear, responsive, and proactive in how you share updates, ask questions, and flag issues

Familiar with webhooks, APIs, and data mapping between tools

Attention to detail — broken links, missed triggers, and sloppy data are unacceptable

Reliable computer with a fast, stable internet connection (must be working 95% of time)

Comfortable working autonomously from Loom briefs and written docs



Big plus:

Knowledge of the coaching, agency, or info product space

Landing page design and web page building

Familiarity with Claude Code or AI coding assistants

Strong AI proficiency across tools and workflows



WHAT WE VALUE

We're looking for a specific type of person. If these describe you, we want to hear from you:

Initiative — you don't wait to be told what to do when something is obviously broken

Hunger — you want to learn, grow, and take on more responsibility over time

Self-sufficiency — you use YouTube, Claude, ChatGPT, and documentation before asking for help

Care — you treat every client's system like it's your own business

Communication — you're responsive, clear, and never leave people guessing where things stand

Honesty — if you're stuck or made a mistake, you say so immediately



WHAT EXCELLENCE LOOKS LIKE

Every automation runs silently. Issues are solved before anyone notices. You ship improvements without being asked. When you get a brief, you deliver what was asked and suggest what wasn't.



ROLE STRUCTURE

Approximately 30 hours per week

15-20 hours/week ramp during the first 2-4 weeks while you learn our systems and clients

Our team primarily works Pacific Time (PST) but we're flexible — this can be discussed and arranged with what suits best for you

You'll work directly alongside our COO and occasionally communicate with clients in shared Slack channels

Compensation: $600-$900/month depending on experience, with a clear path to $2,000+/month as you grow with us

We will move from hourly tracking to a fixed monthly salary once we understand the workload and your output speed, typically within the first 1-2 months

This is a long-term role with plenty of room for growth — not a quick freelance gig



Note: put the number '47' somewhere in your application so we know you've taken the time to read this entire description.

title: National Coordination Specialist (Remote – Healthcare Operations)
description:
National Coordination Specialist (Remote – Healthcare Operations)

United Diagnostic Services (UDS) is a growing diagnostic healthcare company providing advanced cardiovascular and cancer screening programs across the United States and Canada. We work with first responders, municipalities, unions, and organizations to deliver life-saving early detection services.



We are seeking a highly organized and professional National Coordination Specialist to support scheduling, client coordination, and operational communication across our screening programs.



This is a remote position working closely with our leadership, operations team, and national clients.



Responsibilities



Client Coordination

Communicate with departments, organizations, and clients to confirm screening schedules, logistics, and event details. Maintain clear and professional communication through
, phone, and messaging platforms.



Scheduling and Program Coordination

Coordinate screening dates and locations across multiple states and regions. Confirm schedules with clients and ensure all operational details are properly documented.



HubSpot CRM Management

Maintain accurate records in HubSpot CRM, including client communications, scheduling notes, and follow-up tasks. Track interactions and ensure information is up to date.



Operational Support

Work with the National Coordination team to ensure all screening events are properly organized, documented, and confirmed.



Client Follow-Up

Respond promptly to client inquiries and ensure departments receive timely confirmations, updates, and instructions related to their screenings.



Documentation and Data Management

Maintain organized digital records including intake forms, scheduling confirmations, client details, and internal coordination notes.



Internal Team Coordination

Work closely with the marketing, operations, and leadership teams to ensure all departments have visibility into schedules and client communication.



Qualifications



Fluent English communication (written and verbal)

Strong computer skills and ability to work with multiple software platforms

Experience with CRM systems (HubSpot preferred)

Excellent
 communication and professional client interaction

Highly organized with strong attention to detail

Ability to manage multiple tasks and schedules simultaneously

Self-motivated and comfortable working remotely



Preferred Experience



Customer service or client coordination experience

Experience supporting operations or scheduling teams

Familiarity with CRM platforms, scheduling tools, and project management software



Work Environment



Remote position

Full-time opportunity

Work directly with an international team supporting healthcare screening programs



About United Diagnostic Services



UDS delivers advanced diagnostic screening programs designed to detect cancer and cardiovascular disease early. Our services include full-body ultrasound screening, CT imaging, advanced blood testing, and comprehensive wellness programs delivered across the United States and Canada.



Our mission is simple: early detection saves lives.

title: Paid Media Manager for Ecommerce Brand (Google, Meta & Similar Channels)
description:
About DermStreet

DermStreet is an e-commerce company focused on helping customers discover and purchase premium skincare and beauty products online. We are building a performance-driven growth engine and view paid media as a major lever for scaling revenue efficiently.



About the Role

We are hiring a hands-on full-time Paid Media Manager to lead paid acquisition for DermStreet across Google, Meta & similar channels. This is a performance-driven ecommerce role for someone who knows how to scale revenue, protect ROAS, and turn data into action.



You will be responsible for managing campaigns directly in-platform, improving performance, helping drive creative strategy based on results, and supporting growth across paid channels.



Our primary focus is growing revenue while maintaining strong ROAS.

Responsibilities

- Manage and optimize campaigns across Google Ads, Meta Ads, and similar channels

- Grow revenue while maintaining strong ROAS

- Control budgets, pacing, and account performance

- Test creatives, audiences, campaign structures, and offers

- Help drive creative strategy based on performance

- Support sourcing and testing of UGC-style creative

- Report on performance and recommend next steps





Requirements

- Strong ecommerce paid media experience

- Must have personally managed at least:

    $1M+ annual spend on Google

    $1M+ annual spend on Meta

- Strong understanding of ROAS-focused optimization

- Strong analytical and reporting skills

- Comfortable working directly inside ad platforms

- Able to take ownership of performance





Nice to Have

- Agency experience

- Bing / Microsoft Ads

- AppLovin / Axon

- UGC sourcing experience



****MUST INCLUDE A RESUME AS WELL AS ANSWERS TO BELOW QUESTIONS TO BE CONSIDERED****

- How many years of hands-on experience do you have with Google Ads and Meta Ads?

- Have you personally managed $1M+ annual spend on both Google and Meta? 

- What specific accounts did you manage?

- What types of ecommerce brands have you worked on?

- Do you have agency experience or UGC sourcing experience?

description:
Lifeworks Occupational Therapy is a dedicated allied health practice based in Perth, Western Australia.  We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented, Virtual Assistant to join our Customer Care Team. As our Customer Care Tea
mber, you’ll play a critical role in ensuring the smooth running of our practice by providing administrative support to our team of Allied Health Professionals and Management. 



Your work will help manage client and referrer enquiries, manage client files, streamline scheduling, organise rosters and diaries, and ensure the smooth operation of the practice . If you are a professional communicator who thrives in a fast-paced, multidisciplinary environment and has a heart for patient-centered care, we’d love to hear from you!

mber who wants to grow alongside our practice.

title: Project Manager for Marketing & Digital Services
description:
Job Title: Project Manager (Marketing & Digital Services)





Role Overview

The Project Manager will be responsible for the end-to-end lifecycle of B2B marketing campaigns and CRM implementation projects. You will collaborate with internal teams (Content, Data, Sales, and Tech) and external stakeholders to ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and—most importantly—aligned with the client’s ROI goals.





Key Responsibilities

• Campaign Lifecycle Management: Oversee the execution of lead generation,
 marketing, and digital display campaigns from kickoff to final reporting.

• Stakeholder Communication: Serve as the primary point of contact for clients, providing regular status updates, managing expectations, and resolving bottlenecks.

• Resource Allocation: Coordinate with the Content Creation and Data teams to ensure assets (white papers, surveys, lead lists) are ready for deployment.

• Quality Assurance: Audit campaign setups to ensure they meet PMG360’s high standards for lead quality and data accuracy.

• Timeline & Budget Tracking: Monitor project milestones using tools like Asana, 
, or Jira to prevent scope creep and ensure profitability.

• Process Optimization: Continuously refine internal workflows to improve the speed and efficiency of service delivery.





Required Qualifications

• Experience: 3–5 years of project management experience, preferably within a marketing agency or B2B media company.

• Industry Knowledge: Familiarity with the B2B lead generation funnel (MQLs, SQLs, and Content Syndication).

• Technical Savvy: Proficiency in CRM platforms (HubSpot, Salesforce) and project management software.

• Data Literacy: Ability to interpret campaign analytics and translate "raw data" into actionable insights for clients.

• Certifications: PMP or CAPM certification is a strong plus, but equivalent "in-the-trenches" experience is valued.





Core Competencies

• Adaptive Problem-Solving: The ability to pivot when a campaign isn't hitting its lead targets.

• Precision: High attention to detail (missing a single tracking pixel can ruin a campaign).

• Diplomacy: Balancing the needs of the sales team with the actual capacity of the production team.





If you’re an experienced Project Manager with a background in marketing and digital services, we’d love to connect. Please submit your resume and a brief overview of your relevant experience.

title: Virtual Assistant for Luxury Watch Reselling Business
description:
Toriva Timepieces – United States (Remote / Philippines-based role)



We are a fast-growing, family-run luxury watch dealer specializing in brands like Rolex, Omega, Breitling, Panerai, and more. 

As our business expands, we are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and experienced Virtual Assistant who 

understands e-commerce, online marketplace operations, and digital content workflows—preferably with prior experience in the watch, jewelry, or luxury goods industry.



This role will begin part-time, with the opportunity to transition to full-time as responsibilities grow. We want someone who can jump in immediately, bring ideas, suggest better systems, and operate independently.

________________________________________



What We’re Looking For



We want a VA who:

Has experience listing products on marketplaces (eBay,
 Marketplace, Chrono24, Shopify, or similar)

Can create compelling product descriptions, especially for watches or luxury items

Understands or is willing to learn watch terminology (references, calibers, conditions, service history, etc.)

Is comfortable with photo editing, light graphics work, and improving product images

Has strong English writing skills (for descriptions, newsletters, and social posts)

Is proactive, resourceful, and able to solve problems without needing constant supervision

Can recommend tools, workflows, and ideas based on previous roles



________________________________________



Key Responsibilities



1. Watch Listings & Content

Create and post product listings on:

 Marketplace

 wholesale groups

Chrono24

eBay

“Bump” listings daily in wholesale/reseller groups

Write clear, compelling watch descriptions for each platform

Assist with digital content creation, ad copy, and social media assets (TBD as retail buyer pool grows)

2. Photography & Editing

Organize incoming watch photos

Perform light photo editing (cropping, dust removal, lighting correction)

Help maintain consistent visual branding for listings & social channels

3. Operations & Admin

Create invoices (shared task)

Generate shipping labels, update tracking, maintain shipment logs

Monitor “fishing” listings (scam or unrealistic seller posts) to identify opportunities

Support Google review campaigns

Manage & invite customers to our VIP buyer group (once established)

Assist with weekly newsletter,
/SMS campaigns (TBD as retail audience grows)

4. Social Media & Marketing

Post and maintain all social content across platforms

Schedule content, engage with comments/messages when needed

Stay on top of trends in watch-related groups, hashtags, and engagement strategies



________________________________________



Skills & Experience Required

Experience working for watch dealers, jewelry resellers, e-commerce sellers, or similar

Experience listing on eBay,
 Marketplace, Chrono24, or similar platforms

Strong copywriting and product description writing

Basic photo editing (Photoshop, Lightroom, Canva, or similar)

Familiarity with shipping workflows (ShipStation, PirateShip, USPS/UPS labels, etc.)

Strong English communication skills

Highly organized and capable of managing multiple tasks at once

Ability to work US-based hours for at least part of the shift



________________________________________



Growth Path

This is not a “task-only” role. As TORIVA Timepieces scales, you will take on:

Larger responsibility in marketing, content strategy, and automation

Managing social and
 campaigns

Handling retail customer communication

Helping build internal systems & SOPs

Transitioning from part-time ? full-time with increased responsibilities and compensation

We value people who grow with us—and we reward initiative.



________________________________________



Work Hours & Compensation



Part-time to start (approx. 10–20 hrs/week)

Growth to full-time as performance and business demand increase

Competitive salary based on experience

Performance-based bonuses possible



________________________________________



How to Apply



Please submit the following:

- Your resume and a brief introduction

- A short voice recording introducing yourself (1–2 minutes)

-- Any experience you have with watches or e-commerce

-- Tools you’ve used (eBay, CRM, Canva, photo editing software, etc.)

- Examples of listings or product descriptions you’ve written

title: Marketing Director
description:
Job Title: Marketing Director

Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-Time

Reports To: Chief Executive Officer



About PMG360:

PMG360 is a B2B growth platform combining media, data, AI-driven lead generation, and revenue operations services. We help B2B companies accelerate pipeline growth through integrated solutions spanning content, SEO/AEO, digital advertising, outbound engagement, CRM/RevOps, and proprietary data assets. Our clients range from high-growth startups to enterprise organizations across technology, professional services, cybersecurity, and SaaS.



Job Summary:

We are seeking a modern, hands-on Marketing Director to own and evolve PMG360’s end-to-end marketing strategy. This role is responsible for driving brand authority, demand generation, pipeline contribution, and go-to-market execution across PMG360’s services and platforms.

In addition to leading internal marketing, this role will act as a senior advisor on select client engagements—helping shape campaign strategy, messaging, channel mix, and performance optimization. The Marketing Director will work closely with Sales, Revenue Operations, Data, and Delivery teams to ensure marketing efforts directly support revenue growth and client outcomes.

This is a highly strategic but execution-oriented role, ideal for a B2B marketing leader who understands full-funnel growth, modern RevOps alignment, and AI-enabled marketing.





Key Responsibilities:

Strategy & Leadership

•	Define and execute PMG360’s integrated marketing and go-to-market strategy across inbound, outbound, and partner channels

•	Position PMG360 as a trusted authority in B2B growth, RevOps, AI-driven lead generation, and data-powered marketing

•	Lead and mentor a distributed marketing team across content, digital, social, and campaign execution

•	Establish clear KPIs tied to pipeline, revenue influence, CAC, and LTV—not just top-of-funnel metrics

Demand Generation & Growth Marketing

•	Own demand generation strategy across SEO/AEO, content, paid media,
, social, and outbound support

•	Oversee website performance, conversion optimization, and landing page strategy

•	Manage paid acquisition programs (search, display, LinkedIn, retargeting) with a strong ROI focus

•	Develop scalable campaign frameworks that can be replicated across verticals and client offerings

Content & Brand

•	Oversee creation of high-impact content including thought leadership, case studies, whitepapers, sales enablement assets, and webinars

•	Ensure consistent brand voice and positioning across all PMG360 properties and channels

•	Partner with Sales to align messaging, offers, and enablement materials

Revenue Operations Alignment

•	Work closely with Sales and RevOps to align marketing with CRM workflows, attribution, and pipeline stages

•	Leverage HubSpot and related tools to improve lead quality, nurturing, scoring, and reporting

•	Support lifecycle marketing, reactivation campaigns, and account-based initiatives

Client Advisory & Innovation

•	Provide senior-level marketing guidance on select customer engagements

•	Stay ahead of emerging trends in B2B marketing, AI, data, and buyer behavior

•	Evaluate and implement new tools, platforms, and AI-driven workflows to improve efficiency and outcomes

Budget & Performance Management

•	Own the marketing budget and resource allocation

•	Track performance dashboards and regularly report insights to executive leadership

•	Continuously test, learn, and optimize campaigns based on data





Requirements & Qualifications:

•	8+ years of B2B marketing experience, including 3+ years in a senior leadership role

•	Proven success driving pipeline and revenue through integrated digital marketing programs

•	Strong expertise in SEO/AEO, content marketing, paid media,
, and social channels

•	Hands-on experience with HubSpot or similar CRM/marketing automation platforms

•	Solid understanding of RevOps, attribution, and full-funnel performance measurement

•	Experience advising clients or working in an agency, consultancy, or B2B services environment

•	Comfortable working with data, dashboards, and performance analytics

•	Strong leadership, communication, and cross-functional collaboration skills

•	Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or related field; MBA a plus





What we offer

•	Competitive salary with performance-based incentives

•	Fully remote work environment with flexible scheduling

•	Direct exposure to executive leadership and strategic initiatives

•	Opportunity to shape and scale a multi-brand B2B growth platform

•	Access to advanced marketing, data, and AI tools







How to Apply:



If you are a growth-minded B2B marketing leader who thrives at the intersection of strategy, execution, and revenue impact, we’d love to connect. Please submit your resume and a brief overview of relevant experience.

Join Us and help us drive growth while advancing your career!

title: Long-Term Remote Virtual Assistant
description:
We’re looking for a reliable and highly organised Virtual Assistant to join a small, fast-paced remote team working on an established online platform.



You will work directly with the business owner in Australia, as well as with a small team of coordinators and developers based in different parts of the world. You will also interact with customers and members when handling support tasks. For this reason, excellent spoken and written English is required, and you must be available from 9am Manila time. We are ideally looking for someone who can work around 20–30 hours per week on an ongoing basis, although this may increase over time for the right applicant. Flexibility in your availability is important.



Technology and tools



The role involves working with a range of online systems and tools, including:



Website administration and testing

Trello

Canva

Google Workspace

Dropbox

Aweber and Mailchimp

Social media scheduling tools

Various AI tools where appropriate



What you need to bring



• Excellent spoken and written English

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to read instructions carefully and follow them precisely

• Strong organisational and scheduling skills

• Effective prioritisation and time management

• Confidence using technology and learning new tools quickly

• Ability to use AI thoughtfully and efficiently where appropriate

• Ability to meet deadlines

• Long-term commitment (we hope our ideal applicant will work with us for several years)



Necessary experience



• Website testing and reporting issues clearly

• Customer service via

• Social media scheduling and posting

• Managing
 campaigns using Aweber and Mailchimp

• Creating simple graphics using Canva

• Document formatting and spreadsheet management



What the role involves



You will assist with a wide range of administrative, organisational and customer support tasks. This includes website testing, responding to customer
s, scheduling social media posts, preparing graphics using Canva, managing tasks in Trello, organising documents and spreadsheets, and assisting with
 campaigns.



This role suits someone who enjoys being organised, working carefully through instructions, and supporting a team to keep things running smoothly. You will often receive tasks that need to be completed the same day, so the ability to prioritise effectively and respond quickly is important.



As you become familiar with our systems and processes and demonstrate reliability and attention to detail, you will take on more responsibility and increasingly varied tasks.



The successful applicant will be self-motivated, highly organised, comfortable working with technology, and able to prioritise tasks effectively.



Application process

	1.	Application review

	2.	Interview

	3.	Several paid trial tasks to assess competency, skill and efficiency

	4.	Trial period of 1–3 months



Important



Please do not use AI tools when writing your application. We want to see natural English, and small mistakes are completely fine.



Following instructions carefully is very important for this role.



Please use the following as the subject line of your application
:



Long-Term Remote Virtual Assistant Application



At the start of your message, please write:



“I confirm that I read the instructions and that I did not use AI to write this application.”



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



To apply



In addition to describing your experience in relation to the skills mentioned above, please answer the following questions in your application.

	1.	What experience do you have with website testing or identifying issues on websites?

	2.	What tools do you typically use for organising tasks and managing workflows?

	3.	What experience do you have with customer service by
?

	4.	What experience do you have with social media scheduling and posting?

	5.	What experience do you have using Canva?

	6.	Please describe how you currently use AI tools in your work, including when you find them helpful and when you prefer not to use them.

	7.	What computer hardware do you use for work? Please specify your laptop or desktop type, operating system, and approximate age of the device.

	8.	What mobile devices or tablets do you use (phone model, tablet model if applicable)?

	9.	What do you typically do when you receive detailed written instructions for a task you have not done before?

	10.	Confirm that you are able to start work from 9am Manila time.

	11.	How many hours per week are you currently available to work, and how many hours would you ideally prefer to work per week on an ongoing basis?

• To provide a separate moderation report for each centre stating the performance, any malpractice issues and whether scaling is requires using the template provided by NCC Education



• Following initial submission of report to NCC Education, to implement further changes to marks / moderation processes that may be required as a result of standardisation processes, up to and including conclusion of the NCC Education Assessment Board (within the specified timeframe)



• To respond to any enquires by NCC Education regarding the appointed moderator’s/marker’s marking



• To provide any additional commentary / justification of moderation / marking to the NCC Education Assessment Board



• To respond to and act on any feedback provided by NCC Education through performance management processes



• To undertake training as required by NCC Education.



• Where no conflict of interest arises and when requested, to perform candidate or cohort reviews in order to confirm that marking and moderation procedures have been carried out correctly.



Essential

• A Bachelor’s degree (minimum) in a relevant subject discipline.

• Substantial experience in teaching, examining, or assessment in further or higher education.

• Previous experience as an examiner or moderator for an awarding body.

• Strong understanding of academic quality assurance in the UK and/or international contexts.

• Excellent attention to detail and analytical skills.



Desirable

• A Master’s degree or higher in a relevant subject area.

• Qualification in assessment or education.

• Experience with UK frameworks.

• Familiarity with remote moderation tools and e-marking platforms.

title: AI-Native Marketing & Automation Manager
description:

This role is ideal for someone who spends time discovering new AI tools, understands how automation and agents work, and enjoys combining platforms together to build smarter workflows.



You’ll help us research markets, analyze social media conversations, scrape and organize data, and build lightweight automation systems that power outreach, growth, and fan engagement. We’re especially interested in candidates who think in systems and use AI as a force multiplier rather than just a productivity tool.



This role sits at the intersection of marketing, automation, and AI experimentation.



Responsibilities

Use AI tools and automation platforms to gather, organize, and analyze data

Build or assist with simple automation workflows connecting multiple tools

Identify influencers, communities, and growth opportunities through data analysis

Support outreach and engagement campaigns through automation platforms

Surface insights and patterns from social conversations and fan behavior



This is not just research with ChatGPT, anyone can do that. WE are digging in deeper to the next tier of AI knowledge



Tools we may work with:

Sprout Social • Brandwatch • PhantomBuster • HypeAuditor • Clay

Euka • Instantly.ai • NoimosAI

Klaviyo • Recombee • Enrich Labs AI Agent

Zapier •

Love experimenting with new AI tools and automation platforms

Are curious about how data, marketing, and AI agents can work together

Follow developments in AI, creator economy, and online communities

Enjoy solving problems and finding smarter ways to do things

title: Highly Experienced Video Editor and Trained Graphic Designer (less than 25 hrs per week)
description:
We’re looking for an experienced and skilled video editor with graphic design training to join our team. This is a fast growing personal development brand at the intersection of healing and high performance.



Duties include:

- Long form editing (hybrid podcast / talking head / vlog style) - high retention YouTube videos

- Short form repurposing (shorts, reels) 

- Graphic design for social media (carousels, quote posts and pins from templates)

- Uploading to scheduler, writing captions.



You’ll be working in focus blocks with a small Philippines-based team in an online coworking space.



Hours are 7am-noon Manila time with 50 min work, 10 min breaks each hour. So you are scheduled for 5 hours but essentially are working 4 (because you get almost an hour off in breaks).



- You must be available to *focus solely on this brand during these hours*. 

- (Do *not* apply if you will be working on other tasks during this time. It will not be tolerated so let's not waste each others time.)



The editing style is restrained and elegant but retention focussed. Performance based editing is a must, but style is paramount. You must have skills with on screen text, simple animations, graphics etc. and a good eye for style and detail.



This is a permanent position that starts at 36,000 PHP per month (or 8,000 per week). Wage increase (to 41,625 PHP per month - so 9,250 per week) and paid time off available after 3 months. Percentage based bonuses are given out yearly as are raises.



This is an excellent opportunity for someone who wishes to grow with the company as we are still small but growing fast.



Please send a portfolio of work that demonstrates suitability for the role and a resume.



Applicants will be asked to do a short research question in lieu of interview.

 MARKETING (Bonus)

- Experience setting up high converting
 campaigns



SHOPIFY & ETSY LISTINGS 

- Update titles, descriptions, variants, pricing, images using SEO

? What This Role Is NOT

title: Signage & Wayfinding Designer| Remote-friendly | International Projects
description:
Most designers live in a 2D world of pixels and paper. Here, your work has weight, texture, and light. You won’t just be designing logos; you’ll be defining the physical landscape of places people live in. If you’ve ever looked at a building and thought, "That sign should be deeper," or "That finish should be bronze," you belong here.

About Us 

We’re a trusted signage and graphics company based in the U.S., known for delivering both long-term contracts and fast-turnaround creative projects. Our team follows clear systems and standard operating procedures to ensure smooth execution and high-quality results every time.



Role Overview 

We’re looking for a creative powerhouse who understands Design Intent. You should be able to visualize 3D objects in a physical space and provide clear aesthetic directions. You will lead the "vision" phase—selecting the colors, textures, and scales that make a property, office or retail space stand out. 

•	Schedule: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM CST.

•	Location: 100% Remote / Work-from-home.

•	Growth: Starting as a contract role with a clear path to increased hours and responsibility as you master our systems.



What We’re Looking For

•	7+ Years of Mastery: Expert-level skills in Adobe Illustrator (this is our primary tool).

•	Architectural Literacy: Ability to read site maps and floor plans to visualize where signs "live."

•	The 3D Eye: A natural sense of scale and an understanding of how 2D designs translate to 3D materials like aluminum and acrylic.

•	Industry Experience: Proven background in Environmental Graphic Design (EGD) or Wide-Format Print.

•	System-Oriented: You appreciate a team that has clear SOPs and organized workflows.



Key Responsibilities

•	Transform Spaces: Create "Design Intent" packages for multifamily developments, including entry monuments, wayfinding, and ADA-compliant interior systems.

•	Branding and Marketing via Wall Wraps, Fleet Graphics, and other large-format products.

•	Creative Collaboration: Work with our international team to move projects from a site map to a finished installation.

•	Production Prep: Prepare precise vector files in Illustrator, ensuring color accuracy and brand consistency across all mediums.



Why Join Us?

• Work with an international, process-driven team

• Get exposure to large-scale and quick-turn projects

• Showcase your creativity and build a long-term working relationship

title: Sales Manager / Client Acquisition Director (High-Ticket Advisory Sales)
description:
About Our Firm



Harvest AF is built on the belief that financial knowledge should be used to serve others.



We believe people should be good stewards of the resources they have been given. Our mission is to help business owners and families keep more of what they earn, eliminate unnecessary taxes, and build generational stability for their households.



Unlike traditional tax firms that only prepare tax returns, our firm focuses on:

• tax strategy

• tax planning

• business advisory

• financial clarity for business owners



We work with clients across the United States and regularly help them implement strategies such as:

• S-Corporation optimization

• retirement tax strategies

• real estate tax strategies

• depreciation planning

• entity structuring

• business tax optimization

Our mission is to build a high-trust advisory firm that helps business owners keep more of what they earn while building generational wealth.



Role Overview



We are hiring a Sales Manager who will be responsible for closing advisory clients and managing our sales pipeline.

This role is not a call center position.



This is a high-trust consultative sales role where you will speak directly with business owners and entrepreneurs about their tax situation and guide them into the right services.



The Sales Manager will work closely with the founder and will also oversee the firm’s Sales Development Representative (SDR).

This role is responsible for ensuring that leads move efficiently through the sales pipeline and convert into long-term clients.



Core Responsibilities



Client Closing



Conduct strategy and consultation calls with qualified prospects and convert them into clients.

Services typically sold include:

• tax strategy engagements

• tax planning services

• advisory subscriptions



Typical engagements range from $1,000 to $5,000+ per client.



Sales Pipeline Management



Manage the firm’s sales pipeline using GoHighLevel CRM.

Responsibilities include:

• monitoring inbound leads

• prioritizing high-value opportunities

• ensuring consistent follow-ups

• tracking sales pipeline metrics

The goal is to ensure no qualified lead is lost due to lack of follow-up.



Cold Lead Activation



One of the most important responsibilities of this role is reactivating dormant leads.

This includes:

• contacting older leads in our database

• re-engaging prospects who did not initially convert

• identifying opportunities for tax planning services

Many successful deals will come from reviving existing leads rather than generating new ones.



SDR Management



This role will supervise the firm’s Sales Development Representative (SDR) who handles:

• initial outreach

• appointment scheduling

• lead qualification

Responsibilities include:

• improving outreach scripts

• coaching the SDR

• improving appointment show rates

• ensuring follow-up consistency



Sales System Optimization



The Sales Manager will work with our Automation Specialist to improve the sales system.

This includes improving:

• CRM workflows

• lead routing

• appointment scheduling

• automated follow-up sequences

The goal is to build a scalable client acquisition system.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



Success in this role will be measured by:

• number of strategy calls completed

• strategy call show rate

• client conversion rate

• monthly revenue generated

• reactivation of cold leads



Required Experience

Strong candidates typically have experience with:

• high-ticket consultative sales

• closing service-based offers

• CRM pipeline management

• working with international clients

Experience selling consulting, financial services, or advisory services is highly preferred.



Communication Requirements

Because this role communicates with U.S. clients, candidates must have:

• clear, neutral American accent

• excellent spoken English

• professional communication skills

Candidates must be comfortable speaking with business owners and professionals in the United States.



Leadership Responsibilities

The Sales Manager will supervise one SDR and may help expand the sales team in the future.

This role requires someone comfortable with:

• coaching tea
mbers

• improving sales scripts

• managing lead follow-up processes



Trial Period



This role begins with a 60–90 day paid trial period.

During this time, we will evaluate:

• closing ability

• communication skills

• pipeline management

• ability to improve conversion rates

Candidates who perform well during the trial period will transition into a long-term leadership role within the firm.



Compensation



Base Compensation:

$1,500 – $3,000 per month depending on experience

Performance Bonuses:

Additional bonuses based on revenue generated.

Top performers can significantly increase earnings through performance incentives.



Who This Role Is Perfect For



This role is ideal for someone who:

• enjoys consultative sales

• enjoys speaking with business owners

• understands client psychology

• enjoys building systems and processes

• wants to grow into a leadership role

This role is not ideal for someone who only wants to read scripts or perform basic call center work.



Application Instructions

To apply, please submit:

1?? Your resume

2?? A short video introduction (1–2 minutes)

3?? A brief description of your experience closing consulting or advisory services



Please begin your application with the words:



“Harvest Sales Manager.”



This helps us confirm that you read the entire job posting.

title: Creative Strategist
description:
Fill out form: (ADD PORFOLIO IN FORM)





Creative Strategist Full-Time (UMAEZ Ltd)



We’re hiring a data-obsessed Creative Strategist who thrives in a high-velocity testing environment (20–30 concepts weekly) to unlock and scale profitable ad spend on cold traffic across our DTC portfolio.



Please do not apply if you don’t have real experience in ad creative strategy or direct-response copywriting.



Compensation: Competitive base salary + performance-based commissions (top performers can reach five figures during the trial period)



Location: Remote (Full-Time)

Schedule: Monday–Friday 



About US



Our company operates a portfolio of performance-led DTC brands across both US and SEA markets. We run a structured, data-driven creative system where testing velocity and iteration discipline directly determine growth.



Advantage: You’ll get a chance to have hands-on experience working on 7–8 figure brands within our portfolio and learn how creative strategy differs between US and SEA markets (audience psychology, formats, offers, and scaling patterns).



What You’ll Do



Research & Concept Development

-Conduct deep research into high-impact angles, unique mechanisms, and market awareness stages to develop breakthrough concepts

-Study competitive intelligence (ad spying), consumer psychology (mass desire & market awareness), and internal winners to identify untapped opportunities

-Develop 20–30 net-new concepts tested weekly (minimum) to maintain velocity and uncover winners for the brand (s)  assigned to you



Scriptwriting & Creative Execution

-Write compelling, high-converting direct-response scripts designed to hook cold audiences and convert them into buyers

-Produce clear, detailed briefs for editors and designers to ensure rapid alignment and execution

-Own the creative pipeline for assigned offers, driving the process from research ? ideation to scripting ? post-launch performance analysis



Collaboration & Iteration (Creative Engine)

-Work closely with our Lead Strategists on the higher strategic level and with editors and designers on the execution level to bring concepts to life at a high standard

-Collaborate with growth/media teams to iterate based on performance feedback and improve ROI

-Leverage proven copy structures, frameworks, and past winners to accelerate testing

-Feed insights back to the wider team to continuously improve our creative playbook



Performance Analysis & Scaling

-Analyze winners and losers weekly and document your learnings

-Rapidly iterate winning concepts into multiple variations to validate and scale

-Maintain a consistent pipeline of fresh creatives to reduce fatigue and sustain conversion



Required Qualifications

-Direct response expertise: Strong bias toward testing, iteration, and measurable results; understands how to profitably convert cold traffic

-Proven copywriting skills: Ability to write persuasive hooks and scripts (regular video ads, static ads or UGC ads) for Meta/TikTok/ in the DR advertising field

-Obsessive researcher: Strong at competitor intel, consumer psychology, awareness stages, and mechanism-driven angles

-Fast learner & hungry: Can absorb frameworks quickly and thrive under high output expectations

-A Player mentality (Resilience + ownership): Comfortable with rapid feedback cycles and treating assigned offers like a business unit



Success Looks Like (Core KPIs)

-High volume output: Consistently launching 20–30 net-new concepts/week (minimum)

-Creative hit rate: Achieving 10%+ hit rate (winners that validate and scale)



Why Join Us?

-Work on 7–8 figure brands across US or SEA markets

-Performance-based upside: Base + commissions tied directly to winners and scaling impact

-High ownership: Your concepts directly influence spend, revenue, and growth ceilings

-Rapid learning environment: Proven frameworks, strong feedback loops, and high iteration cadence

-Real career growth: Clear path to take on larger scope, priority brands, or lead responsibilities



Why You Shouldn’t Apply

-You want to coast or spend weeks polishing one campaign this role requires speed, iteration, and high quality output

-You struggle with high volume requirements, following operational workflows or processes, or fast feedback cycles

-You’re uncomfortable with the reality that most ads fail before one wins

-You need step-by-step hand-holding or don’t like ownership

-You’re balancing multiple jobs or clients this requires full-time dedicated ownership



Hiring Process

1. Fill out form: 

2. Once screened, you'll do skills assessment test

3. Interview

title: Anchor Video Editor
description:

Role Overview

PGMN is looking for an Anchor Video Editor responsible for editing anchor-led videos, commentary segments, and studio-based content. This role focuses on clean storytelling, strong pacing, and accurate execution—ensuring anchor episodes are polished, engaging, and aligned with PGMN’s editorial standards.



Key Responsibilities

Anchor & Commentary Editing

Edit anchor-led videos, explainers, and studio commentaries.

Ensure clear narrative flow, proper pacing, and emotional continuity.

Meet daily and weekly deadlines in a fast-paced newsroom environment.



Qualifications

Experience editing anchor-led, news, or commentary-style videos.

Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro (After Effects is a plus).

Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and attention to detail.

Good audio editing and basic color correction skills.

Able to work full-time in-office and handle fast turnarounds.

title: Amazon PPC Manager
description:
Urgent Hiring: Amazon PPC Manager

Reports To: CEO / Amazon Optimization Manager

Work Hours: Philippines Daytime Work Hours



Company Vision

We want to work with you to grow our company while helping you to become a superstar in your field. We value problem solvers, go-getters, and people with opinions who want to make an impact. You will be on the leading edge of Amazon and online strategies, continually improving your knowledge in the pursuit of helping us grow our business.



At the same time, you will be working with a company that values community & family—both internally and customer-facing. Our mission is to delight kids & parents with creative craft kits and related products. We are 100% focused on that mission and want you to be there on the ride with us!



That’s where you come in as our next Amazon PPC Manager.



Role Purpose

The Amazon PPC Manager owns the performance of all paid advertising on Amazon across our catalog. This person leads the strategy, execution, and optimization of all Sponsored Product, Sponsored Brand, and Sponsored Display campaigns to drive discoverability, revenue growth, and profitable scaling.



You will leverage Scale Insights daily—using advanced features like automation flows, keyword scoring, search term mining, and campaign-level rule logic—to drive high-impact decisions. Your ability to move beyond manual optimization and harness automation for scale is critical to success in this role.



What Success Looks Like

You consistently drive performance improvements using both manual and automated techniques, with Scale Insights as your core control panel. You own automation flows that intelligently adjust bids, pause underperforming targets, surface search term goldmines, and scale winners. You don’t just use Scale Insights—you master it.



You maintain a proactive and adaptive PPC strategy aligned with the catalog lifecycle, launch timing, and seasonality. Through frequent reporting, experimentation, and coordination with SEO, creative, and ops, you ensure campaigns support profitable, long-term growth.



Primary Objectives

Maximize profitable growth through advanced automation using Scale Insights

Own and optimize campaign architecture to drive ROI across all product stages

Partner cross-functionally for ad-aligned launches, creatives, and keyword strategy

Test, measure, and iterate to continuously improve CTR, CVR, and ROAS



Regular Work Activities

Monitor and refine SP/SB/SD campaigns daily through Scale Insights dashboards

Execute bid adjustments, search term mining, negative pruning

Build and optimize automation rules and flows in Scale Insights

Audit underperforming ad groups and apply automated corrective logic

Set up rule-based triggers for seasonal budget shifts and event-based bidding

Conduct A/B testing for headlines, images, placements

Weekly reporting with commentary using Scale Insights and custom dashboards

Work with SEO to align ad keyword targeting with organic ranking efforts

Collaborate with creative to ensure ad assets match campaign goals

Track budget utilization and reallocate funds based on real-time data

Maintain documentation and SOPs for all Scale Insights workflows

Guide PPC Assistants on implementing and QA’ing automation rules

Troubleshoot disapproved or underperforming ads

Flag inventory and pricing concerns affecting campaign viability

Maintain performance calendars for launches, promos, seasonality



Key Skills

Advanced knowledge of Scale Insights (automation, keyword scoring, flows)

Deep understanding of Amazon Ads (SP, SB, SD)

Strategic and analytical mindset with strong Excel/Google Sheets skills

Mastery in keyword match types, campaign structure, and budget management

Proven record of improving CTR, CVR, and ROAS

Excellent reporting and data storytelling skills

Detail-oriented with strong project tracking ability

Comfortable owning results, fixing issues, and moving fast

Strong communication across SEO, creative, and leadership teams

Passionate about learning and applying new ad techniques



People Contacts and Interactions

SEO Manager: Weekly coordination for keyword and ranking overlap

Creative Team: Weekly/as needed for ad assets, testing needs

Operations: Weekly or ad-hoc for stock, pricing, launch strategy

CEO / Leadership: Weekly/monthly reporting, performance reviews



Role Requirements

3+ years managing Amazon PPC campaigns

Experience using Scale Insights (must demonstrate real automation flow use cases, not just dashboards)

Proven success managing TACoS, ACOS, ROAS in high-SKU environments

Experience launching campaigns for new products and scaling mature ones

High proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

Familiarity with keyword research, ranking tools, and performance reporting

Experience with automation strategy, not just manual optimization

Self-starter with high personal accountability and ownership

Bonus: Experience in creative ad testing and headline writing



How to Apply: In the subject, share your favorite toy as a kid.

title: Video Editor for Instagram
description:
Part-Time Video Editor for Instagram Reels



I’m looking for a part-time video editor to help edit Instagram Reels for my online coaching business.



Most videos are simple talking-head style content with captions, occasional B-roll, and simple statics. Nothing overly complex.



This will start as a trial role, as I haven’t worked with a dedicated editor before.



Work Volume



Starting volume:

7–10 videos per week



After the trial period:

20+ videos per week



Videos are typically sent in batches of 2–7 at a time.



Expected turnaround time per batch:

24–28 hours



Pay



Pay is per video, depending on complexity.



Typical range:

$3–$10 per video



Most edits are simple and will fall toward the lower end of that range.



Example Video Style



Here are examples of the type of videos I create:















How We Work



For each video I provide:



Raw footage



Script



Notes



Inspiration videos



The goal is that the editor can take the assets and deliver a video that is 90–95% ready without constant back-and-forth.



Communication will happen through Slack, with an occasional Zoom call if needed (usually once per week at most to start).



I’m based in California (PST time zone).



File Sharing (Important)



Raw footage will be sent through an iPhone shared folder.



Because of this workflow, having an iPhone is required for this role.



If you do not have an iPhone, please do not apply, as the workflow will not work.



Finished videos will be uploaded back to the same shared folder.



Trial Process



If you apply and are selected to move forward, there will be a short trial edit.



For the trial you will receive:



Raw footage



Script



Notes



Inspiration videos



Your task will be to edit and submit 2 completed videos based on those materials.



This helps me see your editing style and ability to follow direction before moving forward with ongoing work.



Questions to Answer



If you're interested, please reply and answer the following:



What is your average turnaround time per video?



If I send 10–15 videos per week, can you handle that volume?



How many revisions are included?



Are you comfortable communicating via Slack?



Do you currently own an iPhone and can access an iPhone shared folder?



Do you charge per video or hourly?



Next Step



If it looks like a good fit, we’ll schedule a quick Zoom call within the next 1–3 days.



I’m looking to test this immediately, so faster responses will get priority.



Thanks,

Nico

title: Record Label Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC is an independent record label dedicated to producing high-quality urban music focused on health, personal relationships, financial literacy, peak performance, bodybuilding, meditation, and spirituality. Founded by Wilmarck, our music merges influences from Kanye West and Drake with motivational themes inspired by Tony Robbins. With over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers, we aim to inspire and uplift through our music.



Position: Music Manager



We are looking for a music manager responsible for:

- Pitching proposals to songwriting job boards

- Keeping our books and managing contracts

- Driving success by boosting profits and hitting sales targets

- Leading and inspiring the team to deliver stellar performance

- Recruiting, hiring, and guiding contractors

- Managing operations, scheduling, and compliance

- Creating memorable customer experiences

- Onboarding and training new hires

- Communicating seamlessly with stakeholders

- Lifting up to 25 pounds when needed



Disclaimer: Prospects will respond outside of scheduled hours. There will be an established 8-hour window where you’ll be expected to respond within an hour. Ex. Your schedule hours will be 6:30 PM -3:00 AM EST (From 3-11 PM EST if a prospect responds to a proposal, you’ll be expected to respond. Each response should take 5-15 mins. You can expect 3-5 responses per week. The additional hours may be deducted from your regular schedule if it exceeds 50 hours.



Contract Details

- Hourly Rate: $2.81/hr USD + 10%-15% of revenue

- Monthly Compensation: $505-$900 + commission

- Initial Hours: 10 hours/week, increasing to 45 hours/week over 45 days

- Training: Paid training provided

- Raises: Based on work performance



Hiring Process

This is an audition-based hiring process. We will select 3-5 candidates for a paid audition. After reviewing your work, we'll choose one full-time hire.

- Interview: To assess mutual fit

- Notification: Candidates will be contacted within 48 hours regarding audition status

Responsibilities

Immediate Focus:

- Pitching to Songwriting Job Boards

- Album Launch Tasks

- Bookkeeping

- Onboarding & Interviewing Staff

- Explaining service and product prices

- Answering customer inquiries

- Obtaining customer information for shipping/services

- Managing our production team

- Communicating with tea
mbers/leaders

- Hitting monthly revenue goals



Future Responsibilities (If Qualified):

- Leading meetings

- Managing teams

- Reporting analytics

- Servicing customers



Skills and Qualifications

Essential:

- Persistence and determination

- Proposal writing skills

- Time management

- Product knowledge

- Customer service proficiency

- Strong English speaking/writing skills

- Reliable internet connection



Ideal Candidate Qualities

- Flexible and eager to learn

- High integrity and commitment

- Relentless execution

- Ability to work independently

- Competitive spirit

- Receptive to constructive criticism

- Effective communication skills



Benefits

 

Music Manager Incentive Program

New hires must be with Pex Life Records for 6 months to qualify

title: OPERATIONS & CLIENT EXPERIENCE ASSISTANT
description:
ABOUT SAGEFORM

Sageform is a conscious leadership studio for creatives, leaders, and founders based in Sydney, Australia. Sageform is not a standard coaching service. The work goes beyond surface-level performance metrics to support inner transformation for outer evolution. It is designed to help individuals and teams find their form and expand their impact with lasting clarity, groundedness, and flow.



Clients have come from companies like Google, Spotify, Airbnb, Anthropic, Droga5, Pinterest, Aesop, and more. The practice was founded by Amelia Kruse in 2017. She holds a Master’s degree in Ecology and is a Professional Certified Coach (PCC) with the International Coach Federation. 



Sageform is a solopreneur practice. There is no big team, no corporate hierarchy, and no bureaucracy. What there is: meaningful work, a calm and values-led environment, and a founder who leads the way she coaches: with presence, intention, and care for the people around her. The person who joins us won't just be filling a role, they'll be a trusted extension of everything Sageform stands for.



THE ROLE

I’m looking for a sharp, reliable Operations and Client Experience Assistant to join part-time and grow into a long-term pillar of the practice. You'll begin with backend operations, keeping the business running smoothly behind the scenes. As you develop a deep understanding of our voice, values, and the way we show up with clients and the community, there is a clear pathway into a front-of-office role handling client and community communications directly.



This is not a role for someone who wants to clock in and clock out. It's for someone who is curious, takes initiative, communicates proactively, and genuinely wants to understand the business they're supporting.



WHAT YOU’LL BE WORKING ON

PHASE ONE: BACKEND OPERATIONS

From day one, you'll own the operational layer of the business across five areas:

1. Client & CRM Management

- Data entry and ongoing updates in Dubsado, keeping client records accurate and complete

- Tracking payment status and following up on any payment issues as they arise

- Light QuickBooks tasks: assigning payments to invoices and keeping records tidy

- Content & Digital Operations

- Formatting and publishing articles on Substack and WordPress, maintaining consistent and on-brand formatting, imagery, and structure

- SEO optimisation of articles and site, meta descriptions, alt text, keyword language, and internal linking

- Formatting and scheduling social media posts (content provided)

- Website updates: adding new client logos, refreshing copy, and making content edits as directed



2. Analytics & Reporting

- Setting up clean, meaningful reporting in Google Analytics

- Monitoring traffic and engagement patterns on an ongoing basis

- Sharing insights and observations so we can make informed decisions Finance Admin



3. Research & Personal Executive Support

- Research tasks such as sourcing vendors, collaborators, events, speaking engagements, retreats, office equipment, travel options, or anything else that needs thorough research

- Travel organisation such as sourcing flights, accommodation, and itinerary coordination

- Calendar management and scheduling support

- General personal admin and life organisation as needed — this is a varied role and we value someone comfortable supporting across both professional and personal spheres



PHASE TWO: FRONT OF OFFICE (GOAL STATE)

Once you have a strong feel for how Sageform communicates with clients and the broader community you’ll take on:

- Managing a dedicated ‘front desk’ inbox, the primary point of contact for all scheduling, rescheduling, and client admin queries

- Responding to clients and potential clients in a warm, on-brand tone

- Managing all client scheduling, rescheduling, and reminders end-to-end

- Creating client onboarding packages and invoices

- Social media management and strategy

- Supporting marketing and maintenance of Sageform’s digital courses 

- Supporting the creation of corporate client proposals



The goal is for you to become the voice of Sageform's operations — trusted, consistent, and deeply aligned with our values.



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

You bring:

- Strong written English: warm, natural, and clear.

- Experience in a service-based or coaching business

- Experience with Dubsado or a similar CRM

- Comfort in WordPress: formatting and uploading, not development

- Familiarity with Instagram, Substack, LinkedIn and other social media

- Google Workspace and Calendly fluency: Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Calendar

- Understanding of SEO principles and Google Analytics



You are:

- Highly organised and genuinely proactive

- Comfortable working independently without micromanagement

- Detail-oriented: tone, formatting, accuracy all matter to you

- Skilled at research and providing succinct findings

- Analytically curious: you notice patterns and share what you see

- Aligned with values-led work: you care about the 'why'

- Discreet and trustworthy with sensitive client information

- Growth-minded: Eager to learn marketing and social media skill



WHAT SAGEFORM OFFERS

- Flexible, remote work

- A calm, purposeful environment

- Regular access to Amelia and clear onboarding and support with tasks

- A genuine growth pathway into a trusted front-of-office role

- Long-term engagement: I believe in invest in people who invest in the work



HOW TO APPLY

Please send your application through OnlineJobs that tells me:

- Your background, how you would describe yourself, and what kind of work energises you

- Your experience with the tasks and tools mentioned above

- Why this particular role appeals to you

- Your availability, timezone, and current weekly capacity

title: Credit Repair Specialist (Experienced )
description:
Stay Vigilant LLC is a U.S.-based credit repair and financial education company seeking a Credit Repair Dispute Specialist to join our remote team. This role is responsible for reviewing credit reports, managing disputes, communicating with clients, and maintaining strict compliance with U.S. credit laws.



This position is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and understands the importance of accuracy and compliance when handling sensitive consumer credit data.



Key Responsibilities



Review and analyze credit reports from Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion

Identify negative items such as inaccuracies, collections, charge-offs, late payments, and inquiries

Draft, submit, and track disputes using Credit Repair Cloud

Follow up on disputes and ensure timelines are met

Communicate with clients through Go High Level CRM

Explain credit repair concepts in simple, easy-to-understand language

Provide updates to clients regarding dispute progress

Document all disputes and client interactions accurately

Maintain strict compliance with FCRA, FDCPA, and CROA

Protect and handle sensitive client information responsibly

Assist with credit and funding research (as assigned)

Support moderation and management of the company
 community (as needed)



Required Qualifications



Knowledge of credit reports and the credit repair process

Familiarity with Credit Repair Cloud

Familiarity with Go High Level CRM

Strong understanding of FCRA, FDCPA, and CROA

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Strong attention to detail and organization

Ability to follow SOPs and compliance guidelines

Ability to maintain confidentiality and data security



Preferred Skills



Experience working with U.S.-based credit repair clients

Understanding of FICO and VantageScore scoring models

CRM automation experience

Customer service or client support background

Remote work experience



How to Apply



Please submit:

Your resume

A Voice Video explaining:

Your knowledge of credit repair

Your experience with Credit Repair Cloud and Go High Level

How you would explain the credit repair process to a client

Any relevant credit-related work experience





Applications without basic credit repair knowledge will not be considered.

title: Experienced Lead Specialist
description:

 campaigns.

, including issuing payment instructions.

3. Administrative and Finance Support

- Collections: Follow up and chase outstanding payments from customers when necessary.

Commissions will be recurring due to our subscription model, with very high earning potential. Commissions will be 4% of every sale, that will be recurring every month. If you want a long term future with our company, do apply.

title: Telemarketer / Sales Representative | Warm Leads Provided
description:
Want to work from home?

Want to be in full control of how much you can earn?

No graveyard hours since we’re in Australia!



Start soon on April 3!



Our business is focused on sales, marketing, and lead generation. We’re looking for a super talented, charismatic and persuasive individual to help us contact and qualify warm leads by phone. Your friends might describe you as being ambitious, positive, and determined.



What’s In It For You

1. Paid training for the first month at PHP20,000.

2. After training, monthly on target earnings including commissions range between PHP25,000 – 75,000+++.

3. High earning potential with uncapped commissions.

4. Opportunity to add a sixth day (on Monday) when you reach higher commission tiers to increase monthly on target earnings to PHP75,000.



Your Key Tasks And Responsibilities

1. Call and qualify leads that we provide with a series of 10-15 questions.

2. Ensure adequate notes are recorded after each call.

3. Send daily and monthly reports.



Must Haves

1. Minimum 1 year prior experience in appointment setting, customer service, or telemarketing. Preferably from the real estate or banking industry.

2. Speak, read, and write English at a proficient level.

3. Excellent communication skills, business etiquette, and responsiveness.

4. Proven ability to be persuasive and overcome objections.

5. Burning desire to succeed and earn bonuses.

6. Confident in using Microsoft Word, Microsoft Excel, and Google Sheets. Preferably some experience in using CRMs, especially Salesforce.

7. Commit to a 40 hour work week between Tuesday to Saturday from 8am to 5pm including one hour for breaks.

8. Minimum Intel Core i5 system or equivalent.

9. Reliable wired internet connection and stable electricity.

title: Full-time Entry Virtual Associate (VA) Positions. Philippines time zone. 260311
description:
This is an entry-level role, where the majority of knowledge and skills will be acquired through on-the-job training, paving the way for advancement to senior positions.



Are you seeking a full-time, long-term career that offers exceptional growth potential through advancement opportunities, along with a stable income and bonus incentives? Join our team if you have a keen eye for detail, an unwavering drive for productivity, and a strong sense of responsibility. If you possess self-motivation, assertiveness, and a strong work ethic, coupled with a positive outlook and the ability to excel in a fast-paced work environment, we invite you to reach out to us.



You will receive training and support for your work. Candidates without experience but willing to learn and grow are welcome.

This is for candidates who are keen to develop a professional career that allows you to work remotely and independently. There are career paths with promising future opportunities that have traditionally been accessible only through conventional means. However, our embrace of technology, good jobs are no longer restricted to traditional ways.



About Us

The business has collaborated with a highly acclaimed loan brokerage and independent financial advisory firm, along with several other partners, all of which are fully licensed by government authorities. We offer a diversified suite of financial services and solutions with a personalized approach.



With these partners, we have one of the largest, most-respected, and fastest-growing networks of advisers in the country. We provide sound and comprehensive financial advice at both individual and corporate levels.



Requirement

• Strong verbal and written English skills with a neutral accent.

• Knowledge of Chinese/Mandarin, whether verbal or written, is a significant advantage.

• Exceptional talent for natural conversation.

• Proficient in Microsoft Office applications.

• Owns a competent Windows computer/laptop and android mobile phone for work

• A dependable and consistent internet connection

• Consistent and reliable power supply without frequent outages.

• A distraction-free and quiet workspace.

• Utilizing a headset equipped with Noise Cancellation technology.

• Takes initiative and works independently to address challenges, consistently seeking solutions.



Other Matters

We will be communicating via various communication tools. There will be a probation period for one to three months, depending on your qualifications and experience, which is negotiable. Upon the completion of your probation period, you will become eligible for a 13th-month bonus, paid time off, and a range of employee benefits, including PhilHealth and the Social Security System. The annual performance bonus is determined by your key performance indicators (KPIs). You will follow the time zone of the Philippines. Among colleagues, your working hours may be arranged in rotation, including weekdays and weekends. A total work week of 40 hours. Your further potential salary growth will be based on your performance, which may be increased during the quarterly review.



Loan Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Engage with incoming leads primarily through WhatsApp on our business phone.

• Create comprehensive reports that incorporate inputs and details provided by clients.

• Create concise summaries and propose options for clients, utilizing templates for efficiency.

• Collaborate with the designated bankers to facilitate the processing of loan applications

• Schedule meetings with clients and bankers.

• Reach out to current clients as they approach the end of their loan lock-in period.

• Oversee client relationships and enhance processes through multiple CRM platforms.



Insurance and Investment Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Prepare the required documentation for the client's application, available in various systems.

• Reach out to clients through WhatsApp using our business phone, primarily to provide reminders and follow-ups.

• Utilize WhatsApp (business phone) as the main channel to engage clients and schedule appointments effectively.

• Craft client proposals utilizing the provided templates.

• Helping clients with insurance claims

• Contact insurers to obtain quotes and provide recommendations to clients.

• Oversee client relationships and streamline processes through a range of CRM systems.



Candidates who have shown capability and knowledge may be groomed towards senior roles or management roles.



Application

To apply for the job:

Please log in and click the link below to apply, and please follow the instructions.



There will be an assessment and a Microsoft Teams interview video call required, if you are shortlisted.
