title: Graphic Designer
description:
Graphic Designer

Philippines





As we continue to grow our beloved brands, we are looking for a talented Graphic Designer to join our team. This role is tasked with advancing the marketing & sales goals of our brands through clever and captivating branding, sales, and promotional content. As a Graphic Designer, you will use visual storytelling to enhance our content on our social media channels,
s, websites, and retail partner sites. Our ideal candidate is consumer focused and able to follow brand guidelines to create content unique to each brand's aesthetic. You should be comfortable designing and laying out marketing content, using motion graphics to bring content to life, and managing multiple projects from beginning to end. 



Responsibilities:



Utilize graphic design skills to support growth of our brands through curating and preparing visual content for use in digital advertising, Instagram,
, Tik Tok, Pinterest, our own websites, retailer websites, YouTube, and newsletters

Ability to apply motion graphics like animation and GIFs to digital content to help highlight brand messaging and enhance storytelling

Work closely with Senior Designer to deliver branded content to brand and marketing teams

Partner with Digital, Social, Communications, and Branding teams to incorporate insights into content creation for advertising, social, and digital executions

Combine compelling first-in-class creative with clear marketing messages and calls to action, lay out copy and imagery effectively

Develop expert knowledge of brand and company goals, understand and follow brand guidelines, acting as a brand ambassador to ensure that all projects fit the brand style and voice

Keep abreast of industry best practices and competitive trends, regularly informing team of noteworthy news items and opportunities and incorporating to our brands when applicable

Effectively manage multiple projects, manage timelines, and communicate progress to key stakeholders

Develop additional print and marketing materials as assigned (i.e. creative mood boards, trade show signage, posters, brochures, merchandise, presentation decks)

Edit video and stills to be used across all social channels, our own websites, and retailer partner websites

Partner with the brand team in other marketing initiatives, such as attending trade shows, photo shoots, assist with copywriting and other content creation and design needs that support our annual brand plans.



Qualifications:

Undergraduate degree in related field or an equivalent combination of skills, training, and minimum of 3+ years of hands-on experience

Proven in-depth understanding of design fundamentals such as layout, color theory and typography usage

Working knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere, After Effects, InDesign, XD)

Working knowledge of Figma & Canva

Expertise in designing for web, tablet, mobile, and
 projects

Working knowledge of photography and video production and editing a plus, but not required

A solid understanding of digital video and social media platforms including YouTube, Instagram,
, Tik Tok, and Pinterest

Working knowledge of Microsoft Office Suite (Outlook, PowerPoint, Word, Excel)

Understanding of how to make shareable branded content for a variety of media and platforms

Excellent interpersonal communication skills both verbal and written

Strong background in conceptual and visual thinking with a branded mindset

Ability to handle multiple priorities in a deadline driven environment

React positively to feedback and notes with a strong desire for learning and improvement

Be a creative and resourceful problem solver that is solution oriented

Creative eye with excellent taste, passion for interior design and décor a plus

Self-motivated with strong project management skills

A great attitude – enjoys building and contributing to happy, high functioning teams



Interested applicants, please send your full cv on the link below:

title: Video & Motion Graphics Editor
description:
About Us:

Million Dollar Baby Co. is the parent company behind some of the most beloved nursery and kids' furniture brands including babyletto, daVinci, Namesake, and Nursery Works. We’re known for blending modern design with safety, sustainability, and style—creating beautiful spaces where families grow.



We’re seeking a talented Video & Motion Graphics Editor to help bring our brand stories to life across



What you’ll be doing:



Edit high-quality, on-brand videos for brand campaigns, product launches, digital ads, paid media, and social channels (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Meta)

Design and animate motion graphics for our website, Instagram Reels & TikTok, campaigns, and promotional videos

Collaborate closely with the creative, social, partnerships and brand teams to ideate and execute engaging visual narratives

Organize and manage footage, audio, and design assets for seamless production workflows

Maintain brand consistency across all video and motion projects, while adapting style & tone for each channel or brand

Stay up to date on content trends, editing styles, and platform best practices (especially short-form content)

Occasionally assist in art direction and shoot planning for video-based campaigns

Experience using video asset management software like Dropbox and 

Perform basic audio editing tasks such as noise reduction, level balancing, and syncing dialogue with visuals to ensure high-quality final products

Develop clear, engaging storyboards that visually communicate narrative flow, actions, and scene composition, ensuring alignment with creative direction and project goals.

What You Bring to Bring to Table:



5+ years of experience in video editing and motion graphics, ideally in a consumer or lifestyle brand setting

Strong proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator)

Experience editing for social-first formats (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Meta ads)

Ability to work within brand guidelines while pushing creative boundaries

Excellent storytelling instincts and pacing for both short- and long-form video

Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines

Experience with 3D, , and sound design

Bonus Points If You



Have a great eye for interior design, kids’ lifestyle aesthetics, or fashion-forward visual storytelling

Have experience with product or brand storytelling across DTC and retail

Have worked with parenting, baby, or Gen Z and millennial-focused brands

Why You'll Love Working With Us



Join a creative, high-impact team shaping the future of modern parenting design

Collaborate on trend-forward campaigns seen across global retailers

Competitive salary, benefits, and growth opportunities in a design-led environment



Interested applicants, please your full cv on the url below:

title: Paid Social Designer
description:
About the Company



We’re a leading nursery furniture company behind some of the most trusted and recognizable brands in the industry, creating thoughtfully designed products for modern families. Our portfolio spans style-forward, safety-first furniture that meets rigorous quality standards.



You’ll be joining a collaborative, fast-moving team where great design meets real impact—and where the work you create reaches millions of families at some of life’s most meaningful 
nts.



About the Role



We’re looking for a Paid Social Designer who can turn ideas, insights, and briefs into scroll-stopping ad creatives. You’ll work closely with marketers and strategists to design high-performing visuals for paid social and digital campaigns while maintaining strong brand consistency.



This role sits at the intersection of creative + performance—you’ll design not just what looks good, but what converts.



What You’ll Do

Design static, carousel, and motion ad creatives for platforms such as Paid Social (Meta, Pinterest, TikTok, AppLovin, Youtube Ads),
/SMS

Translate creative briefs, hooks, and messaging into visually compelling content

Create multiple variations of concepts for structured A/B testing

Adapt creative to platform best practices safe zones, pacing, aspect ratios, sound/music

Partner with the growth marketing team to iterate on creatives based on performance (CTR, thumb-stop rate, conversions, etc.)

Collaborate cross functionally to share insights on customers through ad performance 

Maintain brand guidelines while exploring new visual angles and formats

 campaigns

Nice to Have

Experience collaborating with media buyers, growth, or performance teams

title: Google Ads & SEO Specialist (Trades & Home Services – Australia Market)
description:
Job Overview

We are a growing marketing agency based in Australia that specialises exclusively in working with trade and home service companies (builders, landscapers, concreters, roofers, flooring companies, etc.). We currently manage marketing for 20+ clients across Australia and are looking for a reliable Google specialist to take ownership of everything related to Google.



This role is for someone with proven experience managing Google Ads, PPC campaigns, and SEO for local service businesses, ideally in the trades or home improvement industry.



You will be responsible for building, optimising, and managing Google campaigns across multiple client accounts, ensuring consistent lead generation and strong ROI.



This is a long-term opportunity with competitive pay for the right person.



Responsibilities

- Plan, build, and manage Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, Performance Max where relevant)

- Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis for local service industries

- Optimise campaigns to reduce cost-per-lead and increase qualified enquiries

- Implement conversion tracking, call tracking, and performance monitoring

- Manage and improve local SEO rankings for service-based businesses

- Perform on-page SEO optimisation and coordinate off-page SEO strategies

- Continuously test ad creatives, headlines, landing page angles, and bidding strategies

- Monitor performance and provide clear reporting on campaign results

- Identify opportunities to scale successful campaigns



Requirements

- Proven experience running Google Ads for local service businesses

- Strong knowledge of PPC, keyword strategy, and conversion optimisation

- Experience with local SEO and ranking service-based businesses

- Ability to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously

- Strong understanding of lead generation campaigns

- Experience with Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, and conversion tracking

- Strong communication and reliability



What We’re Looking For



Someone reliable and long-term focused



A results-driven specialist, not someone who just “runs ads”



Someone who can take ownership of Google marketing for our clients



To Apply



Please include:



Examples of Google Ads campaigns you have managed



Results or case studies (CPL, leads generated, ROI etc.)



Your experience working with local service businesses



We are looking to bring someone on board who can grow with our agency long-term and manage the Google side of our clients’ marketing.

title: Podcast & Media Producer (Full-Time)
description:
Podcast & Media Producer (Full-Time)



We’re hiring a full-time Podcast Producer to help manage the day-to-day running of multiple podcast shows across our business.



This is a hands-on role for someone who is highly organised, detail-oriented, proactive, and confident managing content workflows from planning through to publishing. You’ll play a key role in keeping episodes, guests, assets, communication, and release schedules moving smoothly across several shows.



You’ll be supporting the production and publishing of:

- Liam Donnelly Live Show

- Outlier Podcast

- TriVelo Podcast



If you are someone who thrives in a fast-moving environment, cares deeply about quality, and enjoys keeping content operations running at a high standard, we’d love to hear from you.

About the role

You’ll work closely with the founder and team to support the execution of our podcast content across multiple brands.

This role includes coordinating guests, managing podcast-related communication, helping oversee episode flow, supporting editors, checking content quality, managing uploads, assisting with clipping and posting, and making sure all moving parts are organised and on track.

The right person for this role will be reliable, fast, clear in their communication, and able to take ownership of recurring workflows without needing constant direction.



Key responsibilities



Podcast production and coordination:

Manage the day-to-day workflow across multiple podcast shows

Coordinate production timelines, schedules, and deliverables

Organise guests and assist with guest communication and follow-up

Manage podcast-related inbox communication and logistics

Help ensure each episode moves smoothly through the production pipeline



Content operations and publishing:

Oversee episodes from recording through to final upload and publication

Manage publishing across relevant platforms

Prepare and review titles, descriptions, captions, and supporting assets

Support clipping and posting workflows for podcast content

Maintain publishing consistency and help keep deadlines on track



Quality assurance:

Review episodes, clips, and assets before they go live

Check for errors, missed details, inconsistencies, and low-quality output

Ensure content is polished, accurate, and aligned with brand standards

Provide a strong second layer of quality control across the content process



Team support and workflow management:

Work closely with editors and tea
mbers to keep projects moving

Keep tasks, communication, and content workflows organised

Identify issues early and help solve them proactively

Use AI tools and systems to improve speed and efficiency while maintaining quality



What we’re looking for:

Excellent organisational skills

Strong attention to detail

High level of written and spoken English

Strong communication via
 and WhatsApp

Confident managing multiple moving parts at once

Reliable, proactive, and able to take ownership

Comfortable working in a fast-paced content environment

Able to follow instructions closely while also thinking independently

Comfortable learning new tools and systems quickly

Strong AI literacy and willingness to use AI tools daily to improve output



Non negotiables:

This is a full-time role

You must be available to work full-time hours

This role requires full professional commitment, and we are only considering candidates that will not work freelance and will work full time

You must be able to work with at least 80% overlap with Australian Eastern Standard Time

For candidates in Asia, this will usually require early morning starts

You must provide your own computer, laptop, and equipment

You must be ready to start immediately



Ideal candidate

You’ll likely be a great fit if you:

Care about quality and take pride in polished execution

Enjoy managing workflows, deadlines, and moving parts

Are comfortable coordinating people, content, and communication

Naturally spot issues before they become bigger problems

Are calm, capable, and solutions-focused

Want to grow in a long-term full-time role within a content-driven business



How to apply:



Please submit your application in the exact format below.

Applications that do not follow these instructions exactly will not be considered.



1.Relevant experience

In 150 words or less, explain your experience relevant to this role across:

admin support

content management / publishing

customer support

quality control / proofreading



2.AI tools

List the AI tools you currently use in your work and give 1 short sentence on how you use each one.



3.Availability

Please confirm all of the following:

your current location and timezone

your earliest possible start date

that you are available for full-time work only

that you will not work freelance, that you will work full time

that you can work with at least 80% overlap with Australian Eastern Standard Time

that you have your own computer/laptop and reliable internet



4.Quality control task

Find 2 different podcast clips or episodes on YouTube and submit both links:

Example A: a podcast clip/episode where the audio clearly matches the speaker, context, and edit properly

Example B: a podcast clip/episode where the audio appears mostly fine at first, but on closer review contains a small mismatch, inconsistency, dubbing issue, sync issue, cut issue, or something that suggests the wrong audio may have been used or the edit is imperfect

For each example, include:

- the link

- the timestamp(s)

- a short explanation of what you noticed

- why it would matter in a final quality-control check before publishing



5. Please upload proof of your work/home internet speed (wherever you work from), as well as your computer size or setup.



Important:

Do not submit an example with obviously terrible editing

We are testing whether you can notice subtle issues, not obvious ones

Be specific and concise

/hr (project basis)

About the Role

Pulso World is looking for a Vlog Video Editor who can turn raw, real-world footage into fast-paced, culturally relevant, visually engaging vlogs. From lifestyle segments to street culture features, travel diaries, behind-the-scenes shoots, and creator collaborations—you will shape the visual identity of Pulso’s vlog content across social media.

s, sound effects, and stylistic flair.

Qualifications

Ability to edit fast while maintaining high quality.

Strong storytelling instincts and attention to detail.

Familiarity with current trends, 
 culture, and youth content.

Familiarity with Filipino pop culture, street culture, and lifestyle niches.

Knowledge of analytics-driven editing (retention, hook strategy).

title: Digital Ecommerce Coordinator
description:
Employment Type: Full-time

Start: Immediate

Working Hours: Monday–Friday, 9am–5pm AEST

Salary: $240 per week



Role Overview



We are seeking a commercially minded Digital Ecommerce Coordinator to manage the day-to-day operations, optimisation, and growth of a premium footwear ecommerce platform.



This role is responsible for delivering a high-quality online brand experience that reflects heritage craftsmanship and global positioning. Working closely with Marketing, Wholesale, and Operations teams, you will drive online sales performance while ensuring strong brand execution across all digital channels.



Key Responsibilities:



Ecommerce Operations & Trading

Manage and update the ecommerce site (product uploads, pricing, imagery, merchandising).

Execute seasonal product launches aligned with global brand direction.

Ensure product storytelling reflects premium brand positioning.

Monitor inventory levels in collaboration with Operations to optimise stock availability.

Coordinate online promotions, markdown strategies, and trading calendars.

Maintain site hygiene including navigation, filters, collections, and landing pages.



Performance & Reporting

Monitor key KPIs including revenue, traffic, conversion rate, AOV, sell-through, and stock turn.

Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports with commercial insights.

Analyse customer behaviour and identify UX and conversion improvement opportunities.

Support forecasting and promotional planning with data-backed insights.



Digital Marketing & Growth Support

Support EDM campaign execution including segmentation, testing, and performance analysis.

Coordinate paid media assets (Meta, Google) in line with brand campaigns.

Assist with SEO optimisation including metadata, product descriptions, and on-site content.

Manage homepage banners and campaign landing pages aligned with seasonal storytelling.



Customer Experience & Brand Execution

Ensure the online customer journey reflects premium positioning.

Monitor customer feedback and collaborate with Customer Service to resolve friction points.

Support loyalty and retention initiatives to drive repeat purchase.

Ensure all digital content reflects brand tone, product craftsmanship, and quality standards.



Skills & Experience

2–4 years’ experience in ecommerce or digital marketing (fashion or footwear preferred).

Experience managing ecommerce platforms (Shopify preferred).

Strong understanding of ecommerce analytics (Google Analytics, platform reporting).

Experience with
 marketing platforms (Klaviyo, Mailchimp, or similar).

Commercially minded with strong analytical capability.

High attention to detail and strong organisational skills.

Ability to manage multiple seasonal deadlines in a fast-paced retail environment.



Desirable

Experience within premium or heritage fashion brands.

Understanding of wholesale and DTC channel strategy.

Knowledge of footwear sizing, merchandising, and stock management.

Basic HTML/CSS knowledge.



Key Attributes

Brand-aware and commercially driven

Strong execution capability with attention to detail

Data-driven decision maker

Collaborative and proactive

Passion for premium footwear and brand storytelling



To Apply:

- Please share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. Describe your experience managing an ecommerce site (Shopify preferred). What were your responsibilities (product uploads, merchandising, launches, promotions, reporting)? Share one example where you improved sales or conversion rate.



2. What ecommerce KPIs do you regularly monitor (e.g., revenue, conversion rate, AOV, sell-through, stock turn)? Explain how you’ve used data to inform trading, promotional, or merchandising decisions. Provide a brief example.



3. Describe your experience supporting digital marketing initiatives (EDMs, paid media assets, SEO, homepage banners, landing pages). How do you ensure campaigns align with brand positioning while driving performance?

title: Social Media & Paid Ads Specialist
description:
Location: Remote 

Company: Diversified Group with operations in Australia, China, and Hong Kong  

Industries: Professional Services, Agriculture, Manufacturing  

Job Type: Full-time, Permanent  

Salary: Competitive package commensurate with experience 



About Us  



We are a dynamic and diversified group running three distinct businesses across the Asia-Pacific region: 



- A Professional Accountancy & Advisory Firm with offices in Sydney, Shenzhen, and Hong Kong. 



- Strawberry Farms in Victoria and Queensland, Australia. 



- A Gadgets Manufacturing Facility in Huizhou, China.  



We are looking for a Social Media & Paid Ads Specialist to join our marketing team. The ideal candidate will help manage and grow our social media presence while supporting the execution and optimization of paid advertising campaigns, particularly on Meta platforms. 



This role focuses primarily on social media management and paid ads performance, while also supporting lead generation, audience engagement, and campaign monitoring. 



If you are interested in working with international brands, developing practical social media strategy skills, and contributing to measurable growth, we’d love to hear from you. 



Role & Responsibilities 



The responsibilities of this role are varied and involve both creative and analytical tasks. While experience in some areas is preferred, we are happy to provide training for the right candidate. 



Key responsibilities include: 



- Manage and grow social media channels of our brands across relevant platforms 

- Plan, create, and schedule social media content using content calendars 

- Develop, implement, and manage social media strategies 

- Monitor engagement, messages, and inquiries across social platforms 

- Actively participate in relevant online communities and groups to maintain engagement, build relationships, and support lead generation 

- Support lead generation through social media campaigns and
 outreach 

- Create and manage paid advertising campaigns, particularly on Meta 
 and Instagram) and LinkedIn 

- Write and optimize ad copy for social media campaigns 

- Monitor, track, and report on campaign performance 

- Provide insights and recommendations to improve campaign performance 

- Test and optimize ads, audiences, and creatives to improve results 

- Stay up to date with the latest social media trends, advertising strategies, and digital marketing tools 

- Collaborate with internal teams to ensure campaigns align with marketing goals 

- Ensure content is engaging, informative, and aligned with brand messaging 



Preferred Skills 

- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) 

- Strong interest in social media marketing and paid advertising 

- Basic understanding of Meta Ads Manager and other paid advertising platforms 

- Organized and able to manage multiple campaigns and content schedules 

- Analytical mindset with attention to performance metrics 

- A proactive attitude and willingness to learn 



Requirements: 



- 3+ years of experience in social media management, paid advertising, lead generation or digital marketing 

- Experience managing social media platforms such as
, Instagram, LinkedIn, or similar channels 

- Basic to intermediate experience with Meta Ads Manager and running paid social campaigns 

- Understanding of paid advertising fundamentals, including targeting, ad creatives, and campaign optimization 

- Ability to write engaging social media content and ad copy that drives engagement and conversions 

- Strong analytical skills with the ability to monitor campaign performance and identify optimization opportunities 

- Experience using marketing and analytics tools such as Meta Business Suite, scheduling tools, or basic analytics platforms 

- Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal 

- Organized and able to manage multiple campaigns, content schedules, and tasks simultaneously 

- Proactive, detail-oriented, and eager to learn new digital marketing tools and strategies 

- Experience engaging in online communities, groups, or forums to build relationships and maintain audience engagement is a plus 

- Experience working in a remote or distributed team environment is an advantage 

- Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field is preferred but not required 



What We Offer  



Diverse Challenge: Escape the monotony of a single industry. Apply your skills across three fascinating and different businesses. 



Professional Growth: This role reports directly to the Marketing Manager and offers significant scope for career advancement as the companies grow.  



Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere in the Philippines with a stable internet connection.  



Competitive Compensation: A salary package that rewards expertise and results, plus opportunities for performance-based bonuses.  



Supportive Environment: You will have the full backing of the ownership team and access to the resources needed to succeed. 



How to Apply 



Ready to build something exceptional? Please send your application with the subject line: "Application: Social Media Specialist - [Your Name]". Your application must include: 



- Your updated CV/Resume. 



- A cover letter that addresses: 1. Why you are interested in managing social media for three different businesses. 2. A brief example of a successful advertising campaign you have led (mention the channels and key results). 3. Your salary expectation. 



- (Optional but highly valued) Links to your portfolio, LinkedIn profile, or any relevant case studies. Applications without a cover letter will not be considered. We are an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity in our team.

title: SOA Production & Client Services Officer
description:
SOA Production & Client Services Officer 



Location: Remote (Philippines) 

Hours: Full-time, 6:00am – 3:00pm Manila Time (aligned with Australian business hours) 

Availability: Must be online and available on Microsoft Teams during work hours 



About Us 



We are an Australian financial advice business specialising in retirement and aged care financial planning. Our work is structured, process-driven, and detail-focused. 



We are seeking a highly organised, detail-oriented tea
mber to support the preparation and quality control of financial advice documents and client records. 



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with numbers, following clear processes, and ensuring everything is accurate and complete. 



The Role 



You will be responsible for assembling, checking, and organising financial planning documents using our structured templates and step-by-step processes. 



You will not be giving financial advice. 



You will be executing and quality-checking within a defined system. 



Key Responsibilities 



• Input financial data accurately into templates and internal systems 

• Assist in preparing Statements of Advice and aged care strategy documents 

• Follow structured checklists to ensure accuracy and completeness 

• Review documents carefully to identify inconsistencies or missing information 

• Maintain clean and organised digital client files 

• Draft clear internal notes and summaries 

• Support Centrelink and aged care documentation preparation 

• Ensure version control and proper file naming conventions 

• Raise questions early when information is unclear or incomplete 



What We Are Looking For 



This is a high attention-to-detail role. Accuracy matters. 



You must: 



• Be extremely detail-oriented and methodical 

• Be comfortable working with numbers and financial information 

• Follow processes precisely without shortcuts 

• Have strong written English skills 

• Be organised and structured in your work 

• Be comfortable working independently while remaining responsive on Teams 

• Be reliable, punctual, and focused during work hours 



Previous experience in an Australian financial planning firm, mortgage broking firm, or financial services outsourcing company is highly regarded but not mandatory. 



Data entry, loan processing, financial administration, or document QA experience is advantageous. 



Work Expectations 



• Full-time position 

• 6:00am – 3:00pm Manila Time 

• Must be online and available on Microsoft Teams during working hours 

• Stable internet connection required 

• Quiet and professional work environment 



We will provide structured training in our processes and systems. 



Our Culture 



We value: 



• Precision 

• Accountability 

• Clear communication 

• Professionalism 

• Continuous improvement 



This is not a creative or sales role. It is a structured production role suited to someone who takes pride in accuracy and organisation. 



We offer: 

 

Remote work position 

13th-month pay 

Work schedule from 6 am to 3 pm, Manila time 

Weekends off 

Collaborative and supportive team environment 



Application Process 



To apply: 

 





Submit your resume through the link. 

Complete the FaceCruit video interview. 



Only applications submitted through the application link will be reviewed. 

We are hiring immediately and encourage prompt applications.

title: Co-Founder for US Company
description:
Join a founder with a track record of starting a $15 million USD annual revenue company. We are looking for a talented and dedicated individual to join our early-stage financial start-up as a co-founder. This is a high-ticket, service-based business with significant growth potential.



About the Opportunity:



Our company is in the early stages of development. I, as the founder, have generated about $50k in revenue so far with this business model.

The position offers equity ownership and requires a high level of commitment and active involvement in the company’s operations and growth.

With strong performance and company success, this role has the potential to yield $100,000–$200,000 USD annually.

The co-founder would largely be operations focused, but also may include sales and marketing.



Ideal Candidate Profile:



Exceptional operational and organizational skills.

Excellent proficiency in English, both written and verbal.

Entrepreneurial mindset with the drive to help build and scale a business from the ground up.

This is a unique opportunity for someone passionate about finance and start-ups to play a pivotal role in shaping a high-potential company. If you’re ready to invest your time, energy, and expertise into a rewarding venture, we’d love to hear from you.



To Apply

Please write a detailed cover letter explaining why you would be a good fit. Bonus points for submitting a voice or video recording introducing yourself. You can use 
 for voice, or 
 for video.

title: Supplychain Manager
description:
Dear applicant,



For our dropshipping business we are looking forward to hitting 8 figures this year. Therefore we are looking for a highly skilled Supply Chain manager with experience in Dropshipping in Shopify to be part of a new team in our organisation.



You must understand the whole process and must be highly developed in communication. Therefore, please apply the word strawberry before you introduce yourself. Read on to find out what tasks we expect you to perform, as well as the experience we feel is necessary for this job.



Please answer the following questions, if you are interested.



- Do you have experience working with Shopify?

- Do you have experience with Parcel Panel?

- Do you have experience with Slack?

- Do you have experience in (working with) customer service agents

- Do you have experience communicating with suppliers?

- Do you have experience working with Slack?

- Are you able to understand, navigate and structure Google Sheets?

- Are you able to work structured, closely noting down the KPI’s?

- Can you work according to OUR strategy?

- Are you available for 4-8 hours a day, 6 days a week?



As a Supply Chain Manager you have:



- A background in engineering (Pre)

- Excellent communication skills (Must)

- Experience with Shopify (Pre)

- Experience with Parcel Panel (Pre)

- Experience with understanding workflows and video trainings

- Experience in noting down parcel data in Google Sheets

- Experience with workflows 

- Experience with different communication platforms (Slack)



If you do not meet the requirements, do not apply. (thank you)





Your duties will be:



- Monitoring our supply chain for all our stores

- Making sure our suppliers are keeping their promised delivery times true

- Working neatly together with our supplier and customer service agents

- Communicating with tea
mbers

- Being aware of the process and making sure there are no delays.

- Making sure our customers are happy and receive their products on time

- Updating the Google sheet with all the data and following the instructions given.



WORKFLOW IS PROVIDED THROUGH EVERY STEP OF THE PROCESS INCLUDING VIDEO TRAINING! 



WE OFFER CAREER OPPORTUNITIES IN THE TEAM TO HARD WORKING TEA
MBERS



If you think you are the right person for this job and you are able to contribute to our company, please respond to this post.



Best regards,

title: Expert Digital Marketer (Social Media & Meta Ads)
description:
Salon Marketing Solutions is an Australian-based marketing education company supporting beauty salons, skin clinics, and aesthetic businesses across Australia and New Zealand. We provide done-for-you campaigns, strategic mentoring, and practical tools to help clinic owners grow consistently and confidently.



Please ONLY apply if you have experience in the ff:
 Marketing, Meta Ads, Canva Pro, Meta Business Suite



Recruited and Trained by Vanessa McDonald Consulting – Installed™ Service

Installed™ builds in-house marketing capability for beauty and skin clinics.

This role is a 4–6 week training and placement pathway, preparing you to run the full social media marketing function inside a clinic — not as an agency, but as an embedded tea
mber.



Purpose:



To lead and execute a clinic’s social media marketing strategy, design, content, engagement, and paid ads — with the goal of growing visibility, followers, and lead lists. You will be placed with a growing clinic business (to be advised at the second interview) and work directly with the clinic owner following installation.

 marketing will be required on an ad-hoc basis to complement social strategy.

This is an incredible opportunity to learn directly from Vanessa McDonald — one of Australia’s most respected marketing strategists in the professional beauty and skincare industry, with 24 years of experience guiding clinics to build sustainable, high-performing marketing systems.



You’ll be trained in:



The beauty, skin, and aesthetics industry — treatments, terminology, and client psychology.

The specific clinic’s business, brand, and product range.

 marketing systems used within the industry, including Phorest or Shortcuts (training provided for these only if the clinic you are placed with uses these particular platforms).



Core Responsibilities:



- Develop and implement Instagram and
 strategies that drive engagement, growth, and qualified new client leads.

- Manage Meta Ads end-to-end: strategy, creative, setup, optimisation, and reporting.

- Confidently operate within the Meta Business Suite and Ads Manager, keeping up to date with current Meta tools and best practices.

- Design high-quality, on-brand content in Canva Pro, following the clinic’s brand style guide.

- Create and edit reels and short-form videos using apps such as CapCut or similar.

- Write fluent, polished UK English captions and campaign copy that reflect the clinic’s tone of voice.

- Manage DMs and engagement daily — responding to enquiries, nurturing prospective clients, and connecting with local influencers and aligned businesses for collaboration opportunities.

- Build and send
 campaigns using Mailchimp or the clinic’s in-house marketing system (Mailchimp expertise is essential).

- Utilise AI tools to enhance efficiency while preserving human judgment and creative quality.

- Prepare concise monthly reports covering organic performance, ads, and
 activity.

- Once Installed, you’ll work directly with the clinic owner using a clear communication and project management system that sets expectations, deadlines, and approvals.



Required Experience & Skills



- Minimum 3 years’ proven experience in social media strategy and Meta Ads management.

- Demonstrated results in organic audience growth and engagement.

- Strong proficiency with Meta Business Suite, Ads Manager, data analysis, and reporting.

- Advanced Canva Pro design capability with excellent attention to detail. We’re seeking candidates who can create clean, professional artwork and design aligned to brand standards.

- Confident in photo editing and basic retouching to ensure all visual content is polished, consistent, and on-brand.

- Skilled in reel creation and short-form video editing (CapCut preferred).

- Expert in Mailchimp, including automation, segmentation, and reporting.

- Adaptable to other industry platforms such as Phorest or Shortcuts (training provided for these systems only).

- Familiar with ManyChat or similar tools for automated lead capture.

- Excellent written and spoken UK English for an Australian audience (10/10 fluency).

- Reliable, responsive, and professional in remote settings.

- Must successfully complete a test task before onboarding.



Work Structure & Conditions

Part-time: 20 hours per week (remote, flexible)

Training rate: $175 AUD/week (6-8 weeks)

Probation (3 months): $200 AUD/week

After 12 months: $240 AUD/week

12months +: 280AUD per week

Performance bonuses apply for meeting or exceeding campaign KPIs and results benchmarks.

If you prefer full-time work, you may be placed with two clinics instead of one.

All recruitment, training, and placement are managed through Vanessa McDonald Consulting – Installed™.



To maintain quality and focus:

You cannot work with other beauty or skin clinics in Australia or New Zealand.

You may retain a small number of freelance clients outside this industry, provided your total weekly workload remains under 50 hours.

You’ll have full ownership of strategy ? design ? captions ? scheduling ? reporting, supported by structured systems, brand training, and direct client collaboration.



Hiring Process



Application review: We assess your cover letter, résumé, and portfolio for relevance and quality.

Initial interview: A video interview with our recruitment specialist to discuss experience, fit, and expectations.

Test task: You’ll complete a short assignment to demonstrate your ability in design, content creation, and social strategy.

Final interview: Successful applicants are invited to a second interview with Vanessa McDonald.

Presentation matters — please ensure a professional appearance, a stable internet and audio connection, and a tidy background during interviews.



Fill out this form to apply:

title: Mortgage Broking Loan Processor VA
description:
We are looking for a self-driven, determined, smart, and reliable go-getter to join our team in Mortgage Broking Australia! 



You will be responsible for end-to-end loan application process, document collection and sorting, checking living expenses and income, serving calculations, packaging & processing client loans, data entry, administrative support to Mortgage Broking office, loan follow-up tasks and liaising with banks to follow-up and provide updates on client’s applications.



Money Links is an award-winning full service residential and commercial loan brokerage that was established in 2000.



At Money Links we believe that everyone deserves financial security and choices in life, we work closely with our customers to help them achieve exactly that. Our values are Excellence, Determination, Energy, Growth & Empowerment.



PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE AUSTALIAN MORTGAGE BROKING EXPERIENCE.



PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DON'T HAVE MYCRM AND APPLY ONLINE EXPERIENCE. 



Tasks and Responsibilities:

• Collecting & sorting supporting documents from clients (homebuyers) via cloud platform

• Review documents and follow-up clients

• Data entry

• Check & calculate income from payslips

• Verify living expenses 

• Income servicing calculations via servicing app or calculator

• Liaise with and report to Office Manager regarding status of documents

• Save & file documents using folder and File Naming Conventions

• Pricing existing loans

• Property valuation requests 

• Checking data input into MyCRM matches the clients’ supporting documents

• Make comprehensive client file notes regarding servicing & summary of client’s position

• Enter application into apply online

• Liaise with lenders (banks) to provide updates on client applications

• Follow-up client application to formal approval & settlement

• Complete, update & reassign tasks in MyCRM

• Ensure regulatory, and industry compliance guidelines are being met and strictly adhered to

• Daily accountability sheet



Ideal Candidate:

• Minimum of 2 years relevant previous experience in Australian loan processing

• Experience and competency using Apply Online

• Experience and competency using client CRM software MyCRM

• Accuracy and attention to detail is essential

• Dedication to excellent standard of work

• Must have excellent liaison skills

• Experience and competency using Word, Excel and Microsoft Outlook

• Have the ability to multitask, work towards deadlines and prioritize tasks effectively

• Excellent verbal and written communication skills

• Familiarity with current technologies, like desktop sharing, cloud services, CRM and Zoom

• Excellent phone,
 and instant messaging communication skill

• Solid organizational and time management skills

• Self-directed and able to work without supervision

• Strong customer service skills

• Must have the ability to multitask client files

• Must also be able to motivate themselves and work independently

• Availability to work Australian EST hours

• Would need to be available for in person training in Manilla end of May 2026





What’s in it for you?

• Be a part of a team that values you

• Long term permanent role security (our business has been around for 20 years)

• 4 weeks accrued paid annual leave

• Dayshift & weekends off

• Vacation leave convertible to cash (subject to availability)

• Work from home - save on travel costs to an office



Non-negotiable:

• Stable Internet Connection (at least 10 Mbps)

• Laptop or Computer with Webcam

• 2 x large computer monitors

• Commitment to this role only. We can’t except candidates working other jobs, we need complete focus

• A candidate who is looking for a long-term role

• Australian Loan processing experience (DO NOT apply if you do not have solid Australian Loan processing experience)





Apply with these 5 easy steps?

1. Download ahead
 or Zoom (free apps) as communication will be through video calls.

2. Send CV to 
 for screening and wait for a recruitment specialist to
, call, or text you. (please include your online jobs profile)

3. Prepare to take the Pre-employment assessments if your CV is successful.

4. A first interview will be conducted if you ace the Pre-employment assessments.

5. Prepare for 2 more interviews via
/Zoom with Recruitment, and Management, and get hired!



Please note that due to the volume of applications, we regret that we’ll only be able to respond to successful candidates. We will also be taking our time to find the right candidate for the role.



Salary - PHP60,000 / month + we will offer bonuses and incentives.

title: Social Media Account Manager / Content Supervisor (Later + QA)
description:
Social Media Account Manager / Content Supervisor (Later + QA)



Part-Time | Long-Term | Philippines Only | $6–$10/hr



We are a fast-growing digital marketing agency working primarily with restaurant and hospitality brands. We’re looking for a detail-oriented Social Media Account Manager / Content Supervisor to oversee scheduling, accuracy, and quality control across multiple client accounts using Later.



This role is focused on reviewing and approving content before it goes live, ensuring every post follows brand guidelines and is scheduled correctly.



???? Responsibilities



You will be responsible for reviewing, managing, and approving scheduled social media content.



Core Responsibilities



Manage and oversee multiple restaurant social media accounts



Review all scheduled posts inside Later before publishing



Ensure all content follows each client’s brand guidelines



Verify:



Correct images/videos are used



Captions match the correct menu items



Promotions align with the correct days and times



Happy Hour, brunch, specials, and events are scheduled accurately



No outdated pricing, offers, or incorrect items are posted



Prevent mistakes such as:



Scheduling Happy Hour posts on non-Happy Hour days



Using the wrong image for a promotion or menu item



Incorrect dates, times, or offers



Coordinate with caption writers, editors, and supervisors



Flag issues before content goes live and request corrections



Maintain clean, organized content calendars



Report recurring issues or workflow gaps



???? This Role Is NOT



Content creation



Video editing



Graphic design



This is a quality control, review, and approval role.



???? Requirements



Strong experience using Later (REQUIRED)



Experience managing or supervising social media accounts



Restaurant or hospitality experience strongly preferred



Excellent attention to detail



Strong English reading and comprehension skills



Highly organized and process-driven



Comfortable managing multiple clients



Able to follow SOPs and brand guidelines precisely



Reliable internet and consistent availability



Long-term mindset



? Bonus Skills



Experience working at a digital marketing agency



Familiarity with restaurant menus, promotions, and operations



Experience with content approval or QA workflows



???? Compensation



$6–$10 USD per hour (Part-Time)



Rate is based on experience, Later expertise, and accuracy level



Entry-level candidates will start toward the lower end



Higher rates reserved for candidates with proven restaurant + agency + Later experience



Opportunity for increased hours and rate as responsibilities grow



Please include your expected hourly rate when applying.



???? How to Apply



Please submit:



Your resume



A short description of your experience using Later



Examples of accounts or brands you’ve managed (if available)

How do you prevent scheduling mistakes before posts go live?



Have you managed restaurant accounts before?

What tools have you used for scheduling and approvals?



???? Test Assignment (Shortlisted Applicants Only)

title: Recruiting Manager Review a High Volume of US Based Resumes Daily
description:
We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and proactive Resume Screener and also a Resume Screening Manager to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be responsible for reviewing and evaluating incoming resumes for a variety of job positions. Your primary task will be to qualify or disqualify candidates based on their prior experience, answers to questions, location, and skill sets that align with employers' needs. This position requires someone with strong attention to detail, a keen eye for spotting key qualifications, and the ability to work efficiently in a very high-volume, fast-paced environment.



Responsibilities:

• Review and assess incoming resumes to ensure alignment with job requirements.

• Evaluate candidates based on their experience, answers to questions, location, and relevant skills

• Consistently maintain a high level of accuracy in identifying qualified applicants.

• Collaborate with hiring teams to ensure alignment between job requirements and candidate profiles.

• Manage a high volume of resumes while ensuring quality and consistency in evaluations.



Requirements:

**CANDIDATE NEEDS TO BE 100% FLUENT IN SPEAKING, READING AND WRITING ENGLISH**

• Strong attention to detail and ability to spot key qualifications quickly.

• Excellent organizational skills and the ability to manage a high volume of resumes.

• Ability to work efficiently and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

• Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal.

• Previous experience in resume screening or recruitment in the US is a MUST

• Able to work 6 days per week during EST/eastern standard time hours

• Proficiency in Job Websites such as ZipRecruiter, Indeed, etc.



Why Join Us:

• Competitive compensation.

• Opportunity to work in a fast-paced, high-energy environment.

• Collaborative team culture with opportunities for growth and development.



If you are passionate about helping match top talent with the right opportunities and thrive in a fast-moving environment, we encourage you to apply for the Resume Reviewer position today!



Weekly payments made via PayPal

title: Bilingual Administrative Assistant (Cantonese/Mandarin)
description:
We're looking for a bilingual Admin Assistant who is fluent in English and Cantonese or Mandarin to support a boutique law firm based in California, serving clients throughout the San Francisco Bay Area. The firm practices family law, employment law, and civil rights, and roughly half of its clients are Chinese-speaking. This role exists to make sure those clients are never left without clear, accurate communication at any point in their experience with the firm.



The split is approximately 30% live interpretation and translation, 70?ministrative support. You do not need a legal background. You do need to be sharp, dependable, and comfortable switching between languages in real client-facing situations.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in **USD** (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Up to **14 days** of Paid Time Off annually (starting Day 1)

- Observance of **Holidays** per company guidelines

- **100% remote setup** so you can work wherever you’re most productive

- Direct involvement in meaningful legal matters that affect real people

- Small team environment where your work has immediate visibility and impact



## What You'll Work On



**Interpretation and Translation**



- Provide live interpretation between English and Cantonese or Mandarin during client calls, consultations, and case discussions

- Translate written documents,
s, and client-facing materials as needed

- Ensure accuracy and tone are preserved across both languages in sensitive legal contexts

- Serve as a communication bridge between the legal team and Chinese-speaking clients

- Step in for interpretation support on short notice when client needs arise



**Administrative Support**



- Handle data entry, document management, and file organization across firm systems

- Assist with basic bookkeeping tasks including expense tracking and invoice logging

- Draft, review, and respond to
s on behalf of the team as directed

- Support day-to-day operations across scheduling, client follow-ups, and internal coordination

- Maintain organized records with attention to detail and confidentiality



**Marketing Support (Nice to Have)**



- Assist with social media posting, content scheduling, or basic digital marketing tasks

- Help draft client-facing communications or update website copy when needed

- Support any outreach or visibility initiatives the firm pursues



## What You Bring



- Full professional fluency in English and Cantonese or Mandarin, written and spoken

- Cantonese fluency is strongly preferred, as most Cantonese speakers also speak Mandarin

- Prior experience in an administrative, legal, or client-facing support role

- Comfort handling live interpretation in professional or high-stakes conversations

- Strong written communication skills in both English and Chinese

- Proficiency in standard productivity tools including
, spreadsheets, and document management platforms

- High attention to detail and a strong sense of confidentiality

- Ability to manage shifting priorities in a small, fast-moving team



## Nice to Have



- Background in legal, paralegal, or professional services environments

- Basic bookkeeping or accounting experience

- Experience with any legal practice management software

- Social media or digital marketing skills



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes)** introducing yourself in both English and Cantonese or Mandarin, and briefly describing a situation where you had to communicate clearly across a language barrier in a professional setting



**Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.**



If you are fluent in both worlds, can hold a room in two languages, and take pride in making every client feel understood, this role puts you at the center of work that genuinely matters.

title: Estimating / Great with Excel and AI
description:
About Us

Make Fencing is an Australian-based fencing company delivering high-quality residential and commercial fencing projects. We specialise in custom fencing, gates, automation, and large-scale commercial installations across Victoria.

We are a growing, systems-driven business looking for a highly capable Construction Estimator and Business Systems Specialist to support our quoting, systems development, and marketing processes.

This is a long-term role with opportunities to grow alongside the business.



Role Overview

This role combines construction estimating, spreadsheet development, AI integration, and occasional design work.

You will work directly with our leadership team to help streamline quoting processes, build powerful spreadsheets and tools, and support the preparation of quotes and marketing materials.

This is an ideal role for someone who enjoys solving problems, building systems, and improving business efficiency.



Key Responsibilities/ Experience

- Construction Estimating / Reading plans

- Drafting

- AI 

- Excel

- Xero 



Excell -

- Build and maintain advanced Excel spreadsheets and calculators

- Develop estimating tools, cost trackers, and project planning systems

- Improve and automate internal business processes using Excel and AI tools

- Create dashboards and reporting tools to assist management decisions



AI & Automation

- Assist in integrating AI tools into business processes

- Help automate workflows such as quoting, document generation, and reporting

- Explore ways AI can improve efficiency in estimating and admin tasks



Drafting 

- Assist with basic drafting where required

- Modify plans or produce simple drawings using CAD or Revit

- Prepare visual concepts for fencing layouts where required



Graphic Design Support

Assist in creating:

- Brochures

- Proposal documents

- Marketing material

- Maintain consistency with company branding



Required Skills & Experience

Essential

- Experience in construction estimating or quantity take-offs

- Strong Excel skills (advanced formulas, automation, dashboards)

- Excellent attention to detail

- Strong written and spoken English

- Ability to understand construction drawings and plans

- Highly organised and able to manage multiple tasks



Highly Desirable

- Experience with Australian construction projects

- Experience in fencing construction estimating

- Experience using AI tools in business

- Experience with CAD or Revit

- Experience with graphic design tools (Canva, Adobe, etc.)



Personal Attributes

We are looking for someone who:

- Is proactive and solutions-focused

- Enjoys building systems and improving processes

- Has a high level of ownership and accountability

- Communicates clearly and professionally

- Is comfortable working remotely with an Australian team



What We Offer

- Long-term stable employment

- Work with an established Australian construction company

- Opportunity to develop systems and processes that shape the business

- Flexible working structure (as long as outcomes are delivered)



To Apply

Please include:

- Your resume

- Examples of Excel spreadsheets you have built

- Examples of construction estimates or take-offs

- Any CAD/drafting work

- Any graphic design work (if available)

title: Engineering Manager (Delivery & Execution)
description:
We are seeking an Engineering manager who can own predictable delivery across engineering by enforcing sprint discipline, decision clarity, and execution standards. Reduce coordination cost, eliminate rework, and ensure that engineering output is reviewable, shippable, and on time.



Core Responsibilities



Sprint Ownership & Delivery Control

• Own sprint planning, execution, and closure

• Enforce sprint scope boundaries (no silent mid-sprint additions)

• Ensure all tickets entering a sprint meet Definition of Ready

• Track and act on: ticket aging, spillover, churn, blocked work

• Move tickets aggressively across states (TODO ? IN PROGRESS ? REVIEW ? DONE)

• Kill zombie tickets



Timebox Enforcement

• Treat timeboxes as coordination contracts, not estimates

• Require proactive communication before a timebox slips

• Block review if timebox standards are violated

• Escalate early, not after the fact



Execution Quality Gates

• Enforce: Definition of Ready (before sprint), Definition of Done (before release)

• Reject work that: contains implicit decisions, lacks acceptance criteria, introduces duplication without approval

• Ensure code review happens before QA

• Ensure QA does not compensate for missing engineering clarity



Decision Discipline (in partnership with TPM / Product)

• Require explicit tracking of: Open Decisions, Frozen Decisions

• Block execution on unresolved architectural decisions

• Ensure decisions are made by the right group, at the right time

• Prevent “decision by implementation”



5. Engineering Standards Enforcement

• Enforce agreed standards consistently: no duplication without approval, no implicit architecture decisions, no skipping ticket states

• Treat violations as delivery risk, not personal issues

• Track repeat violations and escalate



Required Skills & Traits



Must Have

• Strong judgment around delivery tradeoffs

• Comfort enforcing rules and saying “no”

• Ability to stop work and force alignment

• Low tolerance for ambiguity in execution

• Bias for early escalation over late heroics

• Calm under pressure, emotionally neutral

• Experience running sprints that actually ship

• Strong English language skills

• Familiarity with Jira-style workflows



Nice to Have

• Background as senior engineer

• Experience in SaaS / platform teams

• Worked alongside TPMs or Product Managers

title: Product Manager (Technical) / Software Architect
description:
We are seeking a Technical Product Manager / Architect who bridges product design and engineering execution. This role combines system-level thinking, architectural oversight, and clear, actionable documentation—producing deliverables engineers can build from directly. The ideal candidate can translate business needs into architecture diagrams, wireframes, and well-scoped tickets with code-level precision, ensuring efficient handoff and reduced rework.



Requirements & Documentation

• Author architecture-aware product specifications including system diagrams, logic flows, and key technical dependencies.

• Prepare engineer-ready tickets, including pseudocode, scaffolding, or sample API structures.

• Conduct architecture and code reviews, identifying potential design or implementation issues early.

• Build wireframes, mockups, and interaction flows using Figma or equivalent tools to align engineering and UX/UI early in the cycle.

• Collaborate with engineering to ensure technical feasibility and architectural scalability before feature commitment.

Cross-Functional Execution

• Work closely with engineering leads to break down architecture into structured deliverables and sprint-ready tasks.

• Lead technical review sessions to validate assumptions and architecture decisions before coding begins.



Qualifications

• Strong understanding of software architecture principles, REST APIs, and modular system design.

• Hands-on experience writing or reviewing code in PHP, JavaScript, and SQL preferred.

• Proficiency in creating wireframes, prototypes, and UI flows that accurately reflect data and system constraints.

• Ability to evaluate trade-offs between architectural purity, delivery speed, and scalability.

• Prior experience functioning as a bridge between engineering and design, ensuring clarity and readiness for execution.

title: Operations Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Own the estimate-to-approval-to-route workflow:

*Create and submit estimates

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Ensure routes are realistic and efficient; confirm techs are prepped and ready

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments



2. Scheduling & Productivity Tracking

*Maintain the daily technician schedule, making updates as needed

*Monitor tech productivity; flag idle time, reschedules, or delays

*Track time logs and coordinate with bookkeeper for payroll



3. Customer Communication

*Respond to incoming texts, WhatsApp messages, and system inquiries in a timely, professional manner

*Follow up with clients as needed to resolve open issues or gather job-related info

*Escalate concerns appropriately and promptly



4. Admin & Reporting

*Submit a detailed Daily Recap covering completed work, pending tasks, blockers, and KPIs

*Keep Trello and other tools up-to-date with accurate job and task statuses

*Track inventory needs and coordinate ordering of parts, oil, and supplies

*Monitor A/R and follow up on past-due fleet invoices



5. Marketing & Content Support 

*Publish our monthly newsletter in MailChimp with content from marketing team

*Coordinate publishing of content to Instagram /
 / Google My Business

*Other light admin support as needed for the marketing team



What Success Looks Like

*All work orders, estimates, approvals, and tech routes are handled with zero dropped balls

*You identify blockers or problems before they become fires

*Communication is clear, timely, and professional — with both customers and internal team

*The business runs like a machine — nothing gets missed or delayed

*You take full ownership of your responsibilities and require very little follow-up



Who You Are

*A natural systems thinker who thrives on clarity, organization, and ownership

*Extremely proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

*Excellent at written and verbal English communication

*Comfortable in the automotive world and eager to learn the details

*Sharp and reliable — you retain info, spot gaps, and follow through



Experience & Skills Required

title: Marketing GoHighLevel Specialist
description:
***At Polaris, we’re on the lookout for a driven, detail-oriented, and marketing-savvy Marketing and Acquisitions Assistant to join our world-class team. If you thrive in fast-paced environments, love the idea of being the operational backbone of a company’s marketing engine, and have strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel, content creation, CRM systems, and social media, this role is for you.



***About us:

Polaris is a consulting agency with a bold mission: To help 1 million Founders to leverage time, reclaim freedom, and scale without sacrifice. We’re the only firm blending coaching and done-for-you services through a hybrid model — empowering our clients with strategic delegation, streamlined operations, and scalable systems. 



***Who we are looking for:

We’re looking for a proactive implementer and critical thinker — someone who can own the execution of digital marketing systems from A to Z. You’ll be the strong link the Founder can rely on, responsible for setting up, executing, and optimizing all marketing touchpoints across CRM, content, social media, funnels, ads, and lead follow-up. This role is perfect for someone who thrives in supporting visionaries, brings technical marketing skills to the table, and gets excited about driving results behind the scenes.



***Your mission:

Be the driving force behind the marketing engine of an established, fast-growing company. You won’t just support growth — you’ll architect it. By managing the daily execution of CRM, funnels, social media, and content systems, your role will directly help scale client acquisition, multiply impact, and buy back the Founder’s time.



***Role Responsibilities

Set up and manage GHL sub-accounts, funnels, workflows, and
 campaigns

Edit and repurpose content (Canva, CapCut, Descript)

title: Real Estate Lead Manager / Inside Sales Agent (ISA)
description:
ABOUT US

We are a Chicago-based real estate investment company focused on acquiring small and mid-size multifamily properties. We use data, systems, and targeted outreach to find off-market opportunities.



We are looking for a hungry, organized, and persistent Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to manage our seller pipeline and qualify leads.



This is a SALES ROLE, not an admin role. Your job is to talk to property owners, uncover motivation, and move deals forward.



IMPORTANT: NO AGENCIES. We want a direct hire who will work exclusively with our team.



WHAT YOU WILL DO (THE DAY-TO-DAY)

Your job is simple: find motivated sellers and move them toward a deal. Expect to make 80 to 120 calls per day when working through the pipeline. You will spend most of your day on:



LEAD QUALIFICATION



Calling inbound leads from our answering service.



Conducting initial seller intake.



Determining motivation and timeline.



Booking calls or appointments for our acquisitions team.



PIPELINE MANAGEMENT



Managing leads inside our CRM (Podio).



Keeping notes and updating lead stages.



Ensuring NO lead falls through the cracks.



OUTBOUND FOLLOW-UP



Calling and texting warm and cold leads.



Following up persistently with sellers over weeks or months.



Building rapport and uncovering the real reason they might sell.



REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



US CENTRAL TIME HOURS: You must work full-time during US Central Time business hours (Chicago time).



STRONG PHONE COMMUNICATION: You will be speaking directly with US property owners. Your spoken English must be clear, confident, and professional.



SALES MINDSET: You are comfortable hearing "no." You know how to ask questions, build rapport, and move a conversation forward.



PERSISTENCE: Many sellers do not d
 immediately. Following up professionally and consistently is a core part of this role.



RELIABLE WORK SETUP: High-speed internet, a quiet workspace, and backup internet/power if possible.



COMPENSATION



Base Pay: $1,000 / month



Deal Bonus: $250 per acquisition



Tier Bonuses: 2 deals/month = $350 per deal | 3+ deals/month = $450 per deal



Referral Listing Bonus: $100 per listing



Revived Lead Bonus: +$100 if the lead was 60+ days old



HOW TO APPLY

We only hire people who pay attention to details. Please apply via platfor
ssage and follow these exact steps:



STEP 1: THE SUBJECT LINE

Change the subject line of your application to: Chicago ISA - [Your Favorite Movie]. Applications without this exact subject line will be instantly ignored.



STEP 2: VOICE RECORDING (MANDATORY)

Include a 1 to 2 minute voice recording using Vocaroo or a similar service. In the recording:



Introduce yourself.



Briefly describe your real estate or sales experience.



Roleplay the first 30 seconds of a call where a seller answers and says: "I am not sure I want to sell. I am just curious what my property might be worth."



We want to hear exactly how you start the conversation. Applications without a voice recording will be deleted.



STEP 3: ONE SHORT QUESTION

In your application
, answer this question: Why do most homeowners d
 to sell their property? We are looking for thoughtful answers, not one-word responses.



FINAL NOTE

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys talking to people, likes solving problems, is motivated by performance bonuses, and wants to grow in the real estate investment business. We are a small, fast-moving team and the right ISA will play a key role in our acquisitions pipeline.

title: Experienced Payroll Administrator (Multi-Company, QBO & Gusto, Canada/US)
description:
About Us



We are a  virtual bookkeeping and tax firm serving ~ 80+ clients across Canada and the United States. We're growing fast and need a dedicated Payroll Administrator who can manage payroll across multiple companies independently.



The Role



You'll be responsible for processing payroll for multiple clients across different companies — not just one business. This requires someone who thrives in a multi-company environment, can context-switch between different payroll setups, and understands the nuances of both Canadian and US payroll.



This is a hands-on role. You'll own the payroll process end-to-end for your assigned clients.  Including tax remittances, replying to clients, and sending documentation like paystubs.



What You'll Do



• Process payroll for multiple unrelated companies on a regular schedule (weekly, bi-weekly, semi-monthly, monthly)

• Manage payroll in QuickBooks Online and Gusto

• Handle Canadian payroll: CPP, EI, income tax deductions, T4s, ROEs, CRA remittances

• Handle US payroll: federal/state withholdings, W-2s, 1099s, quarterly filings

• Set up new employees, process terminations, and manage payroll changes

• Reconcile payroll liabilities and ensure accuracy across all clients

• Stay current on payroll compliance requirements in both countries

• Communicate directly with clients on payroll-related questions



Must-Have Requirements



• 4+ years payroll processing experience in a multi-company environment (firm or agency setting preferred — not just one employer)

• QuickBooks Online payroll experience — setting up, running, and troubleshooting

• Gusto experience — processing payroll, managing employee records, tax filings

• Canadian payroll experience — CPP, EI, provincial taxes, CRA remittances, T4/ROE preparation

• US payroll experience — federal/state withholdings, quarterly filings, W-2/1099 preparation

• Full-cycle payroll — from data entry to filing to reconciliation

• Excellent attention to detail — payroll errors are expensive and unacceptable

• Strong English communication skills — professional, clear, and concise (no sloppy
s)

• Reliable internet and quiet workspace



Who You Are



We're looking for someone who is jump-in-the-seat ready — not someone who needs hand-holding. The right person for this role:



• Lives and dies by deadlines — payroll is due when it's due, no excuses

• Is obsessively detail-oriented — you double-check your work before anyone asks you to

• Keeps a clean inbox — organized, responsive, nothing falls through the cracks

• Communicates professionally — clear, polished, no careless mistakes in client-facing messages

• Owns their work — if something goes wrong, you catch it first and fix it before it becomes a problem

• Can manage multiple clients without dropping balls — you have a system and you trust it



If you need to be told what to do every day, this isn't the role. If you're the person your previous employer relied on to just handle it, we want to talk to you.



Nice-to-Have



• Experience in a bookkeeping or accounting firm environment

• Familiarity with construction, trades, or professional services industries



Application Questions



Please answer ALL of the following in your application:



1. How many years have you been processing payroll?

2. How many different companies have you processed payroll for simultaneously?

3. Do you have experience with QuickBooks Online payroll? (Yes/No — and for how long?)

4. Do you have experience with Gusto? (Yes/No — and for how long?)

5. Do you have experience processing Canadian payroll (CPP, EI, CRA)? (Yes/No)

6. Do you have experience processing US payroll (federal/state withholdings)? (Yes/No)

7. Are you available to work full-time (8 hours/day), 9am-5pm Pacific Time?

8. What is your expected hourly rate in USD?

title: Tax Specialist – Individual & Business Returns
description:
Position Summary



The Tax Accountant/Preparer will assist with preparing and reviewing federal and state tax returns for individuals and businesses. The ideal candidate has experience working with multiple tax entities and understands IRS compliance requirements.



This is a **remote, part-time position** requiring **4 hours per day**.



---



## Responsibilities



Prepare and review U.S. tax returns including:



• Form 1040 – Individual Income Tax Returns

• Schedule C – Self-Employed / 1099 Contractors

• Schedule E – Rental and Real Estate Income

• Form 1065 – Partnership Returns

• Form 1120 – C-Corporation Returns

• Form 1120S – S-Corporation Returns



Additional responsibilities include:



• Review financial documents such as W-2s, 1099s, K-1s, and business financial statements

• Ensure compliance with IRS and state tax laws

• Identify deductions, credits, and tax-saving opportunities for clients

• Communicate with internal tea
mbers regarding missing documents or corrections

• Assist with amended returns (Form 1040X) when necessary

• Maintain confidentiality of client financial information

• Work within the firm’s tax preparation software and workflow system



---



## Required Qualifications



• Experience preparing **U.S. federal and state tax returns**

• Knowledge of **individual and business taxation**

• Experience with **1040, Schedule C, Schedule E, 1065, 1120, and 1120S returns**

• Understanding of IRS tax rules and compliance requirements

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy

• Ability to meet deadlines during tax season

• Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely



---



## Preferred Qualifications



• CPA, EA, or Accounting Degree (preferred but not required)

• Previous experience working with a tax firm

• Experience with tax software (Tax Dragon, Drake, ProSeries, TaxSlayer, etc.)

• Experience with bookkeeping or QuickBooks



---



## Work Schedule



• Remote position

• **4 hours per day**

• Flexible schedule depending on workload



---



## Compensation



• **$12 per hour**

• **Part-time: 4 hours per day**



---



## How to Apply



Please submit the following:



• Resume

• Summary of tax preparation experience

• List of tax forms you have prepared (1040, 1065, 1120, etc.)

• Availability to start
