title: Onboarding Lead/Project Manager (CINC Systems)
description:
CINC Platform Onboarding Lead / Implementation Project Manager

Sliceo – Remote (Philippines) | Full-Time | U.S. Eastern Hours



About Sliceo

Sliceo is a technology and operations consulting firm focused exclusively on the community association management (CAM) industry. We help property management companies modernize their technology stack, workflows, and operational infrastructure.



Our work includes:

• Implementing and optimizing property management systems such as CINC Systems

• Designing and integrating software ecosystems for management companies

• Workflow automation and AI enablement

• IT coordination, cybersecurity planning, and system integrations

• Operational process design and training

• Supporting management companies through growth, technology transitions, and modernization



Sliceo works closely with proptech providers, integration partners, and management companies to ensure technology implementations are successful and that clients fully adopt and benefit from their systems.



As Sliceo expands, we are building a world-class onboarding and implementation team to support management companies implementing the CINC platform and related integrations.



Position Overview

The CINC Platform Onboarding Lead / Implementation Project Manager is responsible for coordinating and supporting the successful implementation of CINC Systems and related technology solutions for management company clients.



This role works directly with:

• Management company leadership and operational teams

• Sliceo implementation and consulting teams

• CINC Systems implementation teams

• Integration and technology partners

• Sliceo development and IT teams



You will serve as the primary project coordinator and onboarding guide during system implementation, ensuring that clients successfully configure, adopt, and integrate their technology platform.



This role is highly client-facing and requires strong project management, communication, and organizational skills.



Key Responsibilities

Implementation Project Management

• Coordinate CINC platform implementations for management company clients

• Manage implementation timelines, milestones, and deliverables

• Track progress across multiple concurrent implementation projects

• Ensure successful project completion and client sign-off



Client Onboarding & System Configuration

• Work with clients to understand their current operational workflows

• Assist in designing and documenting best-practice workflows using CINC technology

• Support configuration of CINC modules including community tools, portals, and communication systems

• Coordinate onboarding for WebAxis, CINC Connect, homeowner/board portals, and other platform features



Data Migration Support

• Assist with migration of data from legacy systems into CINC

• Use Excel and data mapping tools to prepare, clean, and validate migration files

• Coordinate with technical teams to ensure accurate data transfers



Integration Coordination

• Work with Sliceo’s development and IT teams to support integration projects

• Help coordinate integrations between CINC and other software platforms

• Assist with rollout of partner technology solutions within the client’s tech stack



Training & Adoption

• Provide onboarding training and guidance to management company teams

• Support clients during early adoption of the platform

• Help create documentation and implementation SOPs

• Ensure clients are comfortable using their systems and workflows



Client Support & Issue Resolution

• Identify configuration issues or system errors during implementation

• Coordinate with technical teams to resolve issues

• Help ensure the client experience remains positive throughout the project lifecycle



Documentation & Project Tracking

• Maintain project documentation and implementation records

• Track tasks and milestones using Sliceo’s project management tools

• Maintain organized documentation within SharePoint and Zoho One systems



Required Skills & Experience

• 4+ years of experience implementing software for external clients or managing onboarding projects

• Experience working in client-facing project management roles

title: Virtual Assistant/Social Media/Outreach
description:
**Job Title:** Virtual Assistant – Model Outreach, Event Coordination & Social Media (Remote)



**Position Type:** Remote / Part-Time or Full-Time

**Industry:** Photography, Events, Modeling, Social Media



**About the Role**



We are looking for a proactive and organized Virtual Assistant to help support a growing photography and social events business that works with models, influencers, and creatives.



This role focuses on outreach, coordinating models for photoshoots and events, managing social media communication, and assisting with event organization.



You will help build and manage a network of models, brand ambassadors, and creatives who participate in photoshoots, social events, and collaborations.



---



**Key Responsibilities**



**1. Outreach & Talent Recruitment**



* Reach out to potential models, influencers, and creatives on platforms such as Instagram,
, and TikTok

* Send outreach messages inviting people to photoshoots, collaborations, and events

* Track conversations and responses in a spreadsheet or CRM

* Identify potential talent that fits the brand aesthetic



**2. Social Media Assistance**



* Manage Instagram and social media DMs

* Respond to inquiries about photoshoots, collaborations, and events

* Assist with posting content and scheduling posts

* Help identify accounts to engage with for growth



**3. Event Coordination**



* Help organize small social events and photoshoots

* Confirm attendance of models and guests

* Create guest lists and schedules

* Assist with logistics and planning for upcoming shoots and gatherings



**4. Lead Management**



* Maintain a database of models, influencers, and contacts

* Track outreach performance and response rates

* Organize leads by location and availability



**5. Research**



* Research modeling agencies, venues, and event locations in different cities

* Identify potential collaborators such as designers, makeup artists, or stylists



---



**Ideal Candidate**



We are looking for someone who is:



* Highly organized and proactive

* Comfortable communicating with people online

* Familiar with Instagram and social media culture

* Good at managing conversations and relationships

* Reliable and responsive



Bonus if you have experience with:



* Influencer outreach

* Talent scouting

* Event coordination

* Modeling or entertainment industries



---



**Skills Required**



* Strong English communication skills

* Social media knowledge (Instagram,
, TikTok)

* Basic spreadsheet / CRM management

* Organization and attention to detail



---



**Working Hours**



Flexible. Some daily check-ins required for outreach and message management.



---



**Compensation**



Competitive hourly or monthly pay depending on experience.

Opportunity to grow into a larger role managing talent outreach and event coordination.



---



**To Apply**



Please include:



* Your experience with outreach or social media

* Any relevant work with influencers, models, or events

* Examples of accounts or campaigns you have helped manage

title: Inside Sales Agent (ISA) – Real Estate
description:
We’re looking for a high-performance Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to join our real estate team. If you have previous experience working with licensed real estate agents and love converting leads into appointments, this role is for you.



The ISA is the heartbeat of our lead generation department. You’ll prospect daily, build strong relationships, nurture incoming and long-term leads, and set appointments that turn into closings.



What You’ll Do



Make daily outbound calls to Expireds, FSBOs, Buyer Leads, Past Clients, SOI, JL/JS leads, and Open House lists



Convert inquiries into qualified appointments for our listing and buyer specialists



Build rapport, ask purposeful questions, and uncover timing and motivation



Maintain and update all leads within our CRM



Follow up consistently to ensure no lead is left behind



Call past clients for reviews, referrals, and check-ins



Attend trainings, coaching sessions, and daily role-play



Track and report weekly goals, KPIs, and conversion ratios



Work 40–50 hours per week with full consistency



Requirements

Must-Haves



Previous real estate experience (ISA, client care specialist, or worked directly with licensed agents)



Strong communication skills and confidence on the phone



Proven ability to set appointments and convert leads



Comfortable using scripts and objection handlers



Excellent customer service and relationship-building skills



Highly organized, detail-oriented, and accountable



Tech savvy — CRM experience required



Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment



Preferred



Follow Up Boss (FUB) experience



Track record hitting or exceeding sales/appointment goals



Work Environment



Strong, reliable internet connection



Dedicated, quiet workspace free of background noise



Who Thrives in This Role



This position is ideal for someone who:



Loves talking to people



Is driven by goals and numbers



Enjoys a fast-paced, structured environment



Wants to grow within a high-performing real estate team

title: International Sales & AI Business Development Associate
description:
We are MSTR, an AI software company based in the Netherlands. We build custom AI-driven applications that help businesses work smarter and more intelligently, from first conversation to production-ready product.



Our team has around 16 people: a customer-facing team of six here in the Netherlands, and ten developers based in the Philippines. Right now, all of our sales happen in the Netherlands. We're ready to change that, and we're looking for the person to help us do it.



What this role is:

We're building our international sales track from the ground up, and we're looking for a driven person to lead that effort alongside Tom, our co-founder. Your focus will be on international markets, though you'll occasionally support the Dutch market too, where we use AI to help bridge language and communication gaps.



This is early-stage work. There's no existing international playbook to follow. You'll build it. Tom will be involved in calls and strategy, but the initiative and day-to-day hustle is yours.



What you'll actually be doing:

- Reaching out to prospects via phone,
, LinkedIn, and whatever creative approaches you come up with

- Building and running AI-powered lead generation pipelines

- Creating marketing materials that help us tell our story

- Challenging our thinking and bringing new ideas to the table

- Growing into a genuine AI expert who can have real conversations with business owners about what's possible



Who we're looking for:

Someone who communicates exceptionally well in English, is comfortable reaching out cold, and gets genuinely excited about building something new rather than maintaining something existing. You pick up new things fast, you're curious about AI and what it can do for businesses, and you want a role where your results are visible and your responsibility grows with them.



Experience in sales helps, but it's not the point. The right attitude, communication skills, and willingness to figure things out matter far more.



We assess candidates through a short video introduction rather than long application forms. If this sounds interesting, send us a 3 to 7 minute video answering:

1. A brief intro about yourself and what drives you

2. Your experience with talking to clients, selling, or any customer-facing work

3. What excites you about working at an AI company right now

4. How you approach learning something completely new

5. What you're looking for in your next role and where you see yourself long-term



No polish needed. We're looking for clarity, energy, and authenticity. Please don't read from a script.

Upload your video to Google Drive, Dropbox, or YouTube (unlisted) and share the link. Optionally include your CV or LinkedIn.



Please send everything to 
 are happy to answer any questions.



We are looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Remote Inside Sales Agent (Full-Time, PST Hours)
description:
**Work From Anywhere | Join a Fast-Growing Real Estate Investment Firm**



Are you a persuasive communicator who thrives in inside sales? Do you enjoy qualifying leads, setting high-quality appointments, and driving deals forward through consistent follow-up?



If you’re looking for a long-term remote career with a company that values growth, accountability, and integrity — this opportunity is for you.



About the Role

Position: Inside Sales Agent (ISA)

Location: Anywhere – 100% Remote

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM–5:00 PM Pacific Time

(Occasional weekend work up to 4 hours)

Work Hours: 40 hours/week



As an Inside Sales Agent, you’ll be the frontline sales professional responsible for handling inbound and outbound leads, qualifying motivated sellers, and setting appointments for our acquisitions team. You’ll play a critical role in driving revenue by ensuring only high-quality opportunities move forward.



You’ll work closely with a supportive, performance-driven team that values consistency, ownership, and continuous improvement.



Qualifications & Requirements 

* Minimum 6 months of experience as an Inside Sales Agent (REQUIRED)

* Experience handling high-volume inbound and outbound calls

* Background in real estate, wholesaling, acquisitions, or property sales is a strong plus

* Proven ability to qualify leads, uncover motivation, and handle objections

* Confident, professional, and persuasive phone presence

* Excellent English communication skills (clear, neutral accent preferred)

* Strong follow-up skills and ability to nurture leads over time

* Comfortable working with CRM systems, dialers, and lead management tools

* Highly organized, detail-oriented, and consistent with data entry and notes

* Self-motivated, reliable, and able to hit daily/weekly call and appointment targets

* Team-oriented mindset with a strong sense of accountability

* Positive attitude and genuine interest in building rapport and long-term relationships





Technical Requirements

* Reliable high-speed internet (minimum 50 Mbps) with backup connection

* Reliable laptop/desktop and smartphone

* Quiet, distraction-free workspace suitable for sales calls





About SV Ventures

SV Ventures is a California-based real estate investment firm specializing in residential fix-and-flip projects and new construction throughout the Bay Area. We manage the full lifecycle — acquisitions, design, renovations, and financing — and we’re growing rapidly.



Our culture is built on strong core values:

-Growth Mindset – We learn, adapt, and improve continuously

-Accountability – We take ownership and deliver results

-Relationships – We build trust through every interaction

-Transparency – We value honesty, integrity, and clear communication



If these values resonate with you, you’ll feel right at home here.



Compensation & Benefits

-Hourly Rate: $6–8/hour (based on experience)

-3th Month Pay Bonus (with the opportunity to earn beyond for exceptional performance)

-Property Sale Bonus: $50 per property sold (Average: 12–20 properties per year)

-Bi-weekly Pay

-Long-term, stable remote position with growth opportunities





How to Apply

Please submit the following:



1. Resume (PDF or Word format)

2. Screenshot of Internet Speed Test

3. Computer Specs (make, model, RAM, storage, year of manufacture)

4. 3-minute video (Loom or YouTube only) answering:

      -Tell us about yourself — your experience, education, and why you’re a strong fit for an Inside Sales Agent role

      -What do you believe are the most important qualities of a successful Inside Sales Agent?





Ready to grow with us?

Apply now and become part of a team that values your success as much as its own.



Join SV Ventures — where growth, accountability, and opportunity meet.

title: Video Editor – Short-Form Social (Instagram & TikTok)
description:
We're a small, mission-driven children's brand rooted in cultural representation, joy, and belonging. Everything we make — our products, our content, our community — is built around helping kids feel seen, celebrated, and proud of who they are. Our Instagram feed will tell you everything you need to know about our energy: warm, playful, emotional, and real.

We're looking for a video editor who gets us. Not someone who edits content — someone who can feel the story in raw footage and shape it into something that stops the scroll and earns the follow.



What you'll be doing:

Editing short-form video (15 seconds to 3 minutes) for Instagram Reels and TikTok — from raw footage of our products, community 
nts, and behind-the-scenes clips. You'll own the edit: clip selection, pacing, transitions, audio, and a soft CTA that feels native to our brand. Turnaround is typically 24–48 hours.



The style we're going for:

Before you apply, watch this: 

???? 
==

???? 



This is the quality, feel, and emotional tone we're building toward. Warm. Intentional. Scroll-stopping. If you watch it and immediately start thinking about how you'd approach it — you might be our person.



You're the right fit if:

- You have a strong portfolio of short-form edits that have actually grown accounts (followers, engagement, comments — show us the receipts)

- You understand what makes someone stop, watch, and share — and you build for that from the first frame

- You know CapCut (or similar) inside out and stay ahead of trends without chasing them blindly

- You're fast, communicative, and don't need hand-holding to deliver

- You genuinely care about brands with heart and a mission — this isn't just a gig to you



To apply, send us:

- 2–3 examples of short-form edits in a similar emotional or lifestyle style — your most relevant work, not your full portfolio

- One Instagram or TikTok account you've edited for (we want to see real-world results, not just clips)

- A short note telling us: why this kind of brand resonates with you, what you're looking for in a long-term creative partnership, and your typical availability (EST time)

- Your rate in CAD and weekly capacity 



Generic applications won't be reviewed. We want to hear your voice and see that you understand the kind of content we're building. Watch the reference video. Then tell us why you're the right fit.

- Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)

Note: More experienced CSMs earn between $1,800 and $2,500 after 6-12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $900+ additional monthly based on:

- Client retention rates

- Task completion metrics

- Quality of feedback

- Team collaboration

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise directly to your bank

- Tools access: We'll cover all the needed tools

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Regular feedback and skill development



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CSM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with client management.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio.



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Offshore Senior Bookkeeper
description:
Background of Company:



One Stop Tax Strategists is co-founded by two dynamic sisters Tiffany and Melanie, inspired by their father Byron, a CPA with over 30 years of experience. Our company specializes in creative tax planning, preparation, bookkeeping, and payroll for entrepreneurs around the USA. Our client base is made up of about 70% real estate investors, spread across multiple US states. We are committed to helping our clients pay the least tax legally possible, enabling them to fund their dreams.



Our mission is to bring peace to taxes and purpose to profits to help our clients & team live more.



To get a feel for who we are, check out our WEBSITE (www.osts.tax )!



The Best Applicant Will Be:

We are seeking a highly skilled bookkeeper with a minimum of 2 years of experience (U.S. tax experience as a bonus) who thrives in a professional, structured, and remote work environment. The ideal candidate is disciplined, detail-oriented, precise, and accountable, with a strong commitment to delivering high-quality service. We are looking for a grinder—someone who is hardworking, thorough, and dedicated, willing to go the extra mile to get the job done right. If you are a conscientious and reliable tax professional seeking a long-term opportunity to make an impact, we’d love to hear from you.



START DAY/TIME:

Soonest is preferred, but we understand if you need to start sometime in March or later. We are looking for the right person, not the first person.



ROLE & RESPONSIBILITIES

Have a minimum of 2 years of work in the bookkeeping or accounting field, and USA tax experience preferred, but not required.

Bookkeeping & Transaction Management

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records using QuickBooks Online (QBO), QuickBooks Desktop (QBD), and/or Excel. 

- Record, categorize, and reconcile financial transactions including income, expenses, journal entries, and transfers.

- Perform monthly, quarterly, and year-end reconciliations for bank accounts, credit cards, and loans.

- Complete basic accounting tasks such as updating financial records and reviewing bank and credit card statements.



Financial Reporting & Analysis

 - Prepare and review monthly and annual financial reports including Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow statements.

 - Generate additional financial reports for internal tea
mbers or management as needed.

 - Identify discrepancies, missing transactions, or unusual activity and resolve issues promptly.

 - Assist with year-end bookkeeping and tax preparation processes.

 - Maintain strict client confidentiality regarding financial records, tax information, and personal documents.



Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable & Payroll Support

 - Monitor accounts payable and accounts receivable activity to ensure accurate recording.

 - Track invoices, payments, and outstanding balances as needed.

 - Record and reconcile payroll transactions and employee-related expenses.



Systems, Accuracy & Quality Control

 - Ensure financial data is accurate, organized, and maintained according to defined accounting standards and procedures.

 - Maintain proper chart of accounts structure and ensure correct transaction categorization.

 - Utilize accounting and business tools such as QuickBooks, Excel, Outlook, Lacerte, and other software platforms (training provided as needed).

 -This role requires consistent, steady, and accurate work based on defined regulations and standards.



Team Collaboration & Remote Work Environment

 - Work effectively with supervisors and internal tea
mbers to complete assigned bookkeeping tasks.

 - Participate in weekly 1:1 meetings and daily team huddles.

 - Communicate with the internal team via Zoom, Zoom Chat, and
.

 - Manage multiple projects while maintaining organization and a sense of urgency in a fast-paced environment.

 - This is a 100% remote position, requiring a dedicated workspace, reliable computer equipment, and high-speed internet.



Pay & Benefits

 - This is a full-time position, with a base hourly rate ranging from $9–$15 USD, depending on experience.

      **After the first year, employees may be eligible for a performance-based bonus tied to company EBITDA.

      **Candidates with significant experience and exceptional qualifications may be considered for compensation outside of the listed range.

 - Benefits and compensation structure are negotiable, depending on how the employee prefers their pay to be structured.

     **The company plans to offer 13th month pay and a number of paid holidays, which will be discussed during the hiring process.



Core Values:

1. Growth - Embracing change and learning.

2. Integrity - Leading by example with honesty.

3. Fun - Fostering a light-hearted and enjoyable workplace.

4. Vitality - Living purposefully and embracing each 
nt.

5. Teamwork - Unified commitment to our mission and success.

6. Ownership - Taking responsibility and delivering meaningful results.



Next Steps:

1. Complete the Predictive Index survey HERE: (


/bo/z6c/OneStopOffshoreSeniorAccountant_Jul2025_232954

)

       **The survey will allow you to tell us more about yourself.

       **It is incredibly easy and only takes about 6 minutes to complete.

       **Please take it on a desktop/laptop because a smartphone screen will be too small.



2. Send me your favorite animal and dessert to eat



Thank you for your time and interest!

title: Finance Manager CFO accountant – E-Commerce (Dropshipping, Shopify, Stripe, Xero, QBO)  Hong Kong
description:
About Us:

We are a high-revenue dropshipping company managing 10 webshops, operating internationally with millions in revenue across multiple currencies. We run our stores on Shopify, process payments through Stripe/Shopify Payments, and work closely with a Chinese agent who provides daily order fulfillment and product pricing.



(Our company is based in Hong Kong, so experience with Hong Kong accounting practices is an added advantage.)



We are looking for a finance professional who understands the financial operations of dropshipping, including daily supplier cost verification, reconciliation of order payouts, and multi-currency expense tracking. 





Key Responsibilities:

-Financial Reporting: Use Xero or QBO to prepare monthly/daily,weekly profit & loss statements, revenue breakdowns, and cost analysis to track business performance.

-Payment & Order Reconciliation: Verify daily Stripe and Shopify Payments payouts and match them against actual order revenue in Shopify.

-Supplier Cost Verification: Check daily product prices from our Chinese agent, ensuring they match our internal calculations before approving payments.

-Expense Management:  Categorize, and reconcile all expenses, including supplier payments and operational costs.

- Multi-Currency Management: Handle USD, EUR, SEK, and other currency transactions, ensuring accurate exchange rate application and tracking foreign exchange fees.

- Supplier & Logistics Payments: Oversee and process payments to our Chinese agent and suppliers, ensuring correct pricing, volume discounts, and delivery costs.

- Payroll & Team Payouts: Manage contractor payments and team salaries, ensuring everything aligns with agreed terms.

Cost Optimization: Identify ways to improve profitability by analyzing supplier costs, payment processing fees, and operational expenses.

- Financial Auditing: Conduct periodic checks on financial transactions, ensuring compliance, accuracy, and best practices.

Automation & Tech: Leverage tools like Xero, Dext, Expensify, Shopify, and Stripe to streamline financial processes and reporting.





Requirements:

-Experience in e-commerce finance management, specifically dropshipping (Shopify & Stripe required).

-Knowledge of Xero/QBO (or similar accounting software) for bookkeeping, reconciliation, and reporting.

-Experience o track expenses, invoices, and financial records.

-Familiarity with working with Chinese suppliers, including daily price verification, invoice reconciliation, and supplier payment processing.

-Ability to reconcile Shopify orders, Stripe payouts, and supplier payments efficiently.-

Multi-currency experience – understanding of exchange rates and international payment reconciliation.

-Strong analytical and attention-to-detail skills to verify order pricing and supplier invoices.

-Excellent English communication skills and the ability to liaise with suppliers, teams, and financial institutions.

-Previous experience in high-volume e-commerce transactions is a must.





What We Offer:

- Competitive salary based on experience.

- Work with a fast-growing international dropshipping company.

- Opportunities for growth into leadership and management roles.

- Flexible working hours (but availability for urgent finance matters is needed).





How to Apply:

To apply, submit your resume and a detailed cover letter explaining your experience with dropshipping financial management, Xero, QBO, Shopify, Stripe, and supplier cost reconciliation. The more details you provide (past job experience, testimonials, relevant skills), the better we can assess your fit.





Fun Challenge:

Include the word “GREEN” somewhere in your application as our secret handshake!

title: Amazon PPC Manager
description:
Urgent Hiring: Amazon PPC Manager

Reports To: CEO / Amazon Optimization Manager

Work Hours: Philippines Daytime Work Hours



Company Vision

We want to work with you to grow our company while helping you to become a superstar in your field. We value problem solvers, go-getters, and people with opinions who want to make an impact. You will be on the leading edge of Amazon and online strategies, continually improving your knowledge in the pursuit of helping us grow our business.



At the same time, you will be working with a company that values community & family—both internally and customer-facing. Our mission is to delight kids & parents with creative craft kits and related products. We are 100% focused on that mission and want you to be there on the ride with us!



That’s where you come in as our next Amazon PPC Manager.



Role Purpose

The Amazon PPC Manager owns the performance of all paid advertising on Amazon across our catalog. This person leads the strategy, execution, and optimization of all Sponsored Product, Sponsored Brand, and Sponsored Display campaigns to drive discoverability, revenue growth, and profitable scaling.



You will leverage Scale Insights daily—using advanced features like automation flows, keyword scoring, search term mining, and campaign-level rule logic—to drive high-impact decisions. Your ability to move beyond manual optimization and harness automation for scale is critical to success in this role.



What Success Looks Like

You consistently drive performance improvements using both manual and automated techniques, with Scale Insights as your core control panel. You own automation flows that intelligently adjust bids, pause underperforming targets, surface search term goldmines, and scale winners. You don’t just use Scale Insights—you master it.



You maintain a proactive and adaptive PPC strategy aligned with the catalog lifecycle, launch timing, and seasonality. Through frequent reporting, experimentation, and coordination with SEO, creative, and ops, you ensure campaigns support profitable, long-term growth.



Primary Objectives

Maximize profitable growth through advanced automation using Scale Insights

Own and optimize campaign architecture to drive ROI across all product stages

Partner cross-functionally for ad-aligned launches, creatives, and keyword strategy

Test, measure, and iterate to continuously improve CTR, CVR, and ROAS



Regular Work Activities

Monitor and refine SP/SB/SD campaigns daily through Scale Insights dashboards

Execute bid adjustments, search term mining, negative pruning

Build and optimize automation rules and flows in Scale Insights

Audit underperforming ad groups and apply automated corrective logic

Set up rule-based triggers for seasonal budget shifts and event-based bidding

Conduct A/B testing for headlines, images, placements

Weekly reporting with commentary using Scale Insights and custom dashboards

Work with SEO to align ad keyword targeting with organic ranking efforts

Collaborate with creative to ensure ad assets match campaign goals

Track budget utilization and reallocate funds based on real-time data

Maintain documentation and SOPs for all Scale Insights workflows

Guide PPC Assistants on implementing and QA’ing automation rules

Troubleshoot disapproved or underperforming ads

Flag inventory and pricing concerns affecting campaign viability

Maintain performance calendars for launches, promos, seasonality



Key Skills

Advanced knowledge of Scale Insights (automation, keyword scoring, flows)

Deep understanding of Amazon Ads (SP, SB, SD)

Strategic and analytical mindset with strong Excel/Google Sheets skills

Mastery in keyword match types, campaign structure, and budget management

Proven record of improving CTR, CVR, and ROAS

Excellent reporting and data storytelling skills

Detail-oriented with strong project tracking ability

Comfortable owning results, fixing issues, and moving fast

Strong communication across SEO, creative, and leadership teams

Passionate about learning and applying new ad techniques



People Contacts and Interactions

SEO Manager: Weekly coordination for keyword and ranking overlap

Creative Team: Weekly/as needed for ad assets, testing needs

Operations: Weekly or ad-hoc for stock, pricing, launch strategy

CEO / Leadership: Weekly/monthly reporting, performance reviews



Role Requirements

3+ years managing Amazon PPC campaigns

Experience using Scale Insights (must demonstrate real automation flow use cases, not just dashboards)

Proven success managing TACoS, ACOS, ROAS in high-SKU environments

Experience launching campaigns for new products and scaling mature ones

High proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

Familiarity with keyword research, ranking tools, and performance reporting

Experience with automation strategy, not just manual optimization

Self-starter with high personal accountability and ownership

Bonus: Experience in creative ad testing and headline writing



How to Apply: In the subject, share your favorite toy as a kid.

title: WordPress Developer Needed to Build Senior Care Website
description:
???? Hi! I'm the owner of EverCare Placement — a senior care advisory service based in Arizona, USA. I help families find the right senior living options at no cost to them. I'm not a technical person, so I need someone patient, communicative, and reliable to help me build my website. I already have a complete design ready to go!

WordPress Developer Needed – Build Website from Completed HTML Prototype (Elementor)



We are looking for a reliable WordPress developer to build a website using WordPress + Elementor based on HTML prototype files that already contain the full design, layout, and copy.



Most of the work is already completed. Your job will primarily be recreating the pages inside WordPress/Elementor and connecting the functionality.



This project is for EverCare Senior Placement, a senior care navigation company based in Arizona.



You will receive a detailed build instruction document explaining exactly how the website should be constructed.



The HTML files already include:



• All page layouts

• All text and copy

• Section structure

• Color scheme

• Page hierarchy

• Navigation structure



Your job is to replicate these pages inside WordPress using Elementor.



The instruction document outlines every step of the build process. 



evercare-build-instructions



Scope of Work





Build a 9-page website in WordPress using Elementor.



Pages include:



• Home

• Services

• How It Works

• The EverCare Process

• Resources

• About

• Team

• Learning Center

• Contact



Tasks include:



• Set up WordPress with recommended plugins

• Build the header and footer globally in Elementor

• Recreate each page based on the HTML prototypes

• Configure the navigation menu

• Install and configure the contact form

• Ensure the website is mobile responsive

• Implement basic SEO settings

• Optimize images and performance

• Provide a staging link for review before launch



Technology Stack



Required experience with:



• WordPress

• Elementor

• WPForms or Contact Form 7

• Basic SEO plugin setup (Yoast or RankMath)

• Mobile responsive design

• Performance optimization



Helpful but not required:



• Elementor Theme Builder

• WordPress speed optimization

• Security plugins



Project Assets Provided



You will receive:



• 9 completed HTML prototype files

• Logo and brand assets

• Color palette and typography guidelines

• Detailed build instructions document

• Page-by-page implementation guide



The build instructions walk through exactly how to recreate the site. 



evercare-build-instructions





Your role is to faithfully recreate the HTML prototypes inside WordPress/Elementor.



Compensation



This is a fixed project estimated at $26–$50/hour depending on experience and timeline.



If the project goes well, we will have ongoing WordPress work and landing page builds.



To Apply



Please include the following:



Links to 3 WordPress websites you built using Elementor



Your expected timeline to complete a 9-page build



Your monthly or project rate



Confirmation that you are comfortable building a site from existing HTML prototypes



Bonus if you include screenshots of Elementor pages you built.



Project Timeline



We would like the initial build completed within 7–10 days.



Long Term Opportunity



If this project goes well, we will have ongoing WordPress work, including:



• Landing pages

• SEO pages

• Learning center / blog pages

• Funnel builds



We prefer building a long-term working relationship with a reliable developer.



If you apply, please start your message with the word “EverCare” so we know you read the full job post.

title: Stripe Checkout Developer Needed for On-Site Subscription Plan Selector
description:
I’m looking for a developer to help me build a custom Stripe subscription checkout on my website.



I do not want customers redirected to a separate Stripe-hosted payment page. I want the full experience to happen on my website.



The flow I want is:



Customer lands on my checkout page



Customer fills out a few basic form fields



Customer chooses a service plan



Based on that selection, the correct Stripe subscription setup is used



Customer enters payment info directly on my website



Payment is collected immediately



Subscription is created successfully in Stripe



I already have products set up in Stripe, but I need help with the actual implementation.



What I need built:



A custom plan selector on my website



Stripe Payment Element or custom Stripe checkout embedded on-site



Backend logic to create the correct Stripe Checkout Session based on selected plan



Subscription setup using the correct Stripe recurring prices



Basic order summary / selected plan display



Proper error handling for failed payments



A success / confirmation page



Webhook setup so I can reliably know when a subscription/payment is successful



Ideal experience:



Strong Stripe experience



Has built subscription checkout flows before



Experience with Stripe Checkout Sessions



Experience with Stripe Payment Element



Experience with Stripe webhooks



Comfortable with frontend + backend implementation



Bonus if you have experience with service business checkout flows



Please send:



Examples of similar Stripe projects you’ve completed



What stack/frameworks you’ve worked with



How you would approach this build



Estimated timeline



Your hourly rate or fixed price



Important:

Please only apply if you have real experience with Stripe subscriptions, not just basic one-time payment forms.



Scope note:

I want a working, clean, simple version first. It does not need to be fancy. It just needs to work properly and keep the customer on my website for the full checkout process.



Here’s a shorter version too, if you want something more direct for OnlineJobs or Upwork:



Short Version:



Need a developer to build a custom on-site Stripe subscription checkout for my website.



I already have products in Stripe. I need help building:



plan selector on my site



embedded Stripe payment form



recurring subscription checkout



backend session creation



webhook setup



success page



I do not want a redirect to a Stripe-hosted checkout page. I want the payment form directly on my site.



Must have experience with:



Stripe subscriptions



Stripe Payment Element



Checkout Sessions



Webhooks



Please send examples of similar work, your rate, and how you’d approach the project.

title: Facebook Ads Manager | Local Lead Generation | Chiropractic
description:
About the Role:

We are hiring a highly organized, technical Media Buyer to execute our advertising playbook for chiropractic clinics.



We don’t do "flashy" brand awareness or complex creative experiments. We use a hands-off media buying approach that relies on cutting-edge algorithms and proven systems. This role is for a technical specialist who ensures the "machine" runs smoothly—from the Meta ad set to the GoHighLevel (GHL) conversion event. You will be the "eyes" on our accounts, ensuring lead flow is consistent and data is accurate.



What You’ll Do:



Execute the Meta Playbook: Launch, manage, and monitor local lead generation campaigns within a 25-mile radius of our clinics.

Master GHL Tracking: Ensure Pixels, CAPI, and conversion events are firing 100?curately so the algorithm has the data it needs.

Manage the Conversion Path: Build and split-test high-converting landing pages inside GHL that look professional and clinical.

Performance Monitoring: Analyze ad data (CPC, CTR, Lead Quality) daily.

Creative Alerting: Notify the team when a creative or angle is showing signs of fatigue so our Video Editor can prepare a refresh.

Daily Quality Control: Monitor lead flow to ensure we are sending high-intent patients, not "junk," to our clients.

Audience Maintenance: Use GHL tags and appointment events to keep custom and lookalike audiences up to date.



Requirements:

2+ years of professional Meta Media Buying experience.

Proven Track Record in Local Lead Gen (Medical, Chiro, or Dental is a major bonus).

title: VA Cold Caller to Non Profits
description:
About the Role

The Strategic Giving Partnership (SGP) — directly benefits nonprofit organizations by enabling their existing donors to give 20–30% more without any new donors required.



We are hiring a confident, professional Virtual Assistant to make outbound cold calls to nonprofit development directors across USA. Your job is to introduce this free opportunity, handle objections, and book a short discovery call between the nonprofit and our advisory team. This is a high-value, relationship-focused role — not a high-pressure sales role.



What You're Presenting (Know This Cold)

The core message is simple: Structural Tax Advisors runs a pre-approved nonprofit list. When a high-net-worth business owner creates a Strategic Giving Partnership, they choose nonprofits from that list to receive donations. Because the tax structure generates 30–60% tax savings for the donor (vs. 5–10% from a standard deduction), donors can afford to give 20–30% more — while actually paying less out of pocket.



Joining the list is completely free. There is zero management burden on the nonprofit. All compliance, IRS documentation, and filings are handled by Structural Tax Advisors.



Your only job on the call: explain this opportunity clearly and book a 20-minute discovery call.



What You'll Do

• Make outbound cold calls to nonprofit development directors to Public 501(c)(3) organizations list provided

• Follow the provided call script to introduce the Structural Tax Advisors nonprofit partnership program

• Handle common objections (costs money, too complicated, sounds too good to be true)

• Schedule qualified discovery calls between interested nonprofit directors and our advisory team

• Log all call dispositions, notes, and follow-up tasks in our CRM (GHL)

• Send follow-up
s after calls using the provided templates

• Report daily call metrics: dials, conversations, and appointments set

• Attend brief weekly check-ins via Zoom or Slack



Who We're Looking For

Must-Have

• Excellent spoken English — clear, calm, and persuasive on the phone

• 2+ years of cold calling, outbound sales, or appointment-setting experience

• Comfortable calling executive-level contacts (directors, CEOs, development officers)

• Able to explain a slightly nuanced concept in plain, compelling terms

• Reliable internet, headset, and a quiet professional workspace

• Strong CRM discipline — logs every call accurately



Nice-to-Have

• Experience calling nonprofits, associations, or foundations

• Background in financial services, wealth management, or donor relations

• Familiarity with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or similar CRM platforms

• Comfortable with Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, Gmail)



Compensation & Schedule (PST timezone)

Pay: Competitive hourly rate in USD, based on experience

• Entry level: $3-5/hr





Schedule: Must have overlap with Los Angeles business hours (Pacific Time)

• Minimum 4 hours/day during 9 AM–5 PM PT

• Part-time (20 hrs/week) or full-time (40 hrs/week) available

• Performance bonuses available for strong appointment-setting track records



How to Apply

To be considered, you must submit a Loom video application. No exceptions.



• Record a 2–3 minute Loom video introducing yourself

• In the video, deliver a brief cold call opener as if you're calling a nonprofit development director for the first time — use the following premise: you're calling to introduce a free program that helps their existing donors give 20–30% more

• Submit your Loom link + resume to: 
 or inbox me here



We're looking for people who sound natural, confident, and professional — not scripted or robotic. Show us your voice.

 to uphold compliance.





Your Skills

Detail Obsessed & Decisive: You thrive on both the meticulous detail work and the larger mission of protecting digital rights and brand integrity.

Flexible and Resilient: Adaptable to various responsibilities, from content moderation to legal takedowns and direct client interaction.

Must-Haves

Key Competencies: Strong attention to detail, the ability to work well in teams, and dependability. Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills. Ability to handle sensitive (adult) content professionally, maintaining the highest levels of 



confidentiality. Analytical, data-driven problem-solving approach. Comfortable working independently in a fast-paced environment.



What We Offer



Fully Remote Role

A Culture of Innovation and Learning

A Vibrant Startup Environment with a supportive, diverse team

Company-Sponsored Health Insurance – fully paid

title: MARKETING MANAGER (Head of Marketing)
description:
Location: Remote, opportunity to work in offices and business travel

Company: Diversified Group with operations in Australia, China, and Hong Kong

Industries: Professional Services, Agriculture, Manufacturing

Job Type: Full-time, Permanent

Salary: Highly competitive package commensurate with experience

________________________________________

About Us

We are a dynamic and diversified group running three distinct businesses across the Asia-Pacific region:

1. A Professional Accountancy & Advisory Firm with offices in Sydney, Shenzhen, and Hong Kong.

2. Strawberry Farms in Victoria and Queensland, Australia.

3. A Gadgets Manufacturing Facility in Huizhou, China.

We are now seeking an experienced and strategic Marketing Manager (Head of Marketing) to build, lead, and unify our marketing efforts across all three businesses. This is a high-impact role for a marketing leader who thrives on variety, strategy, and driving growth in diverse industries.

________________________________________

The Opportunity

You will be the first dedicated marketing leader in our organization, stepping into a green-field opportunity to design and implement a cohesive yet tailored marketing strategy for three different B2B and B2C businesses. You will inherit and lead a small, talented team of content writers, a designer, and a marketing coordinator.

Your mission is to transform our marketing from tactical execution to a strategic, data-driven function that delivers measurable ROI and supports ambitious growth targets.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Strategy & Planning: Develop and execute comprehensive, integrated marketing plans for each business unit, aligned with their specific commercial goals.

• Team Leadership & Coordination: Manage, mentor, and coordinate our existing marketing team (2 content writers, 1 web designer, 1 marketing coordinator). Foster collaboration and ensure seamless workflow across all projects.

• Multi-Market Execution: Oversee all marketing activities across Australia, Mainland China, and Hong Kong, ensuring cultural and regional relevance.

• Channel Management: Spearhead digital marketing (SEO, SEM, social media,
), content strategy, and traditional marketing channels appropriate for each industry.

• Budget & ROI: Own the marketing budget for all three entities. Implement tracking, analytics, and reporting systems to measure performance and demonstrate clear ROI.

• Brand Stewardship: Maintain and evolve brand positioning for each company, ensuring consistency and strength in all markets.

• Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with the business owners, sales teams, and operations managers in each region to ensure marketing strategies are grounded in commercial reality.

________________________________________

Who You Are

• A strategic thinker with a "player-coach" mindset—able to develop high-level plans while being hands-on in execution.

• An excellent communicator and leader who can inspire a remote team and build trust with stakeholders across different cultures.

• Naturally curious and analytical, with a passion for understanding diverse industries and customer segments.

• Proactive, organized, and results-obsessed.

________________________________________

Requirements

• 7+ years of progressive marketing experience, with at least 3 years in a managerial role leading strategies and teams.

• Proven portfolio demonstrating experience in both B2B and B2C marketing. Experience in any of our industries (professional services, agriculture/food & beverage, manufacturing/tech) is a significant advantage.

• Expertise in multi-channel digital marketing, including SEO/SEM, social media, and content marketing.

• Strong analytical skills with experience using data and tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Meta Business Suite) to drive decisions.

• Impeccable English communication skills, both written and verbal. Proficiency in Mandarin is a strong plus but not mandatory.

• Experience working in or with companies across different geographical markets (APAC experience preferred).

• Experience managing remote teams and working effectively in a fully remote setting.

• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field.

________________________________________

What We Offer

• A Leadership Role: Be the foundational marketing leader in a growing group with real autonomy and impact.

• Diverse Challenge: Escape the monotony of a single industry. Apply your skills across three fascinating and different businesses.

• Professional Growth: This role reports directly to the business owner and offers significant scope for career advancement as the companies grow.

• Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere in the Philippines with a stable internet connection.

• Competitive Compensation: A salary package that rewards expertise and results, plus opportunities for performance-based bonuses.

• Supportive Environment: You will have the full backing of the ownership team and access to the resources needed to succeed.

________________________________________

How to Apply

Ready to build something exceptional? Please send your application to 
 with the subject line: "Application: Marketing Manager - [Your Name]".

Your application must include:

1. Your updated CV/Resume.

2. A cover letter that addresses:

o Why you are interested in managing marketing for three different businesses.

o A brief example of a successful multi-channel marketing campaign you have led (mention the channels and key results).

o Your salary expectation.

3. (Optional but highly valued) Links to your portfolio, LinkedIn profile, or any relevant case studies.

Applications without a cover letter will not be considered.

We are an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity in our team.

title: PRODUCT CREATIVE DESIGNER
description:
Job Title: Product Creative Designer (Innovative Gadgets & Lighting)



About Us: 

At Sunrich Manufacturing Ltd., we believe in designing products that do more than just function—they connect, delight, and become a cherished part of everyday life. We specialize in creating innovative gadgets and lighting solutions, with a growing focus on the gadgets and lighting product industry, where safety, emotion, and design intersect. Join our growing design team and play a pivotal role in shaping the future of our product lines. 



Your Mission: 

As a Product Creative Designer, you will be the creative engine for our new product development. You will transform market insights and abstract ideas into tangible, desirable products—from the first spark of an idea on a sketchpad to a production-ready 3D model. You'll bridge the gap between creative vision and manufacturing reality, ensuring our designs are not only beautiful but also feasible, ergonomic, and emotionally resonant. 



Key Responsibilities: 



Lead Ideation & Concept Development:?Drive the early-stage creative process through market research, trend analysis, and user-centric thinking to identify new product opportunities. 



Visualize & Communicate:?Rapidly generate and communicate ideas through freehand sketching, mood boards, and storyboards that tell the product's story. 



Develop 3D Models & Renders:?Create detailed, high-quality 3D models and photorealistic renders that define product form, function, ergonomics, and materiality. 



Collaborate to Realize Designs:?Work hand-in-hand with Senior Designers, Product Development, and Engineering teams to refine concepts, overcome challenges, and ensure design integrity from prototype to production. 



Own the Design-to-Production Journey:?Take responsibility for shepherding your designs through the entire process, including mold design reviews and sample approval, to ensure a seamless transition to mass production. 



Manage Multiple Projects:?Successfully support several projects at once, maintaining high-quality standards, meeting deadlines, and adhering to brand guidelines. 



What You Bring (Requirements): 



A minimum of 2 years of professional experience in product or industrial design. 



An?outstanding portfolio?demonstrating your full design process: concept sketches, 3D visualizations, and photographs of final products. Experience with consumer, gadget, or lighting-related products is a significant advantage. 



A strong conceptual thinker with the ability to articulate ideas through compelling hand sketches and visual storytelling. 



Passionate and energetic about creating products that matter, with a keen understanding of safety and ergonomics, especially in the gadgets product space. 



High proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator) and 3D modeling software (e.g., SolidWorks, Fusion 360). 3D rendering skills (Keyshot, etc.) are a strong plus. 



A proven track record of reliability, meeting deadlines, and excellent communication skills within a collaborative team environment. 



Why Join Sunrich? 



End-to-End Ownership:?See your ideas come to life and hold a physical product you designed in your hands. 



Impactful Work:?Design purposeful products that will be loved and used by families every day. 



Collaborative Culture:?Be a key part of a passionate, growing team where your voice is heard and your creativity is valued. 



Professional Growth:?Develop your skills across the entire product lifecycle in a dynamic manufacturing environment. 



How to Apply: 



If you are ready to design the next generation of beloved products, we would love to see your work. 



Please send your application to 
 Address] with the subject line:?"I want to be your next Product Creative Designer." 



Your application must include: 



A cover letter telling us why you're a perfect fit for Sunrich. 



Your resume. 



A link to your portfolio or recent work samples.

title: YouTube Video Editor (Long Form Content, Fast Turnaround)
description:
Job Overview



We are looking for a skilled YouTube video editor to join our team and help produce high quality long form YouTube videos.



These videos are typically educational style content and range from about 10 to 15 minutes long. The editing needs to be engaging, clean, and optimized for retention.



This role is for someone who understands YouTube pacing, storytelling, and viewer attention. If you are just cutting clips together with basic transitions, this will not be a good fit.



Turnaround speed and quality are both extremely important for this position.



Core Responsibilities



Edit long form YouTube videos that are typically 10 to 15 minutes long.



Add engaging elements such as:

• Jump cuts

• Zooms and motion effects

• On screen text and graphics

• B roll when necessary

• Sound effects when appropriate

• Clean pacing that keeps viewers engaged



Videos must be edited in a style that keeps retention high and maintains viewer attention.



Turnaround Time Requirement



You must be able to deliver a fully edited 10 to 15 minute YouTube video within 24 to 48 hours after receiving the raw footage.



This is a strict requirement.



Speed does not replace quality. The final video must still be high quality and polished.



If you cannot consistently meet this turnaround time, this position will not be a good fit.



Requirements



Proven experience editing YouTube videos

Strong understanding of YouTube pacing and retention

Ability to edit long form videos (10 to 15 minutes)

Strong attention to detail

Reliable internet connection for transferring files

Ability to meet tight deadlines consistently



Bonus Skills



Experience editing educational or business content

Understanding of YouTube retention strategies

Motion graphics experience



Application Instructions



To make sure applicants actually read the entire job description, please follow the instructions below.



Send 2 to 3 YouTube videos you personally edited that are between 10 and 15 minutes long.



Briefly explain what your role was in editing those videos.



Confirm that you can consistently deliver a 10 to 15 minute edited video within 24 to 48 hours after receiving footage.



Start your application with the sentence:

“Fast editing wins on YouTube.”



Applications that do not include this sentence will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media & Content Manager
description:
***At Polaris, we’re on the lookout for a driven, detail-oriented, and marketing-savvy Marketing and Acquisitions Assistant to join our world-class team. If you thrive in fast-paced environments, love the idea of being the operational backbone of a company’s marketing engine, and have strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel, content creation, CRM systems, and social media, this role is for you.



***About us:

Polaris is a consulting agency with a bold mission: To help 1 million Founders to leverage time, reclaim freedom, and scale without sacrifice. We’re the only firm blending coaching and done-for-you services through a hybrid model — empowering our clients with strategic delegation, streamlined operations, and scalable systems. 



***Who we are looking for:

The ideal candidate is a detail-oriented, creative and dependable team player with experience working as a part of a high performing team and someone with a strong background in social media and content strategy.

You have a proven track record of planning, creating and executing engaging content in the online education and high-ticket service space (i.e. Coaches, agencies, advisors). Leading to increased visibility, higher engagement and creating content that convert followers into leads. 



In addition to consistent content output, it is expected that you’ll display a high level of proactiveness towards improving the management and sharing of content, maximizing the use of current tools or materials of the organization in a smart way and working closely with the Founder as a key part of the team. 



***Key Responsibilities

Content management:

- Create content that aligns with current trends and industry best practices, while managing content calendars to ensure posts go out consistently and on time.

- Collaborate with the leadership team to ensure content reflects key brand messages and marketing goals.

- Set up and manage tools like website domains, business
s, text messaging, and Google profiles, and keep marketing automations and workflows running smoothly.



Video editing:

- Apply video edits such as cuts/transitions, audio overlays, cinematic inserts and other edits that align with the brand and content goals.

- Create engaging short-form reels for platforms such as Instagram and TikTok

- Assist in editing long form videos for podcast interviews and youtube. 

- Create eye catching thumbnails

- Audience Management and prospecting:

- Send connection requests, monitor, respond to, send and engage with comments, messages, and mentions on social media platforms to build meaningful connections and foster a positive brand image.

- Ensure the contact database is regularly updated and accurately organized, while segmenting
 lists to enable targeted and effective communication



CRM Workflows

- Efficiently manage client relationships through customized CRM workflows

Tracking leads in real time, automating follow-ups, and syncing seamlessly with your favorite tools.

- Monitor KPIs in real time to refine strategies and ensure every campaign, workflow, and funnel delivers measurable ROI.



Tracking and reporting:

- Generate regular reports and provide analytics on content,
, and campaign performance.

- Monitoring and reporting on paid media performance by tracking metrics such as CPM, CPL, leads generated, and CPA.

- Overseeing and monitoring pipeline and opportunities, ensuring that leads are effectively tracked, followed up on, and moved through the stages



RESULTS (KPIs)

- 100% on time publication of content according to content calendar

- Minimize response time towards audience engagements and inquiries

- Increase overall social media engagement, audience growth and lead generation

- Consistent and accurate reporting of content and marketing performance metrics



SKILLS REQUIRED:

- Proficient in using video editing tools like Capcut, Descript, Davinci Resolve

- Ability to edit graphics using tools like Canva and Photoshop

- Proficient in using CRMs like Active Campaign, GoHighLevel and Clickfunnels

- Experience in Google Workspace (Gmail, GDrive, Docs, Sheets)

title: Social Media Strategist + Content Creator (Luxury Local Brand)
description:
Light Up Your Holidays | Chicagoland | Woman-Owned | Indoor + Outdoor Holiday Lighting



Light Up Your Holidays is a premier, woman-owned holiday lighting and décor company serving the Chicagoland community since 2001. We create high-end lighting displays that elevate homes, businesses, and entire neighborhoods - and we’re ready for our social media presence to match the level of our work.



We’re looking for a social media strategist + creator who knows how to build massive engagement, views, and community collaboration - not just “post consistently.”



We already have the magic: stunning installs, premium clients, a powerful mission, and a mountain of photo + video content. We also leverage AI tools (including ChatGPT) to support writing and output.

Now we need your creative vision and execution to turn it into a content engine people can’t stop watching and sharing.



Who You Are

You’re not just a creator — you’re a strategic content architect.

You’ve worked on large national brand social media (or at that level) and understand what drives algorithmic performance without sacrificing authenticity.



You know how to:



Build content that hooks fast

Make storytelling feel real (not cheesy)

Turn everyday footage into must-watch video

Create a community that feels connected to the brand



You’re highly visual, self-driven, and obsessed with results.



What You’ll Do

1) Social Media Strategy + Content Execution

Develop weekly + monthly content strategy aligned with our brand voice and business priorities

Create and publish content across platforms (Instagram, TikTok,
, YouTube Shorts as needed)

Design content series + recurring formats (so we’re not reinventing every week)

Create strong CTAs that drive saves, shares, comments, DMs, and bookings



2) Hook + Viral Content Development

Hooks are EVERYTHING here. You should be excellent at developing:



High-retention opening lines + visuals

Trend-informed content that still feels premium + on-brand

“Stop-the-scroll” patterns and storytelling arcs



We are specifically looking for someone who can bring advanced creative tools and techniques to elevate output.



3) AI-Powered Content Expansion

We want AI used intelligently — to scale and sharpen content while keeping it authentic.

You will:



Leverage AI tools to enhance editing speed, creative concepts, and content variations

Repurpose assets into multiple formats

“Supersize” our content production while maintaining a real, high-end look



4) Brand Storytelling + Community Collaboration

Pull the story out of the work (before/after, transformation, behind-the-scenes, client reactions)

Create audience connection through authentic narrative + brand personality

Engage with followers and build community momentum

Generate collaborative content ideas with our audience



5) WordPress Website Support

We want you as our one go-to creative + designer, including:



WordPress content updates

Landing pages and/or site refreshes as needed

Portfolio / gallery updates using our photo + video assets



What We’re Looking For



? Required:



Experience managing or creating for major/national brand social media

Proven ability to drive engagement + views (real examples required)

Strong short-form video editing skills

Excellent creative instincts + taste (luxury vibe matters)

Strong communication and follow-through

WordPress experience



???? Bonus points:



Motion graphics experience

UGC-style editing

Experience in luxury home services, design, architecture, lifestyle or events

Photography or videography skillset

Experience building content calendars + creative direction



About Our Business

We don’t just sell a product — we create a feeling.



We offer services year-round including:



Holiday lighting (residential + commercial)

Indoor/outdoor seasonal décor

Permanent architectural lighting

Bistro lighting and outdoor ambiance lighting



This is a creative playground — with real budget, real assets, and a brand worth building.



Compensation

Hourly pay (based on experience)

Plus performance-based success commissions tied to results



This starts part-time and is designed to move into full-time for the right person.



How To Apply

Please submit:



Your resume

Examples of your work (links, reels, campaigns, accounts)

To jump ahead in the interview process: send a 2–10 minute video introducing yourself and answering:



What national brand(s) have you worked with (or at that level)?

What results have you driven (views, engagement, growth)?

Why are you interested in Light Up Your Holidays?

What would you bring to this role that others won’t?

title: Software Developer
description:
***PLEASE READ ON HOW TO APPLY***



Job Title: Software Developer

Location: Remote | Philippines based ONLY

Salary Range: Php 180,000 per month

A MUST: Minimum of 5 years of solid experience



We’re looking for talented Software Developers to join our remote-first team. In this role, you’ll be responsible for

building and maintaining responsive, high-performing full- stack web applications using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and

Supabase. 



Our ideal candidate writes clean, maintainable code, takes ownership of their work, and thrives in a fast-paced

startup environment where autonomy, communication, and craftsmanship are valued.



Key Responsibilities

- Design, develop, and maintain web applications using TypeScript, React, and Next.js.

- Work with Supabase (PostgreSQL) to design, query, and optimise relational database schemas.

- Integrate third-party APIs, including reading, understanding, and applying API documentation.

- Implement responsive, accessible, and performant user interfaces with Tailwind CSS.

- Utilise AI-powered tools (e.g. Cursor, Claude, and similar) to accelerate development while

maintaining high code quality and exercising sound engineering judgment over AI-generated output.

- Collaborate with other developers and/or stakeholders to refine requirements, propose technical solutions, and deliver features on agreed timelines.

- Work with background jobs and scheduled tasks using Inngest (or similar services) for cron-like and event-driven workflows.

- Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve issues across the stack, including in production environments.

- Produce clear technical documentation for features, architectural decisions, and processes.

- Communicate proactively and clearly within a remote team, including written updates and participation in online meetings across UK-Philippines time zones.



Must-Have Skills:

- Strong proficiency in TypeScript, React, and Next.js

- Experience with Supabase or relational databases (PostgreSQL)

- Ability to read and integrate third-party API documentation

- Strong understanding of Tailwind CSS and responsive design principles

- Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and modern development workflows

- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively in a remote environment

- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

- Comfortable using AI-assisted development tools while maintaining engineering judgment and security best practices



Nice-to-Have Skills

- Experience with React Native and mobile development tools (Expo, Xcode, Android Studio)

- Experience with Inngest or similar background job / cron orchestration tools

- Familiarity with Vercel serverless and edge functions



???? Tech Stack



Primary:

- TypeScript

- React

- Next.js

- Tailwind CSS

- Supabase (PostgreSQL)



Secondary / Bonus:

- React Native

- Expo

- Python



Tools & Platforms:

- Git / GitHub

- Vercel

- Supabase

- Inngest

- Standard remote collaboration tools (Slack/Teams, Jira/Linear or equivalent)



***PLEASE READ ON HOW TO APPLY***



How to Apply:

To apply for this role, please submit a link to your resume and a brief Loom video (max 2 minutes) introducing yourself and highlighting your skills relevant to the role. In your video, please address the following:

- A short introduction of yourself and why you're interested in this role.

- Your previous experience as a Software Developer and specific experience with Next JS/Supabase

- Key skills or qualifications that make you a strong fit for this position.



Please note: Applications without a video will not be reviewed. We look forward to welcoming a passionate developer who prioritizes clean code, performance optimization, and delivering exceptional user experiences.

title: Chatbot & Automation Assistant
description:
The Chatbot & Automation Assistant will be responsible for managing, maintaining, and continuously improving our AI-powered chatbot. This role sits at the intersection of data, automation, operations, and customer experience.



You will help ensure that the chatbot delivers accurate, helpful, and reliable responses by assisting in maintaining its knowledge base, monitoring performance, improving workflows, and implementing automation strategies. This role requires strong analytical thinking, technical skills, and a passion for AI-driven solutions.



Responsibilities include, but are not limited to:

-Chatbot Management: Maintain and update the chatbot’s knowledge base, prompts, workflows, and response logic.



-Content & Knowledge Operations: Curate, organize, and validate chatbot training data, FAQs, documentation, and internal resources.



-Quality Assurance: Monitor chatbot conversations to identify errors, gaps, and improvement opportunities.



-Performance Monitoring: Track chatbot usage, accuracy, resolution rate, and user satisfaction.



-Automation & Optimization: Build formulas, scripts, and automations to improve chatbot workflows and reporting.



-Data Analysis & Reporting: Create dashboards and reports on chatbot performance and adoption.



-Documentation: Maintain clear documentation of chatbot processes, logic, and improvement roadmap.



-Cross-Team Collaboration: Work closely with Data, Operations, HR, and leadership teams to align chatbot capabilities with business needs.





-Continuous Improvement: Proactively propose enhancements to chatbot accuracy, intelligence, and efficiency.



QUALIFICATIONS:

-AI & Chatbot Platforms: Familiarity with chatbot platforms, AI tools, or conversational AI systems (at least 1 year of experience in the same field).



-Google Sheets & Data Tools: Strong proficiency in Google Sheets for tracking, reporting, and automation.



-Automation & Scripting: 1 year of experience with formulas and Google Apps Script for workflow automation.



-Data Analysis: Ability to analyze chatbot conversations, performance metrics, and usage trends.



-Prompt Engineering: Ability to design, test, and refine prompts to improve chatbot accuracy and behavior.



-Knowledge Management: Experience organizing structured knowledge bases, FAQs, and documentation.



-Quality Assurance: Strong attention to detail for validating chatbot responses and logic.



-Security & Access Control: Understanding of data privacy, access control, and responsible AI practices.



-Collaboration Skills: Strong communication skills and experience working cross-functionally.



-Continuous Learning: Strong interest in AI, automation, and emerging technologies.



-Programming Languages & Technical Stack.



Candidates are expected to either already have or be willing to learn the following technologies:

-Core Languages



-JavaScript – for Google Apps Script, automation, and integrations



-Python (optional but highly valuable) – for data analysis, AI tooling, and backend automation



-SQL (basic) – for querying chatbot logs and analytics databases



-Automation & AI Tools



-Google Apps Script



-Google Sheets Automation



-Chatbot / AI platforms (internal or third-party)



-API integrations (REST, JSON)



-BigQuery (optional, for analytics scaling)



-Dashboarding tools (internal or BI platforms)



PERK & BENEFITS:

-Strong focus on work-life balance



-Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI and automation systems



-Direct impact on product, operations, and customer experience



-Long-term growth path in AI, Data, and Automation



All set to dive into this new adventure?

Please fill out the form so we can proceed with your application:

title: Online Installations Technician
description:
As an Online Installation Technician, you will play a critical role in remotely supporting the installation of AI systems in the U.S. This is a fully remote contractor position where you will guide on-the-ground technicians through various installation steps, ensuring successful implementation and troubleshooting of any issues that arise. Your expertise in hardware, software, and troubleshooting will be essential in maintaining smooth operations and delivering high-quality support to our partners and customers. Payment for this role is on an hourly basis.

- Excellent Communication Skills: Proficient in English with an easy-to-understand accent, confidence in speaking, and smooth communication skills.

About the role:

Please fill out the form so we can get started!

 Work Setup: Remote
